terms.definition: A filtering device fitted to the suction side of cargo or ballast pumps to prevent entry of solid particles and debris that could damage the pump or impede flow.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Chief engineer to pumpman: Inspect and clean all pump strainers before starting cargo discharge operations.

termTranslations.th: ไส้กรองปั๊ม

usageTranslations.en: Chief engineer to pumpman: Inspect and clean all pump strainers before starting cargo discharge operations.
usageTranslations.tr: Baş mühendis pompacıya: Kargo tahliyesine başlamadan önce tüm pompa filtrelerini kontrol edip temizleyin.
usageTranslations.fr: Chef mécanicien au pompiste : Inspectez et nettoyez toutes les crépines de pompe avant de commencer la décharge.
usageTranslations.de: Chefingenieur an Pumpenmann: Kontrollieren und reinigen Sie alle Pumpenfilter vor Entladung.
usageTranslations.es: Jefe de máquinas al bombeador: Inspeccione y limpie todos los filtros de bomba antes de iniciar la descarga.
usageTranslations.zh: 轮机长对泵工：卸货作业前检查并清洁所有泵滤网。
usageTranslations.ar: كبير المهندسين لعامل المضخة: افحص ونظف جميع مصافي المضخات قبل بدء التفريغ.
usageTranslations.pt: Chefe de máquinas ao bombeiro: Inspecione e limpe todos os filtros antes da descarga.
usageTranslations.ru: Старший механик насоснику: Проверьте и очистите все фильтры насоса перед выгрузкой.
usageTranslations.ja: チーフエンジニアからポンプマンへ：荷役開始前に全てのポンプストレーナーを点検清掃してください。
usageTranslations.it: Capo ingegnere al pompiere: Ispezionare e pulire tutti i filtri della pompa prima dello scarico.
usageTranslations.vi: Kỹ sư trưởng tới người vận hành bơm: Kiểm tra và làm sạch tất cả bộ lọc bơm trước khi xả hàng.
usageTranslations.hi: मुख्य अभियंता से पंपमैन: डिस्चार्ज से पहले सभी पंप स्ट्रेनर की जाँच और सफाई करें।
usageTranslations.th: หัวหน้าวิศวกรถึงเจ้าหน้าที่ปั๊ม: ตรวจสอบและทำความสะอาดไส้กรองปั๊มทุกชิ้นก่อนระบายสินค้า
usageTranslations.id: Kepala insinyur ke petugas pompa: Periksa dan bersihkan semua saringan pompa sebelum bongkar kargo.

terms.definition: Immediate cessation of cargo or bunker transfer operations, activated by crew or terminal, to prevent accidents or mitigate hazards.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Terminal to vessel: Initiate emergency shutdown immediately due to detected leak in the manifold area.

termTranslations.th: การปิดฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: Terminal to vessel: Initiate emergency shutdown immediately due to detected leak in the manifold area.
usageTranslations.tr: Terminalden gemiye: Manifold bölgesinde sızıntı tespit edildiğinden acil durdurma işlemini hemen başlatın.
usageTranslations.fr: Terminal au navire : Démarrez l'arrêt d'urgence immédiatement suite à une fuite détectée au collecteur.
usageTranslations.de: Terminal an Schiff: Leck im Manifoldbereich erkannt – Notabschaltung sofort einleiten.
usageTranslations.es: Terminal a buque: Inicie parada de emergencia de inmediato por fuga detectada en el colector.
usageTranslations.zh: 码头至船舶：歧管区域发现泄漏，立即启动紧急停机。
usageTranslations.ar: المحطة إلى السفينة: ابدأ الإيقاف الطارئ فوراً بسبب تسرب في منطقة المشعب.
usageTranslations.pt: Terminal para navio: Inicie o desligamento de emergência imediatamente devido a vazamento detectado no manifold.
usageTranslations.ru: Терминал судну: Обнаружена утечка в районе манифольда, срочно начать аварийную остановку.
usageTranslations.ja: ターミナルより船舶へ：マニホールド部で漏洩検知、直ちに緊急シャットダウン開始。
usageTranslations.it: Terminal alla nave: Avviare subito l'arresto di emergenza per perdita rilevata sul collettore.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng tới tàu: Khẩn trương thực hiện ngừng khẩn cấp do phát hiện rò rỉ tại manifold.
usageTranslations.hi: टर्मिनल से पोत: मैनिफोल्ड क्षेत्र में रिसाव के कारण तुरंत आपातकालीन बंदी शुरू करें।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือถึงเรือ: ให้ปิดฉุกเฉินทันทีเนื่องจากพบการรั่วซึมบริเวณท่อรวม
usageTranslations.id: Terminal ke kapal: Lakukan penutupan darurat segera karena ditemukan kebocoran di area manifold.

terms.definition: A pipeline connecting cargo manifold or transfer system back to the tank, used for circulation or pressure control during loading, stripping, or line clearing.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Cargo officer to pumpman: Use the kickback line to circulate cargo and maintain even tank temperature during discharge.

termTranslations.th: สายคิกแบค

usageTranslations.en: Cargo officer to pumpman: Use the kickback line to circulate cargo and maintain even tank temperature during discharge.
usageTranslations.tr: Yük zabiti pompacıya: Tahliye sırasında kargoyu sirküle etmek ve tank sıcaklığını sabit tutmak için geri dönüş hattını kullanın.
usageTranslations.fr: Officier de cargaison au pompiste : Utilisez la ligne de retour pour faire circuler la cargaison et maintenir une température constante lors du déchargement.
usageTranslations.de: Ladeoffizier an Pumpenmann: Verwenden Sie die Rückführleitung, um die Ladung während der Entladung umzuwälzen und die Tanktemperatur konstant zu halten.
usageTranslations.es: Oficial de carga al bombeador: Use la línea de retorno para circular la carga y mantener la temperatura durante la descarga.
usageTranslations.zh: 货运员对泵工：卸货时用回流管线循环货物并保持舱内温度均匀。
usageTranslations.ar: ضابط الشحن إلى عامل المضخة: استخدم خط الارتجاع لتدوير الحمولة والحفاظ على درجة حرارة الخزان أثناء التفريغ.
usageTranslations.pt: Oficial de carga ao bombeiro: Use a linha de retorno para circular a carga e manter a temperatura durante a descarga.
usageTranslations.ru: Офицер груза насоснику: Используйте обратную линию для циркуляции груза и поддержания температуры в танке при выгрузке.
usageTranslations.ja: カーゴオフィサーからポンプマンへ：荷揚げ時はキックバックラインで循環し温度を均一に保ってください。
usageTranslations.it: Ufficiale carico al pompiere: Utilizzare la linea di ritorno per far circolare il carico e mantenere la temperatura durante lo scarico.
usageTranslations.vi: Sỹ quan hàng hóa tới người vận hành bơm: Dùng đường hồi lưu để lưu thông hàng và giữ nhiệt độ két khi xả hàng.
usageTranslations.hi: कार्गो अधिकारी से पंपमैन: डिस्चार्ज के दौरान सामान का तापमान बनाए रखने के लिए किकबैक लाइन का प्रयोग करें।
usageTranslations.th: เจ้าหน้าที่สินค้าให้เจ้าหน้าที่ปั๊ม: ใช้สายคิกแบคเพื่อหมุนเวียนสินค้าและรักษาอุณหภูมิถังขณะถ่ายสินค้า
usageTranslations.id: Petugas kargo ke operator pompa: Gunakan saluran kickback untuk sirkulasi kargo dan menjaga suhu tangki selama pembongkaran.

terms.definition: Controlled removal of cargo residues or small remaining quantities from tanks and lines after main discharge, ensuring tanks are as empty as safely possible.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Terminal to vessel: Complete cargo draining procedures on all tanks before commencing tank cleaning operations.

termTranslations.th: การระบายสินค้าคงเหลือ

usageTranslations.en: Terminal to vessel: Complete cargo draining procedures on all tanks before commencing tank cleaning operations.
usageTranslations.tr: Terminalden gemiye: Tank temizliğine başlamadan önce tüm tanklarda kargo drenaj işlemlerini tamamlayın.
usageTranslations.fr: Terminal au navire : Effectuez la vidange de cargaison sur tous les réservoirs avant le nettoyage.
usageTranslations.de: Terminal an Schiff: Führen Sie die Ladungsentleerung in allen Tanks durch, bevor mit der Tankreinigung begonnen wird.
usageTranslations.es: Terminal a buque: Realice el drenaje de carga en todos los tanques antes de limpiar.
usageTranslations.zh: 码头至船舶：在进行舱清洗前，先完成所有舱的货物排放程序。
usageTranslations.ar: المحطة إلى السفينة: أكمل إجراءات تصريف الحمولة في جميع الخزانات قبل بدء تنظيف الخزان.
usageTranslations.pt: Terminal para navio: Complete a drenagem de carga em todos os tanques antes de iniciar a limpeza.
usageTranslations.ru: Терминал судну: Завершите слив остатков груза во всех танках до начала очистки.
usageTranslations.ja: ターミナルより船舶へ：タンク洗浄前に全タンクのカーゴドレイニングを完了してください。
usageTranslations.it: Terminal alla nave: Completare il drenaggio del carico su tutti i serbatoi prima della pulizia.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng tới tàu: Hoàn thành quy trình xả cặn hàng hóa trên tất cả các két trước khi làm sạch két.
usageTranslations.hi: टर्मिनल से पोत: टैंक की सफाई शुरू करने से पहले सभी टैंक में कार्गो ड्रेनिंग की प्रक्रिया पूरी करें।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือถึงเรือ: ให้ดำเนินการระบายสินค้าคงเหลือในถังทุกใบให้เสร็จก่อนล้างถัง
usageTranslations.id: Terminal ke kapal: Selesaikan pengurasan kargo pada semua tangki sebelum pembersihan tangki.

terms.definition: The process of removing water from cargo, especially crude oil, by settling, heating, or chemical means, to meet quality or contract requirements.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Vessel to terminal: Cargo dehydration will be performed by settling for 12 hours prior to transfer.

termTranslations.th: การกำจัดน้ำในสินค้า

usageTranslations.en: Vessel to terminal: Cargo dehydration will be performed by settling for 12 hours prior to transfer.
usageTranslations.tr: Gemi terminale: Transfer öncesi 12 saat bekletilerek kargo dehidrasyonu yapılacaktır.
usageTranslations.fr: Navire au terminal : La déshydratation de la cargaison sera effectuée par décantation pendant 12 heures avant le transfert.
usageTranslations.de: Schiff an Terminal: Die Ladungsentwässerung erfolgt durch 12-stündiges Absetzen vor der Übergabe.
usageTranslations.es: Buque a terminal: La deshidratación de la carga se realizará por decantación durante 12 horas antes de la transferencia.
usageTranslations.zh: 船舶至码头：转运前将静置12小时进行货物脱水。
usageTranslations.ar: السفينة إلى المحطة: سيتم تجفيف الحمولة بالترسيب لمدة 12 ساعة قبل النقل.
usageTranslations.pt: Navio para terminal: A desidratação da carga será feita por decantação por 12 horas antes da transferência.
usageTranslations.ru: Судно терминалу: Обезвоживание груза будет выполнено отстаиванием в течение 12 часов до передачи.
usageTranslations.ja: 船舶からターミナルへ：荷役前に12時間静置してカーゴ脱水を行います。
usageTranslations.it: Nave al terminal: La disidratazione del carico sarà effettuata per sedimentazione per 12 ore prima del trasferimento.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu tới cảng: Sẽ khử nước hàng hóa bằng lắng trong 12 giờ trước khi chuyển giao.
usageTranslations.hi: जहाज से टर्मिनल: स्थानांतरण से पहले 12 घंटे के लिए बैठाकर कार्गो डिहाइड्रेशन किया जाएगा।
usageTranslations.th: เรือถึงท่า: จะดำเนินการกำจัดน้ำในสินค้าด้วยการตกตะกอนเป็นเวลา 12 ชั่วโมงก่อนถ่ายโอน
usageTranslations.id: Kapal ke terminal: Dehidrasi kargo akan dilakukan dengan mengendapkan selama 12 jam sebelum transfer.

terms.definition: A pressure vessel or chamber installed at the end of a pipeline to receive the pig after cleaning, used in cargo or ballast line maintenance.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Terminal to vessel: Confirm pig receiver is ready and all safety protocols are followed before starting pigging operation.

termTranslations.th: เครื่องรับพิก

usageTranslations.en: Terminal to vessel: Confirm pig receiver is ready and all safety protocols are followed before starting pigging operation.
usageTranslations.tr: Terminalden gemiye: Pigleme işlemine başlamadan önce pig alıcısının hazır olduğunu ve tüm güvenlik protokollerinin uygulandığını onaylayın.
usageTranslations.fr: Terminal au navire : Confirmez que le récepteur de pig est prêt et que tous les protocoles de sécurité sont respectés avant de commencer l'opération.
usageTranslations.de: Terminal an Schiff: Bestätigen Sie, dass der Pig-Empfänger bereit ist und alle Sicherheitsprotokolle vor Beginn der Pigging-Operation eingehalten werden.
usageTranslations.es: Terminal a buque: Confirme que el recibidor de pig está listo y se han seguido todos los protocolos de seguridad antes de comenzar.
usageTranslations.zh: 码头至船舶：在开始清管操作前确认清管器接收器已就绪且所有安全规范已执行。
usageTranslations.ar: المحطة إلى السفينة: أكد أن مستقبل الخنزير جاهز وتم اتباع جميع بروتوكولات السلامة قبل بدء العملية.
usageTranslations.pt: Terminal para navio: Confirme que o recebedor de pig está pronto e todos os protocolos de segurança foram seguidos antes de iniciar.
usageTranslations.ru: Терминал судну: Убедитесь, что приемник скребка готов и все протоколы соблюдены до начала работы.
usageTranslations.ja: ターミナルより船舶へ：ピグレシーバーが準備完了、安全プロトコル遵守を確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Terminal alla nave: Confermare che il ricevitore pig sia pronto e che tutti i protocolli di sicurezza siano rispettati prima di iniziare.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng tới tàu: Xác nhận bộ nhận pig đã sẵn sàng và tuân thủ quy trình an toàn trước khi vận hành.
usageTranslations.hi: टर्मिनल से पोत: पिगिंग शुरू करने से पहले पिग रिसीवर की तैयारी और सुरक्षा प्रोटोकॉल की पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือถึงเรือ: ยืนยันว่าเครื่องรับพิกพร้อมและปฏิบัติตามมาตรการความปลอดภัยก่อนเริ่มงาน
usageTranslations.id: Terminal ke kapal: Konfirmasi penerima pig siap dan semua protokol keselamatan dipatuhi sebelum operasi pigging.

terms.definition: A pipe or valve arrangement that allows transfer between different cargo manifolds, enabling flexibility in cargo handling or emergency operations.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Cargo officer to crew: Open manifold crossover valves as per loading plan to ensure smooth transfer between tanks.

termTranslations.ja: マニホールドクロスオーバー
termTranslations.th: การต่อข้ามแมนิโฟลด์

usageTranslations.en: Cargo officer to crew: Open manifold crossover valves as per loading plan to ensure smooth transfer between tanks.
usageTranslations.tr: Yük zabiti ekibe: Tanklar arası sorunsuz transfer için yükleme planına göre manifold geçiş vanalarını açın.
usageTranslations.fr: Officier de cargaison à l'équipage : Ouvrez les vannes de croisement selon le plan de chargement.
usageTranslations.de: Ladeoffizier an Mannschaft: Öffnen Sie die Manifold-Übergangsventile gemäß Ladeplan für einen reibungslosen Tanktransfer.
usageTranslations.es: Oficial de carga a la tripulación: Abran las válvulas de cruce de colectores según el plan de carga.
usageTranslations.zh: 货运员对船员：按装货计划开启歧管跨接阀，确保舱间顺利转运。
usageTranslations.ar: ضابط الشحن للطاقم: افتح صمامات العبور المشترك وفقاً لخطة التحميل لضمان انتقال سلس بين الخزانات.
usageTranslations.pt: Oficial de carga à tripulação: Abra as válvulas de crossover conforme o plano de carregamento.
usageTranslations.ru: Офицер груза экипажу: Откройте переходные краны согласно плану загрузки для плавной перекачки.
usageTranslations.ja: カーゴオフィサーから乗組員へ：ローディングプランに従い、マニホールドクロスオーバーバルブを開けてください。
usageTranslations.it: Ufficiale carico all'equipaggio: Aprire le valvole crossover secondo il piano di caricamento.
usageTranslations.vi: Sỹ quan hàng hóa tới đội tàu: Mở van chuyển mạch manifold theo kế hoạch nạp hàng.
usageTranslations.hi: कार्गो अधिकारी से दल: टैंक स्थानांतरण के लिए लोडिंग प्लान अनुसार मैनिफोल्ड क्रॉसओवर वॉल्व खोलें।
usageTranslations.th: เจ้าหน้าที่สินค้าให้ลูกเรือ: เปิดวาล์วข้ามแมนิโฟลด์ตามแผนโหลดเพื่อโอนถ่ายสินค้า
usageTranslations.id: Petugas kargo ke kru: Buka katup crossover manifold sesuai rencana pemuatan.

terms.definition: The planned order and method for loading cargoes into tanks to maintain vessel stability, prevent contamination, and comply with charter requirements.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Terminal to vessel: Confirm the approved loading sequence has been reviewed and is being followed during operations.

termTranslations.ja: ローディングシーケンス
termTranslations.th: ลำดับการโหลด

usageTranslations.en: Terminal to vessel: Confirm the approved loading sequence has been reviewed and is being followed during operations.
usageTranslations.tr: Terminalden gemiye: Onaylanan yükleme sırasının incelendiğini ve operasyon sırasında uygulandığını onaylayın.
usageTranslations.fr: Terminal au navire : Confirmez que la séquence de chargement approuvée a été examinée et est suivie.
usageTranslations.de: Terminal an Schiff: Bestätigen Sie, dass die genehmigte Ladereihenfolge geprüft und eingehalten wird.
usageTranslations.es: Terminal a buque: Confirme que la secuencia de carga aprobada ha sido revisada y seguida.
usageTranslations.zh: 码头至船舶：确认已审核并执行获批的装货顺序。
usageTranslations.ar: المحطة إلى السفينة: أكد مراجعة وتنفيذ تسلسل التحميل المعتمد أثناء العمليات.
usageTranslations.pt: Terminal para navio: Confirme que a sequência aprovada foi revisada e está sendo seguida.
usageTranslations.ru: Терминал судну: Подтвердите, что утвержденная последовательность загрузки рассмотрена и соблюдается.
usageTranslations.ja: ターミナルより船舶へ：承認済みローディングシーケンスが確認され、運用中に順守されていることを報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Terminal alla nave: Confermare che la sequenza di carico approvata sia stata esaminata e rispettata.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng tới tàu: Xác nhận trình tự nạp hàng đã được phê duyệt và thực hiện đúng quy trình.
usageTranslations.hi: टर्मिनल से पोत: स्वीकृत लोडिंग अनुक्रम की समीक्षा की गई है और वह संचालन के दौरान अपनाया जा रहा है, इसकी पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือถึงเรือ: ยืนยันว่าลำดับการโหลดที่ได้รับอนุมัติได้รับการตรวจสอบและปฏิบัติตามแล้ว
usageTranslations.id: Terminal ke kapal: Konfirmasi urutan pemuatan yang disetujui sudah ditinjau dan diikuti.

terms.definition: The appointed person or office responsible for communication and coordination between ship and terminal during cargo operations.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Master to terminal: Please provide the contact details for the designated terminal liaison for today's cargo operation.

termTranslations.th: ผู้ประสานงานท่าเรือ

usageTranslations.en: Master to terminal: Please provide the contact details for the designated terminal liaison for today's cargo operation.
usageTranslations.tr: Kaptandan terminale: Bugünkü yük operasyonu için belirlenen terminal temsilcisinin iletişim bilgilerini iletin.
usageTranslations.fr: Capitaine au terminal : Merci de fournir les coordonnées du responsable de liaison pour l'opération d'aujourd'hui.
usageTranslations.de: Kapitän an Terminal: Bitte teilen Sie die Kontaktdaten des vorgesehenen Terminalverbindungsbeamten für den heutigen Ladebetrieb mit.
usageTranslations.es: Capitán a terminal: Proporcione los datos de contacto del enlace terminal designado para la operación de hoy.
usageTranslations.zh: 船长至码头：请提供今日作业指定的码头联络人联系方式。
usageTranslations.ar: القبطان إلى المحطة: يرجى تزويدنا بتفاصيل الاتصال بمسؤول الاتصال المعين لعملية اليوم.
usageTranslations.pt: Mestre para terminal: Forneça os contatos do liaison do terminal para a operação de hoje.
usageTranslations.ru: Капитан терминалу: Прошу предоставить контакты назначенного связного терминала для сегодняшней операции.
usageTranslations.ja: 船長からターミナルへ：本日のカーゴ作業担当ターミナル連絡員の連絡先を教えてください。
usageTranslations.it: Comandante al terminal: Fornire i contatti del referente terminale per l'operazione odierna.
usageTranslations.vi: Thuyền trưởng tới cảng: Vui lòng cung cấp liên hệ của nhân viên liên lạc cảng được phân công hôm nay.
usageTranslations.hi: कैप्टन से टर्मिनल: आज की कार्गो ऑपरेशन के लिए नामित टर्मिनल लिआजन का संपर्क विवरण दें।
usageTranslations.th: กัปตันถึงท่าเรือ: กรุณาแจ้งรายละเอียดผู้ประสานงานท่าเรือที่รับผิดชอบงานวันนี้
usageTranslations.id: Kapten ke terminal: Mohon kirimkan kontak petugas penghubung terminal yang ditunjuk untuk operasi hari ini.

terms.definition: Process of cleaning cargo or ballast pipelines by circulating water, air, or another fluid to remove remaining product and contaminants.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Terminal to vessel: Perform line flushing after cargo discharge to ensure lines are free from residues.

termTranslations.th: การล้างท่อ

usageTranslations.en: Terminal to vessel: Perform line flushing after cargo discharge to ensure lines are free from residues.
usageTranslations.tr: Terminalden gemiye: Kargo tahliyesinden sonra hat yıkama yaparak hatların kalıntısız olduğundan emin olun.
usageTranslations.fr: Terminal au navire : Effectuez le rinçage des canalisations après le déchargement pour éliminer tout résidu.
usageTranslations.de: Terminal an Schiff: Spülen Sie nach der Ladungsentladung die Leitungen, damit keine Rückstände verbleiben.
usageTranslations.es: Terminal a buque: Realice el enjuague de línea después de la descarga para garantizar la ausencia de residuos.
usageTranslations.zh: 码头至船舶：卸货后进行管线冲洗，确保管道无残留物。
usageTranslations.ar: المحطة إلى السفينة: نفذ غسل الخط بعد تفريغ الحمولة للتأكد من خلو الخطوط من الرواسب.
usageTranslations.pt: Terminal para navio: Realize a lavagem das linhas após a descarga para garantir que estejam limpas.
usageTranslations.ru: Терминал судну: После выгрузки груза выполните промывку трубопроводов для удаления остатков.
usageTranslations.ja: ターミナルより船舶へ：荷下ろし後、ラインフラッシングを行い残渣の無いことを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Terminal alla nave: Eseguire il lavaggio delle linee dopo lo scarico per eliminare i residui.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng tới tàu: Thực hiện sục rửa đường ống sau khi xả hàng để đảm bảo không còn tồn dư.
usageTranslations.hi: टर्मिनल से पोत: डिस्चार्ज के बाद लाइन फ्लशिंग करें ताकि लाइन में अवशेष न रहें।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือถึงเรือ: ล้างท่อหลังขนถ่ายสินค้าเพื่อให้แน่ใจว่าไม่มีสิ่งตกค้าง
usageTranslations.id: Terminal ke kapal: Lakukan pembilasan pipa setelah bongkar muat untuk memastikan pipa bersih dari residu.

terms.definition: Procedure to collect representative samples of vapour from tanks or lines for safety, quality, or regulatory compliance testing.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Terminal to vessel: Conduct vapour sampling before commencing closed loading to verify tank atmosphere composition.

termTranslations.ja: ベーパーサンプリング
termTranslations.th: การสุ่มตัวอย่างไอระเหย

usageTranslations.en: Terminal to vessel: Conduct vapour sampling before commencing closed loading to verify tank atmosphere composition.
usageTranslations.tr: Terminalden gemiye: Kapalı yüklemeye başlamadan önce tank atmosferini doğrulamak için buhar numune alma işlemi gerçekleştirin.
usageTranslations.fr: Terminal au navire : Effectuez l'échantillonnage de vapeur avant le chargement fermé pour vérifier la composition de l'atmosphère du réservoir.
usageTranslations.de: Terminal an Schiff: Führen Sie vor Beginn des geschlossenen Ladevorgangs eine Dampfprobenahme durch, um die Tankatmosphäre zu prüfen.
usageTranslations.es: Terminal a buque: Realice el muestreo de vapor antes de comenzar la carga cerrada para verificar la composición atmosférica del tanque.
usageTranslations.zh: 码头至船舶：在闭式装货前进行蒸气采样以验证舱内大气成分。
usageTranslations.ar: المحطة إلى السفينة: قم بأخذ عينات البخار قبل بدء التحميل المغلق للتحقق من تكوين جو الخزان.
usageTranslations.pt: Terminal para navio: Realize a amostragem de vapor antes de iniciar o carregamento fechado para verificar a composição da atmosfera do tanque.
usageTranslations.ru: Терминал судну: Проведите отбор проб паров перед началом закрытой загрузки для проверки состава атмосферы танка.
usageTranslations.ja: ターミナルより船舶へ：クローズドローディング前にベーパーサンプリングを行い、タンク内雰囲気を確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Terminal alla nave: Eseguire il campionamento di vapore prima di iniziare il caricamento chiuso per verificare la composizione dell'atmosfera.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng tới tàu: Lấy mẫu hơi trước khi nạp kín để kiểm tra thành phần khí trong két.
usageTranslations.hi: टर्मिनल से पोत: क्लोज्ड लोडिंग शुरू करने से पहले टैंक वातावरण की पुष्टि के लिए वाष्प सैंपलिंग करें।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือถึงเรือ: ตรวจสอบบรรยากาศถังก่อนโหลดแบบปิดด้วยการสุ่มตัวอย่างไอระเหย
usageTranslations.id: Terminal ke kapal: Lakukan pengambilan sampel uap sebelum pemuatan tertutup untuk verifikasi komposisi atmosfer tangki.

terms.definition: Process of introducing inert gas (often nitrogen) into the tank vapor space to maintain safe conditions, prevent air ingress, and control tank atmosphere.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Terminal to vessel: Initiate tank padding with nitrogen before starting cargo transfer to maintain an inert atmosphere.

termTranslations.vi: Bổ sung khí trơ cho két
termTranslations.th: การเติมแก๊สเฉื่อยในถัง

usageTranslations.en: Terminal to vessel: Initiate tank padding with nitrogen before starting cargo transfer to maintain an inert atmosphere.
usageTranslations.tr: Terminalden gemiye: İnert atmosferi korumak için kargo transferi başlamadan önce azot ile tank yastıklama işlemini başlatın.
usageTranslations.fr: Terminal au navire : Démarrez le remplissage tampon du réservoir avec de l'azote avant le transfert de cargaison.
usageTranslations.de: Terminal an Schiff: Beginnen Sie vor dem Ladungsumschlag mit der Tankpolsterung mit Stickstoff, um eine inerte Atmosphäre zu erhalten.
usageTranslations.es: Terminal a buque: Inicie el acolchado del tanque con nitrógeno antes de transferir la carga.
usageTranslations.zh: 码头至船舶：在进行货物转移前用氮气进行舱垫气以维持惰性气氛。
usageTranslations.ar: المحطة إلى السفينة: ابدأ تبطين الخزان بالنيتروجين قبل نقل الحمولة للحفاظ على جو خامل.
usageTranslations.pt: Terminal para navio: Inicie o acolchoamento do tanque com nitrogênio antes da transferência de carga.
usageTranslations.ru: Терминал судну: Перед началом перевалки начните подачу азота для создания инертной атмосферы в танке.
usageTranslations.ja: ターミナルより船舶へ：貨物移送開始前に窒素によるタンクパディングを実施してください。
usageTranslations.it: Terminal alla nave: Iniziare il tamponamento del serbatoio con azoto prima di trasferire il carico.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng tới tàu: Tiến hành bổ sung khí nitơ cho két trước khi chuyển hàng để duy trì khí trơ.
usageTranslations.hi: टर्मिनल से पोत: इनर्ट वातावरण बनाए रखने के लिए कर्षण से पहले टैंक पैडिंग नाइट्रोजन से करें।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือถึงเรือ: ดำเนินการเติมแก๊สเฉื่อยไนโตรเจนก่อนขนถ่ายสินค้าเพื่อควบคุมบรรยากาศในถัง
usageTranslations.id: Terminal ke kapal: Mulai pengisian gas penyangga tangki dengan nitrogen sebelum transfer kargo.

terms.definition: A pipeline connecting the manifold or transfer system back to a tank, used for circulating cargo, line clearing, or pressure control during loading and stripping.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Cargo officer to pumpman: Open kickback line and recirculate cargo for uniform tank temperature during discharge.

termTranslations.th: สายคิกแบค

usageTranslations.en: Cargo officer to pumpman: Open kickback line and recirculate cargo for uniform tank temperature during discharge.
usageTranslations.tr: Yük zabiti pompacıya: Tahliye sırasında tank sıcaklığını eşitlemek için geri dönüş hattını açıp kargoyu sirküle edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Officier de cargaison au pompiste : Ouvrez la ligne de retour et faites circuler la cargaison pour maintenir une température uniforme.
usageTranslations.de: Ladeoffizier an Pumpenmann: Rückführleitung öffnen und Ladung für gleichmäßige Tanktemperatur umwälzen.
usageTranslations.es: Oficial de carga al bombeador: Abra la línea de retorno y recircule la carga para mantener la temperatura.
usageTranslations.zh: 货运员对泵工：卸货时打开回流管线循环货物以保持舱内温度均匀。
usageTranslations.ar: ضابط الشحن لعامل المضخة: افتح خط الارتجاع ودوّر الحمولة للحفاظ على درجة الحرارة.
usageTranslations.pt: Oficial de carga ao bombeiro: Abra a linha de retorno e recircule a carga para temperatura uniforme.
usageTranslations.ru: Офицер груза насоснику: Откройте обратную линию и циркулируйте груз для равномерной температуры.
usageTranslations.ja: カーゴオフィサーからポンプマンへ：キックバックラインを開けて荷役中に循環してください。
usageTranslations.it: Ufficiale carico al pompiere: Aprire la linea di ritorno e ricircolare il carico.
usageTranslations.vi: Sỹ quan hàng hóa tới bơm: Mở đường hồi lưu và tuần hoàn hàng để giữ nhiệt độ két đồng đều.
usageTranslations.hi: कार्गो अधिकारी से पंपमैन: किकबैक लाइन खोलें और टैंक तापमान के लिए सर्कुलेट करें।
usageTranslations.th: เจ้าหน้าที่สินค้าให้เจ้าหน้าที่ปั๊ม: เปิดสายคิกแบคและหมุนเวียนสินค้า
usageTranslations.id: Petugas kargo ke operator pompa: Buka saluran kickback dan sirkulasikan kargo.

terms.definition: Removal of cargo residues or small quantities from tanks and pipelines after main discharge, ensuring tanks are as empty as safely possible.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Terminal to vessel: Complete cargo draining on all tanks before starting tank cleaning.

termTranslations.th: การระบายสินค้าคงเหลือ

usageTranslations.en: Terminal to vessel: Complete cargo draining on all tanks before starting tank cleaning.
usageTranslations.tr: Terminalden gemiye: Tank temizliğine başlamadan önce tüm tanklarda kargo drenajını tamamlayın.
usageTranslations.fr: Terminal au navire : Effectuez la vidange sur tous les réservoirs avant nettoyage.
usageTranslations.de: Terminal an Schiff: Ladungsentleerung in allen Tanks vor Reinigung abschließen.
usageTranslations.es: Terminal a buque: Realice el drenaje de carga en todos los tanques antes de limpiar.
usageTranslations.zh: 码头至船舶：进行舱清洗前先完成所有舱的货物排放。
usageTranslations.ar: المحطة إلى السفينة: أكمل تصريف الحمولة في جميع الخزانات قبل تنظيف الخزان.
usageTranslations.pt: Terminal para navio: Complete a drenagem de carga antes da limpeza dos tanques.
usageTranslations.ru: Терминал судну: Завершить слив остатков груза во всех танках до начала очистки.
usageTranslations.ja: ターミナルより船舶へ：洗浄前に全タンクのカーゴドレイニングを完了してください。
usageTranslations.it: Terminal alla nave: Completare il drenaggio su tutti i serbatoi prima della pulizia.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng tới tàu: Hoàn thành xả cặn hàng hóa trên tất cả các két trước khi làm sạch két.
usageTranslations.hi: टर्मिनल से पोत: टैंक की सफाई से पहले सभी टैंक में कार्गो ड्रेनिंग पूरी करें।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือถึงเรือ: ให้ดำเนินการระบายสินค้าคงเหลือในถังทุกใบก่อนล้างถัง
usageTranslations.id: Terminal ke kapal: Selesaikan pengurasan kargo sebelum pembersihan tangki.

terms.definition: The process of removing water from cargo, especially crude oil, by settling, heating, or chemical means to meet quality or contract requirements.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Vessel to terminal: Cargo dehydration will be performed by settling for 12 hours prior to transfer.

termTranslations.th: การกำจัดน้ำในสินค้า

usageTranslations.en: Vessel to terminal: Cargo dehydration will be performed by settling for 12 hours prior to transfer.
usageTranslations.tr: Gemi terminale: Transfer öncesi 12 saat bekletilerek kargo dehidrasyonu yapılacaktır.
usageTranslations.fr: Navire au terminal : La déshydratation sera effectuée par décantation pendant 12 heures.
usageTranslations.de: Schiff an Terminal: Entwässerung durch 12-stündiges Absetzen vor Übergabe.
usageTranslations.es: Buque a terminal: La deshidratación se realizará por decantación durante 12 horas.
usageTranslations.zh: 船舶至码头：转运前静置12小时进行脱水。
usageTranslations.ar: السفينة إلى المحطة: سيتم تجفيف الحمولة بالترسيب لمدة 12 ساعة قبل النقل.
usageTranslations.pt: Navio para terminal: A desidratação será feita por decantação por 12 horas.
usageTranslations.ru: Судно терминалу: Обезвоживание грузов путем отстаивания 12 часов до передачи.
usageTranslations.ja: 船舶からターミナルへ：荷役前に12時間静置して脱水します。
usageTranslations.it: Nave al terminal: Disidratazione per sedimentazione 12 ore prima del trasferimento.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu tới cảng: Khử nước hàng hóa bằng lắng trong 12 giờ trước khi chuyển giao.
usageTranslations.hi: जहाज से टर्मिनल: स्थानांतरण से पहले 12 घंटे के लिए बैठाकर डिहाइड्रेशन किया जाएगा।
usageTranslations.th: เรือถึงท่า: จะดำเนินการกำจัดน้ำในสินค้าด้วยการตกตะกอน 12 ชั่วโมง
usageTranslations.id: Kapal ke terminal: Dehidrasi kargo dengan pengendapan 12 jam sebelum transfer.

terms.definition: A pressure vessel or chamber at the end of a pipeline to receive the pig after cleaning or product transfer, used in cargo or ballast line maintenance.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Terminal to vessel: Confirm pig receiver is ready and safety protocols followed before pigging.

termTranslations.th: เครื่องรับพิก

usageTranslations.en: Terminal to vessel: Confirm pig receiver is ready and safety protocols followed before pigging.
usageTranslations.tr: Terminalden gemiye: Pigleme öncesi pig alıcısının hazır ve güvenlik prosedürlerinin tamamlandığını onaylayın.
usageTranslations.fr: Terminal au navire : Confirmez que le récepteur de pig est prêt avant l'opération.
usageTranslations.de: Terminal an Schiff: Bestätigen Sie, dass Pig-Empfänger bereit und Sicherheitsprotokolle eingehalten sind.
usageTranslations.es: Terminal a buque: Confirme que el recibidor está listo y protocolos de seguridad seguidos.
usageTranslations.zh: 码头至船舶：确认清管器接收器准备好并遵守安全规程。
usageTranslations.ar: المحطة إلى السفينة: أكد أن مستقبل الخنزير جاهز وتم اتباع بروتوكولات السلامة.
usageTranslations.pt: Terminal para navio: Confirme que o recebedor está pronto e protocolos de segurança seguidos.
usageTranslations.ru: Терминал судну: Подтвердить готовность приемника скребка и соблюдение протоколов.
usageTranslations.ja: ターミナルより船舶へ：ピグレシーバー準備完了・安全確認を報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Terminal alla nave: Confermare ricevitore pig pronto e sicurezza rispettata.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng tới tàu: Xác nhận bộ nhận pig sẵn sàng, tuân thủ an toàn.
usageTranslations.hi: टर्मिनल से पोत: पिग रिसीवर की तैयारी और सुरक्षा प्रोटोकॉल की पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือถึงเรือ: ยืนยันเครื่องรับพิกพร้อมและปฏิบัติตามมาตรการความปลอดภัย
usageTranslations.id: Terminal ke kapal: Konfirmasi penerima pig siap dan protokol keselamatan dijalankan.

terms.definition: A pipe or valve arrangement that allows transfer between different cargo manifolds for flexible or emergency cargo handling.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Cargo officer to crew: Open manifold crossover valves as per loading plan for transfer between tanks.

termTranslations.ja: マニホールドクロスオーバー
termTranslations.th: การต่อข้ามแมนิโฟลด์

usageTranslations.en: Cargo officer to crew: Open manifold crossover valves as per loading plan for transfer between tanks.
usageTranslations.tr: Yük zabiti ekibe: Yükleme planına göre manifold geçiş vanalarını açın.
usageTranslations.fr: Officier de cargaison à l'équipage : Ouvrez les vannes de croisement selon le plan.
usageTranslations.de: Ladeoffizier an Mannschaft: Öffnen Sie Manifold-Übergangsventile laut Plan.
usageTranslations.es: Oficial de carga a la tripulación: Abran las válvulas de cruce de colectores según el plan.
usageTranslations.zh: 货运员对船员：按装货计划开启歧管跨接阀。
usageTranslations.ar: ضابط الشحن للطاقم: افتح صمامات العبور حسب خطة التحميل.
usageTranslations.pt: Oficial de carga à tripulação: Abra as válvulas crossover conforme o plano.
usageTranslations.ru: Офицер груза экипажу: Откройте переходные краны по плану.
usageTranslations.ja: カーゴオフィサーから乗組員へ：プラン通りクロスオーバーバルブを開放。
usageTranslations.it: Ufficiale carico all'equipaggio: Aprire le valvole secondo il piano.
usageTranslations.vi: Sỹ quan hàng hóa tới đội tàu: Mở van chuyển mạch theo kế hoạch.
usageTranslations.hi: कार्गो अधिकारी से दल: योजना अनुसार मैनिफोल्ड क्रॉसओवर वॉल्व खोलें।
usageTranslations.th: เจ้าหน้าที่สินค้าให้ลูกเรือ: เปิดวาล์วข้ามแมนิโฟลด์ตามแผนโหลด
usageTranslations.id: Petugas kargo ke kru: Buka katup crossover sesuai rencana.

terms.definition: The planned order and method for loading cargoes into tanks to maintain stability, prevent contamination, and comply with charter requirements.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Terminal to vessel: Confirm approved loading sequence is reviewed and being followed during cargo operations.

termTranslations.ja: ローディングシーケンス
termTranslations.th: ลำดับการโหลด

usageTranslations.en: Terminal to vessel: Confirm approved loading sequence is reviewed and being followed during cargo operations.
usageTranslations.tr: Terminalden gemiye: Onaylanan yükleme sırasının incelendiğini ve uygulandığını onaylayın.
usageTranslations.fr: Terminal au navire : Confirmez que la séquence de chargement approuvée est respectée.
usageTranslations.de: Terminal an Schiff: Genehmigte Ladereihenfolge wird geprüft und eingehalten.
usageTranslations.es: Terminal a buque: Confirme que la secuencia de carga aprobada se está siguiendo.
usageTranslations.zh: 码头至船舶：确认审核并执行获批的装货顺序。
usageTranslations.ar: المحطة إلى السفينة: أكد مراجعة وتنفيذ تسلسل التحميل.
usageTranslations.pt: Terminal para navio: Confirme que a sequência aprovada está sendo seguida.
usageTranslations.ru: Терминал судну: Подтвердите соблюдение утвержденной последовательности.
usageTranslations.ja: ターミナルより船舶へ：承認済みローディングシーケンスが順守されていることを報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Terminal alla nave: Confermare che la sequenza approvata è rispettata.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng tới tàu: Xác nhận trình tự nạp hàng được thực hiện đúng.
usageTranslations.hi: टर्मिनल से पोत: स्वीकृत लोडिंग अनुक्रम का पालन हो रहा है इसकी पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือถึงเรือ: ยืนยันว่าลำดับการโหลดที่ได้รับอนุมัติได้รับการตรวจสอบและปฏิบัติตามแล้ว
usageTranslations.id: Terminal ke kapal: Konfirmasi urutan pemuatan diikuti sesuai persetujuan.

terms.definition: The person or office responsible for communication and coordination between ship and terminal during cargo operations.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Master to terminal: Please provide the contact details for the designated terminal liaison for cargo operation.

termTranslations.th: ผู้ประสานงานท่าเรือ

usageTranslations.en: Master to terminal: Please provide the contact details for the designated terminal liaison for cargo operation.
usageTranslations.tr: Kaptandan terminale: Yük operasyonu için belirlenen terminal temsilcisinin iletişim bilgilerini iletin.
usageTranslations.fr: Capitaine au terminal : Merci de fournir les coordonnées du responsable de liaison pour l'opération.
usageTranslations.de: Kapitän an Terminal: Bitte teilen Sie die Kontaktdaten des Terminalverbindungsbeamten mit.
usageTranslations.es: Capitán a terminal: Proporcione los datos de contacto del enlace terminal.
usageTranslations.zh: 船长至码头：请提供作业指定的码头联络人联系方式。
usageTranslations.ar: القبطان إلى المحطة: يرجى تزويدنا بتفاصيل الاتصال بمسؤول الاتصال للعملية.
usageTranslations.pt: Mestre para terminal: Forneça os contatos do liaison do terminal.
usageTranslations.ru: Капитан терминалу: Прошу предоставить контакты связного терминала.
usageTranslations.ja: 船長からターミナルへ：カーゴ作業担当ターミナル連絡員の連絡先を教えてください。
usageTranslations.it: Comandante al terminal: Fornire i contatti del referente terminale.
usageTranslations.vi: Thuyền trưởng tới cảng: Vui lòng cung cấp liên hệ của nhân viên liên lạc cảng.
usageTranslations.hi: कैप्टन से टर्मिनल: कार्गो ऑपरेशन के लिए टर्मिनल लिआजन का संपर्क विवरण दें।
usageTranslations.th: กัปตันถึงท่าเรือ: กรุณาแจ้งรายละเอียดผู้ประสานงานท่าเรือ
usageTranslations.id: Kapten ke terminal: Mohon kirimkan kontak petugas penghubung terminal.

terms.definition: Process of cleaning pipelines by circulating water, air, or another fluid to remove product and contaminants.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Terminal to vessel: Perform line flushing after cargo discharge to ensure lines are free from residues.

termTranslations.th: การล้างท่อ

usageTranslations.en: Terminal to vessel: Perform line flushing after cargo discharge to ensure lines are free from residues.
usageTranslations.tr: Terminalden gemiye: Kargo tahliyesinden sonra hat yıkama yaparak hatların kalıntısız olduğundan emin olun.
usageTranslations.fr: Terminal au navire : Effectuez le rinçage après le déchargement.
usageTranslations.de: Terminal an Schiff: Leitungsspülung nach Entladung durchführen.
usageTranslations.es: Terminal a buque: Enjuague la línea tras la descarga.
usageTranslations.zh: 码头至船舶：卸货后冲洗管线，确保无残留物。
usageTranslations.ar: المحطة إلى السفينة: نفذ غسل الخط بعد التفريغ.
usageTranslations.pt: Terminal para navio: Faça a lavagem após a descarga.
usageTranslations.ru: Терминал судну: Промыть трубопроводы после выгрузки.
usageTranslations.ja: ターミナルより船舶へ：荷下ろし後にラインフラッシングを行ってください。
usageTranslations.it: Terminal alla nave: Lavare le linee dopo lo scarico.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng tới tàu: Thực hiện sục rửa sau khi xả hàng.
usageTranslations.hi: टर्मिनल से पोत: डिस्चार्ज के बाद लाइन फ्लशिंग करें।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือถึงเรือ: ล้างท่อหลังขนถ่ายสินค้า
usageTranslations.id: Terminal ke kapal: Lakukan pembilasan setelah bongkar muat.

terms.definition: Procedure to collect samples of vapour from tanks or lines for safety, quality, or regulatory compliance testing.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Terminal to vessel: Conduct vapour sampling before closed loading to verify tank atmosphere.

termTranslations.ja: ベーパーサンプリング
termTranslations.th: การสุ่มตัวอย่างไอระเหย

usageTranslations.en: Terminal to vessel: Conduct vapour sampling before closed loading to verify tank atmosphere.
usageTranslations.tr: Terminalden gemiye: Kapalı yükleme öncesi buhar numune alın.
usageTranslations.fr: Terminal au navire : Effectuez l'échantillonnage de vapeur avant chargement fermé.
usageTranslations.de: Terminal an Schiff: Dampfprobenahme vor geschlossenem Laden durchführen.
usageTranslations.es: Terminal a buque: Tome muestra de vapor antes de la carga cerrada.
usageTranslations.zh: 码头至船舶：闭式装货前采集蒸气样品。
usageTranslations.ar: المحطة إلى السفينة: قم بأخذ عينات البخار قبل التحميل المغلق.
usageTranslations.pt: Terminal para navio: Faça amostragem de vapor antes do carregamento fechado.
usageTranslations.ru: Терминал судну: Провести отбор проб паров перед закрытой загрузкой.
usageTranslations.ja: ターミナルより船舶へ：クローズドローディング前にベーパーサンプリングを行ってください。
usageTranslations.it: Terminal alla nave: Eseguire campionamento vapore prima del carico chiuso.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng tới tàu: Lấy mẫu hơi trước khi nạp kín.
usageTranslations.hi: टर्मिनल से पोत: क्लोज्ड लोडिंग से पहले वाष्प सैंपलिंग करें।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือถึงเรือ: สุ่มตัวอย่างไอระเหยก่อนโหลดแบบปิด
usageTranslations.id: Terminal ke kapal: Ambil sampel uap sebelum pemuatan tertutup.

terms.definition: A detailed, IMO-mandated shipboard diagram showing locations and procedures for firefighting equipment, escape routes, and alarm points.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Vessel MISTRAL, confirm your crew is familiar with the fire control plan posted at each deck entrance.

termTranslations.th: แผนควบคุมเพลิงไหม้

usageTranslations.en: Vessel MISTRAL, confirm your crew is familiar with the fire control plan posted at each deck entrance.
usageTranslations.tr: MISTRAL gemisi, mürettebatınızın her güverte girişine asılı yangın kontrol planını bildiğini teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Navire MISTRAL, confirmez que votre équipage connaît le plan de lutte contre l’incendie affiché à chaque entrée de pont.
usageTranslations.de: Schiff MISTRAL, bestätigen Sie, dass Ihre Besatzung den an jedem Deckseingang ausgehängten Feuerwehrplan kennt.
usageTranslations.es: Buque MISTRAL, confirme que su tripulación conoce el plan de control de incendios en cada entrada de cubierta.
usageTranslations.zh: MISTRAL号，请确认你的船员熟悉各甲板入口张贴的消防布置图。
usageTranslations.ar: السفينة MISTRAL، أكد أن طاقمك على دراية بمخطط مكافحة الحرائق الموجود عند كل مدخل سطح.
usageTranslations.pt: Navio MISTRAL, confirme que sua tripulação conhece o plano de controle de incêndio em cada entrada de convés.
usageTranslations.ru: Судно MISTRAL, подтвердите, что экипаж знаком с планом пожаротушения, размещённым у каждого входа на палубу.
usageTranslations.ja: MISTRAL、各デッキ入口に掲示された消火配備図を乗組員が把握していることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Nave MISTRAL, confermi che l’equipaggio conosce il piano antincendio affisso a ogni ingresso del ponte.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu MISTRAL, xác nhận thủy thủ đoàn đã biết sơ đồ chữa cháy dán tại mỗi lối lên boong.
usageTranslations.hi: पोत MISTRAL, पुष्टि करें कि आपकी टीम हर डेक प्रवेश द्वार पर लगी फायर कंट्रोल योजना से परिचित है।
usageTranslations.th: เรือ MISTRAL กรุณายืนยันว่าลูกเรือทุกคนรู้จักแผนควบคุมเพลิงไหม้ที่ติดไว้ที่ทางเข้าทุกชั้นดาดฟ้า
usageTranslations.id: Kapal MISTRAL, pastikan awak Anda mengetahui rencana pengendalian kebakaran yang dipasang di setiap pintu masuk dek.

terms.definition: A formal command given by the Master ordering crew and passengers to evacuate the vessel immediately due to grave danger.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All stations, this is CAPTAIN speaking: abandon ship, proceed to your designated lifeboats immediately.

termTranslations.th: ละทิ้งเรือ

usageTranslations.en: All stations, this is CAPTAIN speaking: abandon ship, proceed to your designated lifeboats immediately.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm istasyonlara, burada KAPTAN konuşuyor: Gemiyi terk edin, hemen tahsis edilen filikalara gidin.
usageTranslations.fr: À toutes les stations, ici le CAPITAINE : abandonner le navire, rejoignez immédiatement vos canots assignés.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Stationen, hier spricht der KAPITÄN: Schiff verlassen, gehen Sie sofort zu den zugewiesenen Rettungsbooten.
usageTranslations.es: A todas las estaciones, habla el CAPITÁN: Abandonar el buque, diríjanse inmediatamente a los botes asignados.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有岗位，这里是船长：弃船，立即前往指定救生艇。
usageTranslations.ar: إلى جميع المحطات، هنا القبطان يتحدث: إخلاء السفينة، توجهوا فوراً إلى قوارب النجاة المخصصة لكم.
usageTranslations.pt: Atenção todas as estações, aqui é o CAPITÃO: abandonar o navio, dirijam-se imediatamente aos botes salva-vidas designados.
usageTranslations.ru: Всем постам, говорит КАПИТАН: покинуть судно, немедленно следовать к назначенным спасательным шлюпкам.
usageTranslations.ja: 全ての部署、こちらキャプテン：退船せよ、直ちに指定救命艇へ向かえ。
usageTranslations.it: A tutte le stazioni, parla il CAPITANO: abbandonare la nave, recarsi subito alle scialuppe assegnate.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả các vị trí, đây là thuyền trưởng: rời bỏ tàu, đến ngay xuồng cứu sinh được phân công.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी स्टेशनों पर, यहाँ कप्तान बोल रहे हैं: जहाज छोड़ो, तुरंत निर्धारित लाइफबोट पर जाओ।
usageTranslations.th: ถึงทุกสถานี นี่กัปตันพูด: ละทิ้งเรือ ไปที่เรือชูชีพที่กำหนดทันที
usageTranslations.id: Semua pos, ini Kapten: Tinggalkan kapal, segera menuju sekoci yang telah ditentukan.

terms.definition: The shipwide audible and visual signal indicating a serious emergency; activates muster or evacuation as per muster list.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All crew, emergency alarm has sounded; proceed to muster stations and await further instructions.

termTranslations.th: สัญญาณเตือนฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: All crew, emergency alarm has sounded; proceed to muster stations and await further instructions.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm mürettebat, acil durum alarmı çaldı; toplanma noktalarına gidin ve talimat bekleyin.
usageTranslations.fr: Tout l’équipage, l’alarme d’urgence a retenti ; rendez-vous aux postes de rassemblement et attendez d'autres instructions.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Besatzung, Notalarm wurde ausgelöst; begeben Sie sich zu den Sammelstellen und warten Sie auf weitere Anweisungen.
usageTranslations.es: Toda la tripulación, ha sonado la alarma de emergencia; diríjanse a los puestos de reunión y esperen instrucciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 全体船员，紧急警报已响起；请前往集合点等候进一步指示。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع الطاقم، تم تشغيل إنذار الطوارئ؛ توجهوا إلى نقاط التجمع وانتظروا التعليمات.
usageTranslations.pt: Toda a tripulação, o alarme de emergência soou; dirijam-se aos postos de reunião e aguardem instruções.
usageTranslations.ru: Вся команда, прозвучала аварийная тревога; пройти к сборным местам и ждать указаний.
usageTranslations.ja: 全乗組員、非常警報が鳴りました。集合場所へ向かい指示を待て。
usageTranslations.it: Tutto l’equipaggio, è suonato l’allarme d’emergenza; recarsi ai punti di raccolta e attendere istruzioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Toàn bộ thủy thủ đoàn, báo động khẩn cấp đã vang lên; đến điểm tập kết và chờ chỉ dẫn.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी दल, आपातकालीन अलार्म बज चुका है; समुच्चय स्थल पर जाएं और निर्देश की प्रतीक्षा करें।
usageTranslations.th: ลูกเรือทุกคน มีการเปิดสัญญาณเตือนฉุกเฉิน ไปยังจุดรวมพลและรอคำสั่ง
usageTranslations.id: Seluruh awak, alarm darurat berbunyi; menuju pos kumpul dan tunggu instruksi.

terms.definition: Portable or fixed supply of medical oxygen available for emergency use by crew or passengers in case of fire, smoke or medical event.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge, confirm emergency oxygen supply is checked and available at muster stations for fire drill.

termTranslations.th: การจ่ายออกซิเจนฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: Bridge, confirm emergency oxygen supply is checked and available at muster stations for fire drill.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüüstü, yangın tatbikatı için acil oksijen kaynağının kontrol edildiğini ve toplanma noktalarında bulunduğunu teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle, confirmez que la source d’oxygène d’urgence a été vérifiée et disponible aux postes de rassemblement pour l’exercice incendie.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke, bestätigen Sie, dass die Notfallsauerstoffversorgung für die Feuerübung geprüft und an den Sammelstellen verfügbar ist.
usageTranslations.es: Puente, confirme que el suministro de oxígeno de emergencia ha sido revisado y está disponible en los puestos de reunión para el simulacro de incendio.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶台，请确认应急氧气供应已检查并在集合点可用于消防演习。
usageTranslations.ar: الجسر، أكد أن إمداد الأكسجين للطوارئ تم فحصه ومتوفر في نقاط التجمع لتمرين الحريق.
usageTranslations.pt: Ponte, confirme que o fornecimento de oxigênio de emergência foi verificado e está disponível nos postos de reunião para o exercício de incêndio.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик, подтвердите, что аварийное снабжение кислородом проверено и доступно на сборных пунктах для учебной тревоги.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジ、緊急用酸素供給が点検され、火災訓練用に集合場所に備えられていることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Ponte di comando, confermare che la fornitura di ossigeno d’emergenza è controllata e disponibile ai punti di raccolta per l’esercitazione antincendio.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu tàu, xác nhận nguồn cung cấp oxy khẩn cấp đã được kiểm tra và sẵn sàng tại điểm tập kết cho diễn tập chữa cháy.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज, पुष्टि करें कि आपातकालीन ऑक्सीजन आपूर्ति जांची गई है और फायर ड्रिल के लिए समुच्चय स्थल पर उपलब्ध है।
usageTranslations.th: สะพานเดินเรือ กรุณายืนยันว่าการจ่ายออกซิเจนฉุกเฉินได้รับการตรวจสอบและมีอยู่ที่จุดรวมพลสำหรับฝึกซ้อมไฟไหม้
usageTranslations.id: Anjungan, pastikan pasokan oksigen darurat sudah diperiksa dan tersedia di pos kumpul untuk latihan kebakaran.

terms.definition: A designated team trained and tasked to control flooding, fire, or structural damage during emergencies on board.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Damage control party, report to the engine room with emergency gear and prepare to stop flooding.

termTranslations.fr: Équipe de lutte contre les avaries
termTranslations.th: ทีมควบคุมความเสียหาย

usageTranslations.en: Damage control party, report to the engine room with emergency gear and prepare to stop flooding.
usageTranslations.tr: Zarar kontrol ekibi, acil ekipmanlarla makine dairesine gidin ve su baskınını durdurmaya hazırlanın.
usageTranslations.fr: Équipe de lutte contre les avaries, rendez-vous en salle des machines avec le matériel d’urgence et préparez-vous à arrêter l’inondation.
usageTranslations.de: Schadensabwehrtrupp, melden Sie sich mit Notfallausrüstung im Maschinenraum und bereiten Sie sich auf die Eindämmung der Überflutung vor.
usageTranslations.es: Equipo de control de daños, acudan a la sala de máquinas con equipos de emergencia y prepárense para detener la inundación.
usageTranslations.zh: 损害控制队，带上应急设备前往机舱，准备阻止进水。
usageTranslations.ar: فريق مكافحة الأضرار، توجهوا إلى غرفة المحركات مع معدات الطوارئ واستعدوا لإيقاف الفيضان.
usageTranslations.pt: Equipe de controle de danos, dirijam-se à casa de máquinas com equipamentos de emergência e preparem-se para conter o alagamento.
usageTranslations.ru: Группа по борьбе с повреждениями, немедленно в машинное отделение с аварийным снаряжением, готовьтесь остановить затопление.
usageTranslations.ja: 損傷対策班、緊急装備を持って機関室に集合し、浸水停止の準備をせよ。
usageTranslations.it: Squadra controllo danni, recarsi in sala macchine con le attrezzature di emergenza e prepararsi a fermare l’allagamento.
usageTranslations.vi: Đội kiểm soát hư hại, tới phòng máy với thiết bị khẩn cấp, chuẩn bị ngăn nước tràn.
usageTranslations.hi: डैमेज कंट्रोल पार्टी, आपातकालीन उपकरण लेकर इंजन रूम में रिपोर्ट करें और जलभराव रोकने की तैयारी करें।
usageTranslations.th: ทีมควบคุมความเสียหาย รายงานตัวที่ห้องเครื่องพร้อมอุปกรณ์ฉุกเฉินและเตรียมหยุดน้ำท่วม
usageTranslations.id: Tim pengendali kerusakan, segera ke ruang mesin dengan peralatan darurat dan bersiap menghentikan banjir.

terms.definition: A specific alarm signal used to order immediate evacuation of the vessel or designated areas due to critical emergency.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Evacuation alarm sounding on deck three; all personnel proceed to lifeboat stations without delay.

termTranslations.th: สัญญาณเตือนอพยพ

usageTranslations.en: Evacuation alarm sounding on deck three; all personnel proceed to lifeboat stations without delay.
usageTranslations.tr: Güverte üçte tahliye alarmı çalıyor; tüm personel gecikmeden filika istasyonlarına ilerleyin.
usageTranslations.fr: Alarme d’évacuation sur le pont trois ; tout le personnel se rend sans délai aux postes de canots.
usageTranslations.de: Evakuierungsalarm auf Deck drei; alles Personal unverzüglich zu den Rettungsbootstationen.
usageTranslations.es: Alarma de evacuación en la cubierta tres; todo el personal debe acudir sin demora a los botes salvavidas.
usageTranslations.zh: 三层甲板发出疏散警报；所有人员立即前往救生艇站。
usageTranslations.ar: إنذار الإخلاء على السطح الثالث؛ جميع الأفراد يتوجهون فوراً إلى محطات قوارب النجاة.
usageTranslations.pt: Alarme de evacuação no convés três; todo o pessoal dirija-se sem demora aos postos dos botes salva-vidas.
usageTranslations.ru: Сигнал эвакуации на третьей палубе; всему персоналу немедленно проследовать к спасательным шлюпкам.
usageTranslations.ja: デッキ3で避難警報発令。全員遅滞なく救命艇ステーションへ向かえ。
usageTranslations.it: Allarme di evacuazione sul ponte tre; tutto il personale si rechi immediatamente ai punti scialuppe.
usageTranslations.vi: Báo động sơ tán phát ra ở boong ba; tất cả nhân viên đến ngay các vị trí xuồng cứu sinh.
usageTranslations.hi: डेक तीन पर निष्कासन अलार्म बज रहा है; सभी कर्मचारी तुरंत लाइफबोट स्टेशन पर जाएं।
usageTranslations.th: สัญญาณเตือนอพยพดังที่ชั้นสาม ลูกเรือทุกคนไปยังจุดเรือชูชีพโดยไม่ชักช้า
usageTranslations.id: Alarm evakuasi berbunyi di dek tiga; semua personel segera ke pos sekoci.

terms.definition: Battery-backed or independent lighting automatically activated during main power failure for safe evacuation and emergency operations.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, confirm emergency lighting is operational in all passageways after main power failure.

termTranslations.th: ไฟฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, confirm emergency lighting is operational in all passageways after main power failure.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, ana güç arızasından sonra tüm koridorlarda acil durum aydınlatmasının çalışır olduğunu teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, confirmez que l’éclairage de secours fonctionne dans tous les couloirs après la panne de courant principal.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, bestätigen Sie, dass die Notbeleuchtung in allen Gängen nach dem Stromausfall funktioniert.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, confirme que la iluminación de emergencia funciona en todos los pasillos tras el fallo de energía principal.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请确认主电源失效后所有通道的应急照明可用。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحركات، أكد أن إضاءة الطوارئ تعمل في جميع الممرات بعد انقطاع التيار الرئيسي.
usageTranslations.pt: Casa de máquinas, confirme que a iluminação de emergência está operante em todos os corredores após falha da energia principal.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, подтвердите, что аварийное освещение работает во всех проходах после отключения основного питания.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、主電源喪失後、全通路で非常照明が作動していることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, confermare che l’illuminazione di emergenza è operativa in tutti i corridoi dopo il guasto della corrente principale.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, xác nhận đèn chiếu sáng khẩn cấp hoạt động ở tất cả lối đi sau sự cố mất điện chính.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन कक्ष, मुख्य विद्युत विफलता के बाद सभी मार्गों में आपातकालीन प्रकाश चालू है, इसकी पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง กรุณายืนยันว่าไฟฉุกเฉินทำงานในทุกทางเดินหลังไฟฟ้าหลักดับ
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, pastikan penerangan darurat berfungsi di semua lorong setelah kegagalan daya utama.

terms.definition: A radio frequency internationally allocated for maritime distress, safety, and calling, such as VHF channel 16 (156.8 MHz) or MF 2182 kHz.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All stations, maintain continuous watch on the distress frequency VHF channel 16.

termTranslations.th: ความถี่ขอความช่วยเหลือ

usageTranslations.en: All stations, maintain continuous watch on the distress frequency VHF channel 16.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm istasyonlar, tehlike frekansı VHF kanal 16’da sürekli dinleme yapın.
usageTranslations.fr: Toutes les stations, maintenez une veille continue sur la fréquence de détresse VHF canal 16.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Stationen, halten Sie auf der Notruffrequenz UKW Kanal 16 ständig Wache.
usageTranslations.es: Todas las estaciones, mantengan escucha continua en la frecuencia de socorro canal VHF 16.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有台，请在遇险频率VHF第16频道持续守听。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع المحطات، حافظوا على مراقبة مستمرة على تردد الاستغاثة قناة VHF 16.
usageTranslations.pt: Todas as estações, mantenham vigilância contínua na frequência de socorro VHF canal 16.
usageTranslations.ru: Всем станциям: постоянно следить за аварийной частотой УКВ канал 16.
usageTranslations.ja: 全局、遭難周波数VHF16chで継続的なワッチを維持せよ。
usageTranslations.it: Tutte le stazioni, mantenere ascolto continuo sulla frequenza di soccorso canale VHF 16.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả các trạm, duy trì nghe liên tục trên tần số cứu nạn VHF kênh 16.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी स्टेशनों पर, आपात आवृत्ति VHF चैनल 16 पर लगातार निगरानी रखें।
usageTranslations.th: ทุกสถานี รักษาการเฝ้าฟังความถี่ขอความช่วยเหลือที่ช่อง VHF 16 ตลอดเวลา
usageTranslations.id: Semua stasiun, jaga pengawasan terus-menerus pada frekuensi distress VHF kanal 16.

terms.definition: Alternative power source such as a generator or battery supplying essential systems during main power failure.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge, confirm emergency power is supplying steering gear, navigation lights, and communication equipment.

termTranslations.th: พลังงานฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: Bridge, confirm emergency power is supplying steering gear, navigation lights, and communication equipment.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüüstü, acil gücün dümen, seyir fenerleri ve iletişim ekipmanına enerji sağladığını teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle, confirmez que l’alimentation de secours alimente le gouvernail, les feux de navigation et les équipements de communication.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke, bestätigen Sie, dass die Notstromversorgung Ruder, Navigationslichter und Kommunikationsgeräte versorgt.
usageTranslations.es: Puente, confirme que la energía de emergencia suministra al timón, las luces de navegación y el equipo de comunicación.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶台，请确认应急电源正在为舵机、航行灯和通信设备供电。
usageTranslations.ar: الجسر، أكد أن الطاقة الاحتياطية تزود معدات القيادة وأضواء الملاحة وأجهزة الاتصال.
usageTranslations.pt: Ponte, confirme que a energia de emergência está alimentando o leme, luzes de navegação e equipamentos de comunicação.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик, подтвердите, что аварийное питание подаётся на рулевое устройство, ходовые огни и связь.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジ、非常用電源が操舵装置・航海灯・通信機器に供給されていることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Ponte di comando, confermare che l’alimentazione di emergenza alimenta il timone, le luci di navigazione e le apparecchiature di comunicazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu tàu, xác nhận nguồn điện khẩn cấp đang cung cấp cho thiết bị lái, đèn định vị và thiết bị liên lạc.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज, पुष्टि करें कि आपातकालीन बिजली स्टीयरिंग गियर, नेविगेशन लाइट्स और संचार उपकरणों को आपूर्ति कर रही है।
usageTranslations.th: สะพานเดินเรือ กรุณายืนยันว่าพลังงานฉุกเฉินกำลังจ่ายไฟให้อุปกรณ์บังคับทิศ ไฟเดินเรือ และอุปกรณ์สื่อสาร
usageTranslations.id: Anjungan, pastikan daya darurat memasok roda kemudi, lampu navigasi, dan alat komunikasi.

terms.definition: The assembly of all crew at designated muster stations for roll-call, instruction, or emergency drill, as per muster list.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All hands, crew muster at station A in five minutes for emergency drill roll call.

termTranslations.th: การรวมตัวของลูกเรือ

usageTranslations.en: All hands, crew muster at station A in five minutes for emergency drill roll call.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm personele, beş dakika içinde acil durum tatbikatı için A noktasında mürettebat toplanması.
usageTranslations.fr: Tout le personnel, rassemblement de l’équipage au poste A dans cinq minutes pour l’appel lors de l’exercice d’urgence.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Mann, Besatzungsmusterung in fünf Minuten an Station A zur Notfallübung.
usageTranslations.es: Toda la tripulación, reunión en la estación A en cinco minutos para el simulacro de emergencia.
usageTranslations.zh: 全体人员，五分钟后在A集合点进行紧急演习点名。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع الأفراد، تجمع الطاقم في المحطة A خلال خمس دقائق من أجل تمرين الطوارئ.
usageTranslations.pt: Todos a bordo, reunião da tripulação no posto A em cinco minutos para o exercício de emergência.
usageTranslations.ru: Всем на борт, сбор экипажа через пять минут на станции А для учебной тревоги.
usageTranslations.ja: 全員、5分後にAステーションで緊急訓練点呼のため集合せよ。
usageTranslations.it: Tutto il personale, raduno equipaggio al punto A fra cinque minuti per l’esercitazione d’emergenza.
usageTranslations.vi: Toàn bộ thủy thủ đoàn, tập hợp tại trạm A sau năm phút để điểm danh diễn tập khẩn cấp.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी सदस्य, पांच मिनट में स्टेशन A पर इमरजेंसी ड्रिल रोल कॉल के लिए क्रू मस्टर करें।
usageTranslations.th: ลูกเรือทุกคน รวมตัวที่จุด A ภายในห้านาทีสำหรับการฝึกซ้อมฉุกเฉิน
usageTranslations.id: Semua kru, kumpul di pos A dalam lima menit untuk latihan darurat.

terms.definition: A watertight section of a vessel that has unintentionally filled with seawater due to hull breach or system failure.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge to engine room: report the status of the flooded compartment and confirm boundary cooling measures are in place.

termTranslations.th: ห้องที่ถูกน้ำท่วม

usageTranslations.en: Bridge to engine room: report the status of the flooded compartment and confirm boundary cooling measures are in place.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüden makine dairesine: Su baskınına uğramış bölmenin durumunu rapor edin ve sınır soğutma tedbirlerinin uygulandığını teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle à la salle des machines : rapportez l’état du compartiment inondé et confirmez la mise en œuvre du refroidissement des cloisons.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke an Maschinenraum: Melden Sie den Status des überfluteten Abteils und bestätigen Sie, dass Grenzkühlmaßnahmen ergriffen wurden.
usageTranslations.es: Puente a sala de máquinas: informe el estado del compartimiento inundado y confirme que las medidas de enfriamiento de los límites están en marcha.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶台致机舱：报告进水舱室状态，并确认已实施隔离冷却措施。
usageTranslations.ar: الجسر إلى غرفة المحركات: أبلغ عن حالة العنبر المغمور بالمياه وتأكد من اتخاذ تدابير تبريد الحواجز.
usageTranslations.pt: Ponte para sala de máquinas: reporte o estado do compartimento alagado e confirme as medidas de resfriamento das divisórias.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик — машинному отделению: доложите состояние затопленного отсека и подтвердите выполнение охлаждения переборок.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジから機関室へ：浸水区画の状況を報告し、境界冷却措置が取られていることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Ponte a sala macchine: riferire lo stato del compartimento allagato e confermare che sono in atto misure di raffreddamento delle paratie.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu tàu tới phòng máy: báo cáo tình trạng khoang bị ngập nước và xác nhận đã áp dụng biện pháp làm mát ngăn cách.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज से इंजन कक्ष: जलमग्न खंड की स्थिति रिपोर्ट करें और सीमा शीतलन उपायों की पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: สะพานไปยังห้องเครื่อง: รายงานสถานะห้องที่ถูกน้ำท่วมและยืนยันว่ามาตรการทำความเย็นขอบเขตถูกนำมาใช้
usageTranslations.id: Anjungan ke ruang mesin: laporkan status kompartemen tergenang dan pastikan langkah pendinginan batas telah dilakukan.

terms.definition: A fixed piping system on a ship delivering water under pressure for firefighting throughout the vessel.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Fire party, confirm fire main pressure is adequate and all hydrants on deck two are operational.

termTranslations.th: ท่อดับเพลิงหลัก

usageTranslations.en: Fire party, confirm fire main pressure is adequate and all hydrants on deck two are operational.
usageTranslations.tr: Yangın ekibi, yangın ana hattı basıncının yeterli ve güverte iki üzerindeki tüm hidrantların çalışır olduğunu teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Équipe incendie, confirmez que la pression du réseau principal incendie est suffisante et que toutes les bouches sur le pont deux fonctionnent.
usageTranslations.de: Feuertrupp, bestätigen Sie, dass der Druck in der Feuerlöschhauptleitung ausreicht und alle Hydranten auf Deck zwei betriebsbereit sind.
usageTranslations.es: Equipo de incendios, confirme que la presión de la red principal contra incendios es adecuada y que todas las bocas en la cubierta dos están operativas.
usageTranslations.zh: 消防组，请确认消防主管道压力充足，二层甲板所有消火栓可用。
usageTranslations.ar: فريق الإطفاء، أكد أن ضغط خط إطفاء الحريق الرئيسي كافٍ وجميع الصنابير على سطح اثنين تعمل.
usageTranslations.pt: Equipe de incêndio, confirme que a pressão da rede principal de incêndio é adequada e que todos os hidrantes no convés dois estão operacionais.
usageTranslations.ru: Пожарная команда, подтвердите достаточное давление в магистрали и работоспособность всех гидрантов на второй палубе.
usageTranslations.ja: 消火班、消火主管の圧力が十分であり、デッキ2の全消火栓が作動していることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Squadra antincendio, confermate che la pressione della rete idrica antincendio è adeguata e che tutti gli idranti sul ponte due sono operativi.
usageTranslations.vi: Đội chữa cháy, xác nhận áp suất đường ống chính chữa cháy đủ và các họng nước trên boong hai hoạt động bình thường.
usageTranslations.hi: फायर पार्टी, पुष्टि करें कि फायर मेन का दबाव पर्याप्त है और डेक दो के सभी हाइड्रेंट चालू हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ทีมดับเพลิง กรุณายืนยันว่าแรงดันท่อดับเพลิงหลักเพียงพอและหัวดับเพลิงทุกจุดบนดาดฟ้าสองทำงานได้
usageTranslations.id: Tim pemadam kebakaran, pastikan tekanan pipa induk cukup dan semua hidran di dek dua berfungsi.

terms.definition: A designated team trained and assigned to respond to onboard fires and operate firefighting equipment as per muster list.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge to fire party: proceed to engine room with breathing apparatus and extinguish fire at the control panel.

termTranslations.th: ทีมดับเพลิง

usageTranslations.en: Bridge to fire party: proceed to engine room with breathing apparatus and extinguish fire at the control panel.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüden yangın ekibine: Solunum cihazıyla makine dairesine gidin ve kontrol panelindeki yangını söndürün.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle à l’équipe incendie : rendez-vous en salle des machines avec un appareil respiratoire et éteignez le feu au panneau de contrôle.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke an Feuerwehrtrupp: Mit Atemschutz in den Maschinenraum und Brand am Kontrollpult löschen.
usageTranslations.es: Puente al equipo de incendios: acudan a la sala de máquinas con equipo de respiración y extingan el fuego en el panel de control.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶台致消防队：携带呼吸器前往机舱，扑灭控制面板处的火灾。
usageTranslations.ar: الجسر إلى فريق الإطفاء: توجهوا إلى غرفة المحركات بجهاز تنفس وأطفئوا الحريق في لوحة التحكم.
usageTranslations.pt: Ponte para a brigada de incêndio: prossigam para a casa de máquinas com aparelhos respiratórios e apaguem o fogo no painel de controle.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик — пожарной команде: следовать в машинное отделение с дыхательными аппаратами и потушить пожар на щите управления.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジから消火班へ：呼吸器を装備して機関室に進み、制御盤の火災を消火せよ。
usageTranslations.it: Ponte alla squadra antincendio: recarsi in sala macchine con autorespiratori e spegnere il fuoco al pannello di controllo.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu tàu tới đội chữa cháy: đến phòng máy với thiết bị thở và dập lửa tại bảng điều khiển.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज से फायर पार्टी: श्वासयंत्र के साथ इंजन कक्ष जाएं और नियंत्रण पैनल की आग बुझाएं।
usageTranslations.th: สะพานถึงทีมดับเพลิง: ไปยังห้องเครื่องพร้อมเครื่องช่วยหายใจและดับไฟที่แผงควบคุม
usageTranslations.id: Anjungan ke tim pemadam kebakaran: masuk ruang mesin dengan alat pernapasan dan padamkan api di panel kontrol.

terms.definition: An internationally recognized signal, transmitted by GMDSS or VHF, indicating grave and imminent danger requiring immediate assistance.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Vessel BOREAL, confirm you have received the distress alert on DSC and are ready to relay the message to MRCC.

termTranslations.th: สัญญาณแจ้งเหตุฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: Vessel BOREAL, confirm you have received the distress alert on DSC and are ready to relay the message to MRCC.
usageTranslations.tr: BOREAL gemisi, DSC üzerinden tehlike uyarısını aldığınızı ve mesajı MRCC'ye iletmeye hazır olduğunuzu teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Navire BOREAL, confirmez avoir reçu l’alerte de détresse sur DSC et être prêt à relayer le message au MRCC.
usageTranslations.de: Schiff BOREAL, bestätigen Sie, dass Sie den Notrufalarm über DSC empfangen haben und bereit sind, die Meldung an das MRCC weiterzuleiten.
usageTranslations.es: Buque BOREAL, confirme que ha recibido la alerta de socorro por DSC y que está listo para retransmitir el mensaje al MRCC.
usageTranslations.zh: BOREAL号，请确认已通过DSC收到遇险报警，并准备向MRCC转发信息。
usageTranslations.ar: السفينة BOREAL، أكد استلامك تنبيه الاستغاثة عبر DSC وأنك مستعد لنقل الرسالة إلى MRCC.
usageTranslations.pt: Navio BOREAL, confirme que recebeu o alerta de socorro no DSC e está pronto para repassar a mensagem ao MRCC.
usageTranslations.ru: Судно BOREAL, подтвердите приём аварийного сигнала по DSC и готовность передать сообщение MRCC.
usageTranslations.ja: BOREAL船、DSCで遭難警報を受信し、MRCCにメッセージ転送の準備ができていることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Nave BOREAL, confermare la ricezione dell’allarme di soccorso su DSC e la disponibilità a inoltrare il messaggio al MRCC.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu BOREAL, xác nhận đã nhận được cảnh báo cứu nạn qua DSC và sẵn sàng chuyển tiếp thông điệp cho MRCC.
usageTranslations.hi: जहाज BOREAL, DSC पर आपातकालीन सतर्कता प्राप्त करने और MRCC को संदेश भेजने के लिए तैयार होने की पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือ BOREAL กรุณายืนยันว่าได้รับสัญญาณแจ้งเหตุฉุกเฉินทาง DSC และพร้อมส่งต่อข้อความไปยัง MRCC
usageTranslations.id: Kapal BOREAL, pastikan Anda telah menerima peringatan distress melalui DSC dan siap meneruskan pesan ke MRCC.

terms.definition: An emergency evacuation device, usually an inflatable or fabric tube, enabling rapid escape from high decks to safe areas or liferafts.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Evacuation drill: all personnel will practice deploying the escape chute from the main deck to liferaft stations.

termTranslations.th: สไลด์หนีภัย

usageTranslations.en: Evacuation drill: all personnel will practice deploying the escape chute from the main deck to liferaft stations.
usageTranslations.tr: Tahliye tatbikatı: Tüm personel ana güverteden can salı istasyonlarına kaçış kaydırağı açmayı uygulayacaktır.
usageTranslations.fr: Exercice d’évacuation : tout le personnel s’entraînera à déployer le toboggan d’évacuation du pont principal aux stations des radeaux.
usageTranslations.de: Evakuierungsübung: Das gesamte Personal übt den Einsatz der Rettungsrutsche vom Hauptdeck zu den Rettungsbootstationen.
usageTranslations.es: Simulacro de evacuación: todo el personal practicará el despliegue del tobogán de escape desde la cubierta principal hasta las estaciones de balsas.
usageTranslations.zh: 疏散演习：所有人员将练习从主甲板部署逃生滑道到救生筏站。
usageTranslations.ar: تدريب الإخلاء: جميع الأفراد سيتدربون على نشر مزلجة الهروب من السطح الرئيسي إلى محطات قوارب النجاة.
usageTranslations.pt: Treinamento de evacuação: todo o pessoal praticará o uso do escorregador de escape do convés principal para as estações de balsas salva-vidas.
usageTranslations.ru: Учебная эвакуация: весь персонал отработает развертывание спасательного трапа с главной палубы к плотам.
usageTranslations.ja: 避難訓練：全員がメインデッキから救命いかだステーションまで脱出シュートの展開を実践します。
usageTranslations.it: Esercitazione di evacuazione: tutto il personale si eserciterà nell’aprire lo scivolo di emergenza dal ponte principale alle stazioni zattere.
usageTranslations.vi: Diễn tập sơ tán: toàn bộ nhân viên thực hành triển khai ống trượt thoát hiểm từ boong chính đến trạm bè cứu sinh.
usageTranslations.hi: निकासी अभ्यास: सभी कर्मचारी मुख्य डेक से लाइफराफ्ट स्टेशनों तक इस्केप चूट लगाना अभ्यास करेंगे।
usageTranslations.th: ฝึกซ้อมอพยพ: ลูกเรือทุกคนจะฝึกกางสไลด์หนีภัยจากดาดฟ้าหลักไปยังจุดเรือชูชีพ
usageTranslations.id: Latihan evakuasi: seluruh personel akan berlatih memasang perosotan pelarian dari dek utama ke stasiun rakit penyelamat.

terms.definition: A safety device providing immediate water flow for flushing eyes exposed to chemicals, smoke, or contaminants on board.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Chief mate, verify emergency eye wash stations in engine room and chemical store are clean and unobstructed.

termTranslations.th: อ่างล้างตาฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: Chief mate, verify emergency eye wash stations in engine room and chemical store are clean and unobstructed.
usageTranslations.tr: Birinci zabit, makine dairesi ve kimyasal deposundaki acil göz yıkama istasyonlarının temiz ve erişilebilir olduğunu kontrol edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Second capitaine, vérifiez que les douches oculaires d'urgence en salle des machines et au magasin de produits chimiques sont propres et accessibles.
usageTranslations.de: Erster Offizier, überprüfen Sie, dass die Not-Augenduschen im Maschinenraum und im Chemikalienlager sauber und frei zugänglich sind.
usageTranslations.es: Primer oficial, verifique que las estaciones de lavado ocular de emergencia en la sala de máquinas y el almacén de productos químicos estén limpias y accesibles.
usageTranslations.zh: 大副，请检查机舱和化学品储藏室的紧急洗眼器是否干净并畅通无阻。
usageTranslations.ar: كبير الضباط، تحقق من أن محطات غسل العيون للطوارئ في غرفة المحركات ومستودع المواد الكيميائية نظيفة ومفتوحة.
usageTranslations.pt: Imediato, verifique se as estações de lava-olhos de emergência na casa de máquinas e no depósito químico estão limpas e desobstruídas.
usageTranslations.ru: Старший помощник, проверьте, что аварийные глазные души в машинном отделении и химическом складе чисты и доступны.
usageTranslations.ja: チーフメイト、機関室と化学品倉庫の緊急用洗眼器が清潔で障害物がないことを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Primo ufficiale, verificare che le postazioni di lavaocchi d'emergenza in sala macchine e magazzino chimici siano pulite e libere da ostacoli.
usageTranslations.vi: Thuyền phó trưởng, xác minh các trạm rửa mắt khẩn cấp ở phòng máy và kho hóa chất sạch sẽ và thông thoáng.
usageTranslations.hi: मुख्य अधिकारी, इंजन कक्ष और रासायनिक भंडार की आपातकालीन आंख धोने की इकाइयाँ साफ़ और अवरुद्ध रहित हैं, इसकी पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: ต้นเรือ กรุณาตรวจสอบว่าอ่างล้างตาฉุกเฉินในห้องเครื่องและห้องเก็บสารเคมีสะอาดและเข้าถึงได้
usageTranslations.id: Perwira pertama, pastikan pencuci mata darurat di ruang mesin dan gudang bahan kimia bersih dan tidak terhalang.

terms.definition: Transmission of information regarding a distress situation, including distress calls, messages, and subsequent coordination over designated radio channels.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: MRCC to all ships: maintain silence on distress frequency to allow clear distress communication from vessel in danger.

termTranslations.th: การสื่อสารเหตุฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: MRCC to all ships: maintain silence on distress frequency to allow clear distress communication from vessel in danger.
usageTranslations.tr: MRCC'den tüm gemilere: Tehlikedeki geminin net iletişim kurabilmesi için tehlike frekansında sessizlik sağlayın.
usageTranslations.fr: MRCC à tous les navires : maintenez le silence sur la fréquence de détresse pour permettre une communication claire du navire en danger.
usageTranslations.de: MRCC an alle Schiffe: Halten Sie Stille auf der Notruffrequenz, damit das Schiff in Gefahr ungestört kommunizieren kann.
usageTranslations.es: MRCC a todos los buques: mantengan silencio en la frecuencia de socorro para permitir comunicación clara del buque en peligro.
usageTranslations.zh: MRCC致所有船舶：保持遇险频率静默，以便危险船舶能清楚通信。
usageTranslations.ar: MRCC إلى جميع السفن: التزموا الصمت على تردد الاستغاثة للسماح بالاتصالات الواضحة من السفينة المعرضة للخطر.
usageTranslations.pt: MRCC para todos os navios: mantenham silêncio na frequência de socorro para permitir comunicação clara da embarcação em perigo.
usageTranslations.ru: MRCC всем судам: соблюдайте тишину на аварийной частоте для обеспечения связи судна, находящегося в опасности.
usageTranslations.ja: MRCCより全船舶へ：危険船舶の遭難通信が円滑に行えるよう、遭難周波数で静寂を保ってください。
usageTranslations.it: MRCC a tutte le navi: mantenere il silenzio sulla frequenza di soccorso per consentire una comunicazione chiara dalla nave in pericolo.
usageTranslations.vi: MRCC đến tất cả các tàu: giữ im lặng trên tần số cứu nạn để cho phép tàu gặp nguy hiểm liên lạc rõ ràng.
usageTranslations.hi: MRCC से सभी जहाजों को: संकट संचार के लिए आपात आवृत्ति पर मौन बनाए रखें।
usageTranslations.th: MRCC ถึงเรือทุกลำ: กรุณารักษาความเงียบในความถี่ขอความช่วยเหลือเพื่อให้เรือที่ประสบเหตุสามารถสื่อสารได้ชัดเจน
usageTranslations.id: MRCC ke semua kapal: jaga keheningan di frekuensi distress agar kapal yang dalam bahaya dapat berkomunikasi jelas.

terms.definition: A mandatory exercise where crew practice procedures for responding to fire emergencies, including alarms, mustering, and equipment use.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Attention all crew: fire drill will commence at 1400 hours. Muster at your assigned stations with full firefighting gear.

termTranslations.th: ซ้อมดับเพลิง

usageTranslations.en: Attention all crew: fire drill will commence at 1400 hours. Muster at your assigned stations with full firefighting gear.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm mürettebata duyuru: Yangın tatbikatı saat 14:00'te başlayacaktır. Tüm yangın ekipmanıyla atanmış istasyonlara toplanınız.
usageTranslations.fr: À toute l’équipage : l’exercice incendie débutera à 14h00. Rassemblez-vous à vos postes assignés avec tout l’équipement de lutte contre l’incendie.
usageTranslations.de: Achtung Mannschaft: Die Feueralarmübung beginnt um 14:00 Uhr. Versammeln Sie sich an den zugewiesenen Stationen mit voller Schutzausrüstung.
usageTranslations.es: Atención tripulación: el simulacro de incendio comenzará a las 14:00 horas. Preséntense en sus estaciones asignadas con equipo completo.
usageTranslations.zh: 全体船员请注意：消防演习将于14:00开始。请携带全套消防装备在指定集合点集合。
usageTranslations.ar: انتباه جميع الطاقم: سيبدأ تدريب الإطفاء في الساعة 1400. تجمعوا في محطاتكم المحددة مع جميع معدات الإطفاء.
usageTranslations.pt: Atenção toda a tripulação: o treinamento de incêndio começará às 14h. Dirijam-se aos postos designados com todos os equipamentos.
