terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge to engine room: initiate emergency descent to 10 meters immediately due to smoke on upper deck.

termTranslations.th: การลดระดับฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: Bridge to engine room: initiate emergency descent to 10 meters immediately due to smoke on upper deck.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüden makine dairesine: Üst güvertedeki duman nedeniyle derhal 10 metreye acil alçalma başlatın.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle à la salle des machines : entamez immédiatement une descente d'urgence à 10 mètres en raison de fumée sur le pont supérieur.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke an Maschinenraum: Sofort Notabstieg auf 10 Meter wegen Rauch auf dem Oberdeck einleiten.
usageTranslations.es: Puente a sala de máquinas: iniciar descenso de emergencia a 10 metros inmediatamente debido a humo en la cubierta superior.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶舱到机舱：因上层甲板有烟雾，立即紧急下降至10米。
usageTranslations.ar: من الجسر إلى غرفة المحركات: ابدأ فورًا الهبوط الطارئ إلى 10 أمتار بسبب الدخان في السطح العلوي.
usageTranslations.pt: Passarela para sala de máquinas: iniciar descida de emergência para 10 metros imediatamente devido à fumaça no convés superior.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик в машинное отделение: немедленно начать аварийное снижение до 10 метров из-за дыма на верхней палубе.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジから機関室へ：上部デッキの煙のため、すぐに10メートルまで緊急降下を開始してください。
usageTranslations.it: Dal ponte alla sala macchine: iniziare immediatamente la discesa d'emergenza a 10 metri a causa del fumo sul ponte superiore.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu tàu đến phòng máy: bắt đầu hạ khẩn cấp xuống 10 mét ngay lập tức do có khói trên boong trên.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज से इंजन रूम: ऊपरी डेक पर धुएँ के कारण तुरंत 10 मीटर की आपातकालीन अवरोहण शुरू करें।
usageTranslations.th: จากสะพานไปยังห้องเครื่อง: เริ่มการลดระดับฉุกเฉินลงสู่ 10 เมตรทันทีเนื่องจากมีควันบนดาดฟ้าชั้นบน
usageTranslations.id: Jembatan ke ruang mesin: segera mulai penurunan darurat ke 10 meter karena asap di dek atas.

terms.definition: Immediate cessation of shipboard machinery, system, or cargo operation due to a critical safety or environmental risk.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge to engine room: Initiate emergency shutdown of the main engine and close fuel valves immediately.

termTranslations.th: ปิดฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: Bridge to engine room: Initiate emergency shutdown of the main engine and close fuel valves immediately.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüden makine dairesine: Ana makinenin acil kapatmasını başlatın ve yakıt vanalarını derhal kapatın.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle à la salle des machines : lancez l'arrêt d'urgence du moteur principal et fermez immédiatement les vannes de carburant.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke an Maschinenraum: Notabschaltung des Hauptmotors einleiten und Kraftstoffventile sofort schließen.
usageTranslations.es: Puente a sala de máquinas: inicie la parada de emergencia del motor principal y cierre las válvulas de combustible de inmediato.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶台至机舱：立即启动主机的紧急停机并关闭燃油阀。
usageTranslations.ar: من الجسر إلى غرفة المحركات: ابدأ إيقاف الطوارئ للمحرك الرئيسي وأغلق صمامات الوقود فورًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Ponte para casa de máquinas: inicie o desligamento de emergência do motor principal e feche imediatamente as válvulas de combustível.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик в машинное отделение: начать аварийную остановку главного двигателя и немедленно закрыть топливные клапаны.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジから機関室へ：主機の緊急停止を開始し、燃料バルブを直ちに閉じてください。
usageTranslations.it: Dalla plancia alla sala macchine: avviare l'arresto d'emergenza del motore principale e chiudere immediatamente le valvole del carburante.
usageTranslations.vi: Từ buồng lái đến phòng máy: Tiến hành ngừng khẩn cấp động cơ chính và đóng ngay van nhiên liệu.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज से इंजन रूम: मुख्य इंजन का आपातकालीन शटडाउन प्रारंभ करें और ईंधन वाल्व तुरंत बंद करें।
usageTranslations.th: จากสะพานไปยังห้องเครื่อง: เริ่มปิดฉุกเฉินเครื่องยนต์หลักและปิดวาล์วน้ำมันเชื้อเพลิงทันที
usageTranslations.id: Dari jembatan ke ruang mesin: Lakukan pemadaman darurat mesin utama dan segera tutup katup bahan bakar.

terms.definition: Radio transmission used to indicate that a vessel or person is in grave and imminent danger requiring immediate assistance.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: This is motor vessel Ocean Star, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, position 45°N 12°W, engine room fire, require immediate assistance.

termTranslations.th: การสื่อสารเหตุฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: This is motor vessel Ocean Star, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, position 45°N 12°W, engine room fire, require immediate assistance.
usageTranslations.tr: Burası motor gemisi Ocean Star, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, konum 45°K 12°B, makine dairesinde yangın, derhal yardım gerekiyor.
usageTranslations.fr: Ici navire moteur Ocean Star, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, position 45°N 12°W, incendie en salle des machines, besoin d'assistance immédiate.
usageTranslations.de: Hier Motorschiff Ocean Star, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, Position 45°N 12°W, Maschinenraumbrand, benötigen sofortige Hilfe.
usageTranslations.es: Aquí buque motor Ocean Star, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, posición 45°N 12°W, incendio en sala de máquinas, se requiere asistencia inmediata.
usageTranslations.zh: 这是机动船Ocean Star，Mayday，Mayday，Mayday，位置45°N 12°W，机舱起火，需要立即援助。
usageTranslations.ar: هذه سفينة المحرك Ocean Star، Mayday، Mayday، Mayday، الموقع 45°ش 12°غ، حريق في غرفة المحركات، نحتاج إلى مساعدة فورية.
usageTranslations.pt: Aqui é o navio Ocean Star, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, posição 45°N 12°W, incêndio na casa de máquinas, requer assistência imediata.
usageTranslations.ru: Это моторное судно Ocean Star, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, координаты 45°N 12°W, пожар в машинном отделении, требуется немедленная помощь.
usageTranslations.ja: こちらはモータービーグルOcean Star、メーデー、メーデー、メーデー、位置45°N 12°W、機関室火災、至急援助を要請します。
usageTranslations.it: Qui motonave Ocean Star, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, posizione 45°N 12°W, incendio in sala macchine, richiedo assistenza immediata.
usageTranslations.vi: Đây là tàu Ocean Star, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, vị trí 45°B 12°T, cháy buồng máy, cần hỗ trợ ngay lập tức.
usageTranslations.hi: यह मोटर पोत Ocean Star है, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, स्थिति 45°N 12°W, इंजन रूम में आग, तुरंत सहायता आवश्यक।
usageTranslations.th: นี่คือเรือ Ocean Star, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, ตำแหน่ง 45°N 12°W, ไฟไหม้ห้องเครื่อง, ต้องการความช่วยเหลือทันที
usageTranslations.id: Ini adalah kapal Ocean Star, Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, posisi 45°N 12°W, kebakaran ruang mesin, memerlukan bantuan segera.

terms.definition: A dedicated radio device used to send automatic distress signals, such as EPIRBs or DSC-enabled VHF/MF/HF transmitters.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: EPIRB emergency transmitter activated automatically upon water contact and transmitted distress signal on 406 MHz.

termTranslations.vi: Thiết Bị Phát Tín Hiệu Khẩn Cấp
termTranslations.th: เครื่องส่งฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: EPIRB emergency transmitter activated automatically upon water contact and transmitted distress signal on 406 MHz.
usageTranslations.tr: EPIRB acil verici suyla temas edince otomatik olarak çalıştı ve 406 MHz üzerinden tehlike sinyali gönderdi.
usageTranslations.fr: L'émetteur d'urgence EPIRB s'est activé automatiquement au contact de l'eau et a transmis un signal de détresse sur 406 MHz.
usageTranslations.de: Der EPIRB-Notfunksender wurde bei Wasserkontakt automatisch aktiviert und sendete ein Notsignal auf 406 MHz.
usageTranslations.es: El transmisor de emergencia EPIRB se activó automáticamente al contacto con el agua y transmitió una señal de socorro en 406 MHz.
usageTranslations.zh: EPIRB紧急发射器在接触水后自动激活，并在406 MHz上发送遇险信号。
usageTranslations.ar: تم تفعيل مرسل الطوارئ EPIRB تلقائيًا عند ملامسة الماء وأرسل إشارة استغاثة على تردد 406 ميجاهرتز.
usageTranslations.pt: O transmissor de emergência EPIRB foi ativado automaticamente ao contato com a água e transmitiu sinal de socorro em 406 MHz.
usageTranslations.ru: Аварийный передатчик EPIRB автоматически активировался при контакте с водой и передал сигнал бедствия на частоте 406 МГц.
usageTranslations.ja: EPIRB緊急送信機は水に接触すると自動的に作動し、406MHzで遭難信号を送信しました。
usageTranslations.it: Il trasmettitore di emergenza EPIRB si è attivato automaticamente al contatto con l'acqua e ha trasmesso un segnale di soccorso su 406 MHz.
usageTranslations.vi: Thiết bị phát tín hiệu khẩn cấp EPIRB tự động kích hoạt khi tiếp xúc với nước và phát tín hiệu cấp cứu trên tần số 406 MHz.
usageTranslations.hi: EPIRB आपातकालीन ट्रांसमीटर पानी के संपर्क में आते ही स्वचालित रूप से सक्रिय हो गया और 406 MHz पर आपातकालीन संकेत प्रसारित किया।
usageTranslations.th: เครื่องส่งฉุกเฉิน EPIRB เปิดใช้งานโดยอัตโนมัติเมื่อสัมผัสน้ำและส่งสัญญาณขอความช่วยเหลือที่ความถี่ 406 MHz
usageTranslations.id: Pemancar darurat EPIRB aktif secara otomatis saat bersentuhan dengan air dan mengirimkan sinyal marabahaya pada 406 MHz.

terms.definition: The immediate assembly of all crew and passengers at assigned muster stations in response to an alarm or emergency situation.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All crew report to emergency muster stations immediately and wait for further instructions.

termTranslations.th: การรวมตัวฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: All crew report to emergency muster stations immediately and wait for further instructions.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm mürettebat derhal acil toplanma noktalarına gidin ve sonraki talimatları bekleyin.
usageTranslations.fr: Tout l'équipage doit se présenter immédiatement aux postes de rassemblement d'urgence et attendre les instructions.
usageTranslations.de: Die gesamte Besatzung soll sich sofort zu den Notmusterversammlungsplätzen begeben und auf weitere Anweisungen warten.
usageTranslations.es: Toda la tripulación debe acudir inmediatamente a los puestos de formación de emergencia y esperar instrucciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 全体船员请立即前往紧急集合点并等待进一步指示。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على جميع الطاقم التوجه فورًا إلى نقاط التجمع الطارئ والانتظار لمزيد من التعليمات.
usageTranslations.pt: Toda a tripulação deve dirigir-se imediatamente aos postos de reunião de emergência e aguardar instruções.
usageTranslations.ru: Весь экипаж немедленно прибыть к аварийным сборным пунктам и ожидать дальнейших указаний.
usageTranslations.ja: 全乗組員は直ちに緊急集合場所に集合し、次の指示を待て。
usageTranslations.it: Tutto l'equipaggio si rechi immediatamente ai punti di adunata d'emergenza e attenda ulteriori istruzioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Toàn bộ thuyền viên hãy đến ngay các trạm tập hợp khẩn cấp và chờ hướng dẫn tiếp theo.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी चालक दल तुरंत आपातकालीन एकत्रीकरण स्टेशनों पर रिपोर्ट करें और आगे के निर्देशों की प्रतीक्षा करें।
usageTranslations.th: ลูกเรือทั้งหมดไปยังจุดรวมตัวฉุกเฉินทันทีและรอคำแนะนำเพิ่มเติม
usageTranslations.id: Seluruh kru segera menuju titik kumpul darurat dan tunggu instruksi selanjutnya.

terms.definition: A dedicated pump used to supply seawater to fire hydrants and hoses on board for firefighting operations.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Activate the fire pump and open hydrant valve number four on deck B immediately.

termTranslations.th: ปั๊มดับเพลิง

usageTranslations.en: Activate the fire pump and open hydrant valve number four on deck B immediately.
usageTranslations.tr: Yangın pompasını çalıştırın ve B güvertesindeki dört numaralı yangın vanasını hemen açın.
usageTranslations.fr: Activez la pompe incendie et ouvrez immédiatement la vanne d'incendie numéro quatre sur le pont B.
usageTranslations.de: Feuerlöschpumpe einschalten und Hydrantenventil Nummer vier auf Deck B sofort öffnen.
usageTranslations.es: Active la bomba contra incendios y abra inmediatamente la válvula número cuatro en la cubierta B.
usageTranslations.zh: 启动消防泵，立即打开B甲板上的四号消防栓阀门。
usageTranslations.ar: قم بتشغيل مضخة الحريق وافتح صمام الحنفيه رقم أربعة في السطح B فورًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Ative a bomba de incêndio e abra imediatamente a válvula número quatro no convés B.
usageTranslations.ru: Включите пожарный насос и немедленно откройте клапан гидранта номер четыре на палубе B.
usageTranslations.ja: 消防ポンプを起動し、Bデッキの4番消火栓バルブを直ちに開けてください。
usageTranslations.it: Attiva la pompa antincendio e apri subito la valvola idrante numero quattro sul ponte B.
usageTranslations.vi: Kích hoạt bơm chữa cháy và mở ngay van vòi số bốn trên boong B.
usageTranslations.hi: फायर पंप को सक्रिय करें और डेक बी पर नंबर चार हाइड्रेंट वाल्व तुरंत खोलें।
usageTranslations.th: เปิดปั๊มดับเพลิงและเปิดวาล์วดับเพลิงหมายเลขสี่บนดาดฟ้า B ทันที
usageTranslations.id: Aktifkan pompa kebakaran dan segera buka katup hidran nomor empat di geladak B.

terms.definition: The central console or system used to monitor and operate the ship’s main propulsion engine, including remote start, stop, RPM, alarms, and critical parameter displays, typically located in the engine control room or bridge.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge to engine room, please confirm main engine control is set to remote for departure. Stand by to increase RPM on my command.

termTranslations.th: การควบคุมเครื่องยนต์หลัก

usageTranslations.en: Bridge to engine room, please confirm main engine control is set to remote for departure. Stand by to increase RPM on my command.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüden makine dairesine, ana makine kontrolünün kalkış için uzaktan kumandaya ayarlandığını teyit edin. Komutumda devir artırmaya hazır olun.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle à salle des machines, confirmez que la commande machine principale est en mode distant pour le départ. Prêt à augmenter les tours sur mon ordre.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke an Maschinenraum, bitte bestätigen Sie, dass die Hauptmaschinensteuerung für das Ablegen auf Fernbedienung steht. Stehen Sie bereit, die Drehzahl auf mein Kommando zu erhöhen.
usageTranslations.es: Puente a sala de máquinas, confirme que el control del motor principal está en remoto para la salida. Prepárese para aumentar las RPM a mi orden.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶台到机舱，请确认主机控制已设为远程，准备离港。收到命令后准备提升转速。
usageTranslations.ar: الجسر إلى غرفة المحرك، يرجى تأكيد ضبط التحكم في المحرك الرئيسي على الوضع البعيد للمغادرة. استعد لزيادة عدد الدورات عند إشارتي.
usageTranslations.pt: Ponte para sala de máquinas, confirme se o controle do motor principal está remoto para a partida. Pronto para aumentar as RPM ao meu comando.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик в машинное отделение, подтвердите, что управление главным двигателем установлено на дистанционное для отхода. Приготовьтесь увеличить обороты по моей команде.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジから機関室へ。主機制御が出港用にリモート設定されていることを確認してください。指示があれば回転数を上げてください。
usageTranslations.it: Plancia alla sala macchine, confermate che il controllo motore principale è impostato su remoto per la partenza. Pronti ad aumentare i giri su mio ordine.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu tới phòng máy, xác nhận điều khiển động cơ chính đã chuyển sang chế độ điều khiển từ xa để rời bến. Sẵn sàng tăng vòng tua theo lệnh của tôi.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज से इंजन रूम, कृपया पुष्टि करें कि मुख्य इंजन नियंत्रण प्रस्थान के लिए रिमोट पर सेट है। मेरे आदेश पर आरपीएम बढ़ाने के लिए तैयार रहें।
usageTranslations.th: สะพานถึงห้องเครื่อง กรุณายืนยันว่าการควบคุมเครื่องยนต์หลักตั้งค่าเป็นรีโมทสำหรับออกจากท่า เตรียมพร้อมเพิ่มรอบเครื่องยนต์เมื่อได้รับคำสั่ง
usageTranslations.id: Jembatan ke ruang mesin, konfirmasi kontrol mesin utama sudah diatur ke mode remote untuk keberangkatan. Siap tingkatkan RPM atas perintah saya.

terms.definition: The operation to start a ship’s auxiliary engine, which provides electrical power or essential services independently of the main propulsion engine, typically performed before arrival, departure, or critical shipboard operations.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, prepare for auxiliary engine start. Confirm all safety checks are complete before initiating.

termTranslations.th: สตาร์ทเครื่องยนต์เสริม

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, prepare for auxiliary engine start. Confirm all safety checks are complete before initiating.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, jeneratör başlatmaya hazırlanın. Tüm güvenlik kontrollerinin tamamlandığını teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, préparez le démarrage du groupe auxiliaire. Confirmez que tous les contrôles de sécurité sont effectués.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, bereiten Sie den Hilfsmotorstart vor. Bestätigen Sie, dass alle Sicherheitsprüfungen abgeschlossen sind.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, prepárese para arrancar el motor auxiliar. Confirme que se han completado todas las comprobaciones de seguridad.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请准备辅机启动。启动前请确认所有安全检查已完成。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، استعد لتشغيل المحرك الإضافي. أكد اكتمال جميع الفحوصات الأمنية قبل البدء.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, prepare para partida do motor auxiliar. Confirme todas as verificações de segurança antes de iniciar.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, подготовьте запуск вспомогательного двигателя. Подтвердите завершение всех проверок безопасности.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、補助機始動の準備をしてください。開始前にすべての安全確認を完了してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, preparatevi all’avviamento motore ausiliario. Confermate che tutti i controlli di sicurezza sono completati.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, chuẩn bị khởi động máy phụ. Xác nhận đã kiểm tra an toàn đầy đủ trước khi bắt đầu.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, सहायक इंजन प्रारंभ के लिए तैयार रहें। आरंभ से पहले सभी सुरक्षा जांच पूरी होने की पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง เตรียมสตาร์ทเครื่องยนต์เสริม กรุณายืนยันว่าตรวจสอบความปลอดภัยครบถ้วนแล้วก่อนดำเนินการ
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, siapkan start mesin bantu. Pastikan semua pemeriksaan keselamatan telah dilakukan sebelum memulai.

terms.definition: An audible and/or visual signal in the engine room, indicating an abnormal or hazardous condition in machinery, systems, or parameters that requires prompt crew attention according to the ship’s alarm management procedures.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine control room, an engine room alarm has been activated on panel 2. Please investigate the cause and report your findings immediately.

termTranslations.th: สัญญาณเตือนห้องเครื่อง

usageTranslations.en: Engine control room, an engine room alarm has been activated on panel 2. Please investigate the cause and report your findings immediately.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine kontrol odası, panel 2’de makine dairesi alarmı etkinleşti. Lütfen sebebini araştırın ve bulgularınızı derhal bildirin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle de contrôle, une alarme salle des machines a été déclenchée sur le panneau 2. Veuillez enquêter et signaler immédiatement.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenkontrollraum, ein Maschinenraumalarm wurde auf Tafel 2 ausgelöst. Bitte Ursache prüfen und sofort Bericht erstatten.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de control, se ha activado una alarma de sala de máquinas en el panel 2. Por favor, investigue y reporte de inmediato.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱控制室，2号面板上已触发机舱报警。请立即查明原因并汇报结果。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة التحكم بالمحرك، تم تفعيل إنذار غرفة المحركات في اللوحة 2. يرجى التحقيق فورًا والإبلاغ.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de controle, um alarme da sala de máquinas foi ativado no painel 2. Investigue e reporte imediatamente.
usageTranslations.ru: Контрольная рубка, на панели 2 сработала сигнализация машинного отделения. Срочно выясните причину и доложите.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関制御室、パネル2で機関室警報が作動しました。原因を調査し、すぐに報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala controllo, un allarme sala macchine è stato attivato sul pannello 2. Indagare e riferire subito.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng điều khiển, báo động phòng máy đã kích hoạt ở bảng 2. Vui lòng kiểm tra nguyên nhân và báo cáo ngay.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन नियंत्रण कक्ष, पैनल 2 पर इंजन रूम अलार्म सक्रिय हुआ है। कृपया कारण जांचें और तुरंत रिपोर्ट करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องควบคุมเครื่องยนต์ มีการแจ้งเตือนห้องเครื่องที่แผงควบคุมหมายเลข 2 กรุณาตรวจสอบสาเหตุและรายงานผลทันที
usageTranslations.id: Ruang kontrol mesin, alarm ruang mesin aktif di panel 2. Harap selidiki penyebabnya dan laporkan segera.

terms.definition: The procedure to initiate the ship's emergency generator to supply critical electrical power during a main blackout or failure of the main power supply, as required by SOLAS and vessel emergency protocols.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge to engine room, initiate emergency generator start immediately due to total blackout. Confirm power is restored to essential systems.

termTranslations.vi: Khởi Động Máy Phát Dự Phòng
termTranslations.th: สตาร์ทเครื่องปั่นไฟฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: Bridge to engine room, initiate emergency generator start immediately due to total blackout. Confirm power is restored to essential systems.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüden makine dairesine, tam kararma nedeniyle acil jeneratörü derhal başlatın. Kritik sistemlere enerji geldiğini teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle à salle des machines, démarrez immédiatement le générateur de secours en raison de la coupure totale. Confirmez le rétablissement du courant aux systèmes essentiels.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke an Maschinenraum, starten Sie wegen Totalausfall sofort den Notgenerator. Bestätigen Sie, dass Strom an kritische Systeme zurückkehrt.
usageTranslations.es: Puente a sala de máquinas, arranque inmediato del generador de emergencia por apagón total. Confirme que la energía ha sido restaurada a los sistemas esenciales.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶台到机舱，因全船停电，请立即启动应急发电机。确认关键系统已恢复供电。
usageTranslations.ar: الجسر إلى غرفة المحرك، ابدأ تشغيل المولد الطارئ فورًا بسبب انقطاع كامل للكهرباء. أكد عودة الطاقة للأنظمة الأساسية.
usageTranslations.pt: Ponte para sala de máquinas, inicie imediatamente o gerador de emergência devido a apagão total. Confirme o restabelecimento da energia aos sistemas essenciais.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик в машинное отделение, немедленно запустите аварийный генератор из-за полного отключения электроэнергии. Подтвердите восстановление питания на важнейшие системы.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジから機関室へ。全船停電のため、非常用発電機を直ちに始動してください。重要システムに電力が復旧したことを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Plancia alla sala macchine, avviate subito il generatore d’emergenza per blackout totale. Confermate il ripristino dell’energia ai sistemi essenziali.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu tới phòng máy, khởi động ngay máy phát dự phòng do mất điện toàn bộ. Xác nhận điện đã cấp lại cho các hệ thống quan trọng.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज से इंजन रूम, पूर्ण ब्लैकआउट के कारण आपातकालीन जनरेटर तुरंत प्रारंभ करें। महत्वपूर्ण प्रणालियों में बिजली लौटने की पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: สะพานถึงห้องเครื่อง สตาร์ทเครื่องปั่นไฟฉุกเฉินทันทีเนื่องจากไฟดับทั้งระบบ กรุณายืนยันว่าระบบสำคัญมีไฟแล้ว
usageTranslations.id: Jembatan ke ruang mesin, segera start genset darurat akibat mati total. Pastikan listrik kembali ke sistem penting.

terms.definition: A warning signal indicating malfunction or abnormal condition in the steering gear system, requiring immediate crew investigation to ensure safe navigation and comply with SOLAS Chapter II-1.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge to engine room, steering gear alarm is showing on the panel. Please check the system status and report immediately.

termTranslations.th: สัญญาณเตือนระบบบังคับเลี้ยว

usageTranslations.en: Bridge to engine room, steering gear alarm is showing on the panel. Please check the system status and report immediately.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüden makine dairesine, panelde dümen donanımı alarmı görünüyor. Sistemi kontrol edip hemen bildirin.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle à salle des machines, alarme appareil à gouverner affichée sur le panneau. Vérifiez le système et signalez immédiatement.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke an Maschinenraum, auf dem Panel wird Ruderanlagenalarm angezeigt. Prüfen Sie das System und melden Sie sofort.
usageTranslations.es: Puente a sala de máquinas, la alarma del equipo de gobierno se muestra en el panel. Revise el sistema y reporte de inmediato.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶台到机舱，面板上显示舵机报警。请检查系统并立即汇报。
usageTranslations.ar: الجسر إلى غرفة المحرك، يظهر إنذار جهاز التوجيه على اللوحة. يرجى فحص النظام والإبلاغ فورًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Ponte para sala de máquinas, alarme do sistema de governo aparece no painel. Verifique o sistema e reporte imediatamente.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик в машинное отделение, на панели сигнализация рулевого привода. Проверьте систему и срочно доложите.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジから機関室へ。パネルに舵装置警報が表示されています。すぐにシステムを確認し報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Plancia alla sala macchine, allarme apparecchio di governo sul pannello. Verificate e riferite subito.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu tới phòng máy, cảnh báo thiết bị lái hiển thị trên bảng. Kiểm tra hệ thống và báo cáo ngay.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज से इंजन रूम, पैनल पर स्टीयरिंग गियर अलार्म दिख रहा है। कृपया सिस्टम की स्थिति जांचें और तुरंत रिपोर्ट करें।
usageTranslations.th: สะพานถึงห้องเครื่อง มีสัญญาณเตือนระบบบังคับเลี้ยวที่แผงควบคุม กรุณาตรวจสอบระบบและรายงานผลทันที
usageTranslations.id: Jembatan ke ruang mesin, alarm gear kemudi terlihat di panel. Mohon periksa sistem dan segera laporkan.

terms.definition: An alert indicating the presence of excess water in the bilge spaces, often requiring automatic or manual pumping, and indicating possible leak or flooding, as per MARPOL and class regulations.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, bilge water alarm is active in compartment 3. Check for leaks and operate bilge pump as required.

termTranslations.th: สัญญาณเตือนน้ำบิลจ์

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, bilge water alarm is active in compartment 3. Check for leaks and operate bilge pump as required.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, bölme 3’te sintine suyu alarmı aktif. Kaçak kontrol edin ve gerekirse pompayı çalıştırın.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, alarme eau de cale active au compartiment 3. Vérifiez les fuites et actionnez la pompe si besoin.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, Bilgewasseralarm ist im Abteil 3 aktiv. Prüfen Sie auf Lecks und starten Sie die Bilgepumpe.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, alarma de agua de sentina activa en el compartimento 3. Verifique fugas y opere la bomba si es necesario.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，3号舱底水报警已激活。检查是否漏水并按需启动舱底泵。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، إنذار مياه الجسر نشط في المقصورة 3. افحص التسريبات وشغل المضخة حسب الحاجة.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, alarme de água de porão ativo no compartimento 3. Verifique vazamentos e opere a bomba conforme necessário.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, сигнализация трюмной воды активна в отсеке 3. Проверьте на наличие утечек и включите трюмный насос.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、区画3でビルジ水警報が作動中。漏れを点検し、必要に応じてビルジポンプを作動してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, allarme acqua di sentina attivo al compartimento 3. Verificare perdite e azionare la pompa se necessario.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, cảnh báo nước la canh đang kích hoạt ở khoang số 3. Kiểm tra rò rỉ và vận hành bơm nếu cần.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, कंपार्टमेंट 3 में बिल्ज़ वॉटर अलार्म सक्रिय है। रिसाव की जांच करें और आवश्यकतानुसार पंप चलाएं।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง สัญญาณเตือนน้ำบิลจ์ในช่องที่ 3 ทำงาน กรุณาตรวจสอบการรั่วไหลและเปิดปั๊มถ้าจำเป็น
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, alarm air bilga aktif di kompartemen 3. Periksa kebocoran dan operasikan pompa jika diperlukan.

terms.definition: The measured temperature of a ship’s main propulsion shaft bearing, monitored continuously to prevent overheating and possible bearing failure.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, please report shaft bearing temperature readings every thirty minutes during heavy weather.

termTranslations.th: อุณหภูมิแบริ่งเพลา

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, please report shaft bearing temperature readings every thirty minutes during heavy weather.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, kötü havada her otuz dakikada bir şaft yatak sıcaklıklarını rapor edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, veuillez signaler la température du palier d’arbre toutes les trente minutes par mauvais temps.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, bitte melden Sie bei schwerem Wetter alle dreißig Minuten die Welllager-Temperaturen.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, reporte la temperatura del cojinete de eje cada treinta minutos durante mal tiempo.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请在恶劣天气下每三十分钟报告一次轴承温度。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، يرجى الإبلاغ عن قراءات درجة حرارة محمل العمود كل ثلاثين دقيقة أثناء الطقس السيئ.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, informe a temperatura do mancal do eixo a cada trinta minutos durante tempo ruim.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, сообщайте температуру подшипника вала каждые тридцать минут при плохой погоде.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、荒天時は30分ごとに軸受温度を報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, segnalate la temperatura del cuscinetto dell’albero ogni trenta minuti con mare agitato.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, vui lòng báo cáo nhiệt độ ổ trục mỗi 30 phút khi thời tiết xấu.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, खराब मौसम के दौरान हर तीस मिनट में शाफ्ट बीयरिंग तापमान रिपोर्ट करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง กรุณารายงานอุณหภูมิแบริ่งเพลาทุก 30 นาทีในสภาพอากาศแปรปรวน
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, laporkan temperatur bantalan poros setiap tiga puluh menit saat cuaca buruk.

terms.definition: The process of pumping fuel oil from one tank to another or to the engine, requiring strict adherence to MARPOL, safety, and spill prevention procedures.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, commence fuel oil transfer to settling tank as per bunkering plan and confirm all spill trays are in position.

termTranslations.th: การถ่ายน้ำมันเชื้อเพลิง

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, commence fuel oil transfer to settling tank as per bunkering plan and confirm all spill trays are in position.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, yakıt transfer planına uygun şekilde yerleşim tankına yakıt transferine başlayın ve tüm damlama tepsilerinin yerinde olduğunu teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, commencez le transfert de fioul vers le réservoir de décantation selon le plan d’avitaillement et confirmez que tous les bacs de récupération sont en place.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, beginnen Sie gemäß Bunkerplan mit der Kraftstoffübertragung in den Settling-Tank und bestätigen Sie, dass alle Auffangwannen positioniert sind.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, inicie la transferencia de combustible al tanque de sedimentación según el plan de suministro y confirme que todas las bandejas de derrames estén en posición.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请按加油计划开始向沉降舱转移燃油，并确认所有集油盘已到位。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، ابدأ نقل زيت الوقود إلى خزان الترسيب وفق خطة التزويد وتأكد من وضع جميع صواني الانسكاب.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, inicie a transferência de óleo combustível para o tanque de decantação conforme o plano de abastecimento e confirme que todas as bandejas de contenção estão no lugar.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, начните перекачку топливного масла в отстойник согласно плану бункеровки и подтвердите наличие всех поддонов.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、補油計画に従い沈殿タンクへの燃料移送を開始し、全ての受け皿が設置されていることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, iniziare il trasferimento dell’olio combustibile nel serbatoio di decantazione secondo il piano di bunkeraggio e confermare che tutte le vasche di raccolta siano in posizione.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, bắt đầu chuyển dầu nhiên liệu vào bể lắng theo kế hoạch và xác nhận tất cả các khay hứng đã đặt đúng chỗ.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, बंकरिंग योजना के अनुसार सेटलिंग टैंक में ईंधन तेल स्थानांतरण शुरू करें और सभी ट्रे की स्थिति की पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง เริ่มถ่ายน้ำมันเชื้อเพลิงไปยังถังตกตะกอนตามแผนเติมเชื้อเพลิง และยืนยันว่าถาดรองน้ำมันอยู่ในตำแหน่งครบถ้วน
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, mulai transfer minyak bahan bakar ke settling tank sesuai rencana pengisian dan pastikan semua baki penampung sudah terpasang.

terms.definition: A centrifugal device used on board to remove water and contaminants from lubricating oil, ensuring optimal engine operation and longevity.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, start the lubricating oil purifier and monitor discharge for signs of water or sludge.

termTranslations.vi: Thiết Bị Lọc Dầu Bôi Trơn
termTranslations.th: เครื่องกรองน้ำมันหล่อลื่น

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, start the lubricating oil purifier and monitor discharge for signs of water or sludge.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, yağ saflaştırıcıyı çalıştırın ve çıkıştan su veya tortu olup olmadığını kontrol edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, démarrez le purificateur d’huile de graissage et surveillez le rejet pour détecter eau ou boues.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, starten Sie den Schmierölreiniger und überwachen Sie den Ausstoß auf Wasser oder Schlamm.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, encienda el purificador de aceite lubricante y controle el vertido en busca de agua o lodo.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请启动润滑油净化器，并监测排放口有无水或沉积物。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، شغل منقّي زيت التشحيم وراقب التصريف لرصد وجود ماء أو رواسب.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, acione o purificador de óleo lubrificante e monitore o descarte quanto a água ou lama.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, запустите очиститель смазочного масла и следите за выбросом воды или осадка.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、潤滑油清浄機を始動し、排出物に水やスラッジがないか監視してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, avviate il purificatore olio lubrificante e controllate lo scarico per acqua o fanghi.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, khởi động thiết bị lọc dầu bôi trơn và theo dõi xả ra có nước hoặc bùn không.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, स्नेहन तेल शोधक शुरू करें और जल या कीचड़ के संकेत के लिए डिस्चार्ज की निगरानी करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง เริ่มเดินเครื่องกรองน้ำมันหล่อลื่น และตรวจสอบน้ำหรือคราบตะกอนในสิ่งที่ปล่อยออกมา
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, nyalakan pemurni oli pelumas dan pantau pembuangan dari adanya air atau lumpur.

terms.definition: A sealing device at the exit point of the ship’s propeller shaft through the hull, preventing water ingress and oil leakage, and critical for propulsion integrity.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, monitor stern tube seal for signs of leakage during high RPM operations and report any abnormality immediately.

termTranslations.th: ซีลท่อท้ายเรือ

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, monitor stern tube seal for signs of leakage during high RPM operations and report any abnormality immediately.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, yüksek devirde kuyruk borusu contasını sızıntı açısından izleyin ve anormallikleri hemen bildirin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, surveillez le joint du tube d’étambot pour toute fuite lors de fortes vitesses et signalez toute anomalie immédiatement.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, überwachen Sie bei hohen Drehzahlen die Stevenrohrdichtung auf Undichtigkeiten und melden Sie Unregelmäßigkeiten sofort.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, vigile el sello del tubo de cola por fugas a altas RPM y reporte cualquier anomalía de inmediato.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，在高转速下请监测尾轴管密封有无泄漏，并立即报告异常。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، راقب ختم أنبوب المؤخرة بحثًا عن تسربات أثناء التشغيل بسرعة عالية وبلغ فورًا عن أي شذوذ.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, monitore a vedação do tubo de popa para vazamentos em alta rotação e relate anomalias imediatamente.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, следите за уплотнением стерновой трубы при высоких оборотах и сразу сообщайте о любых нарушениях.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、高回転時は船尾管シールの漏れに注意し、異常があればすぐ報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, monitorate la guarnizione tubo poppa durante giri elevati e segnalate anomalie subito.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, giám sát phớt ống đuôi tàu khi chạy RPM cao và báo cáo mọi bất thường ngay lập tức.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, उच्च RPM पर स्टर्न ट्यूब सील की लीकेज जांचें और कोई भी असामान्यता तुरंत रिपोर्ट करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง ตรวจสอบซีลท่อท้ายเรือขณะรอบสูง หากพบสิ่งผิดปกติให้รายงานทันที
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, pantau seal pipa buritan saat RPM tinggi dan laporkan jika ada kejanggalan.

terms.definition: The network of pipes, pumps, and heat exchangers circulating water to remove excess heat from the main engine and auxiliary systems.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, check cooling water system pressure and temperature before increasing main engine RPM.

termTranslations.th: ระบบน้ำหล่อเย็น

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, check cooling water system pressure and temperature before increasing main engine RPM.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, ana makine devir artırmadan önce soğutma suyu sistemi basıncını ve sıcaklığını kontrol edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, vérifiez pression et température du système d’eau de refroidissement avant d’augmenter les tours du moteur principal.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, prüfen Sie vor Erhöhung der Hauptmaschinendrehzahl Druck und Temperatur des Kühlwassersystems.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, verifique presión y temperatura del sistema de agua de enfriamiento antes de aumentar las RPM del motor principal.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请在提高主机转速前检查冷却水系统压力和温度。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، تحقق من ضغط ودرجة حرارة نظام مياه التبريد قبل زيادة دورات المحرك الرئيسي.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, verifique pressão e temperatura do sistema de água de resfriamento antes de aumentar RPM do motor principal.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, проверьте давление и температуру системы охлаждающей воды перед увеличением оборотов главного двигателя.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、主機回転数を上げる前に冷却水系統の圧力と温度を確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, controllate pressione e temperatura del sistema acqua di raffreddamento prima di aumentare i giri del motore principale.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, kiểm tra áp suất và nhiệt độ hệ thống nước làm mát trước khi tăng RPM động cơ chính.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, मुख्य इंजन आरपीएम बढ़ाने से पहले कूलिंग वाटर सिस्टम का दबाव और तापमान जांचें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง ตรวจสอบแรงดันและอุณหภูมิระบบน้ำหล่อเย็นก่อนเพิ่มรอบเครื่องยนต์หลัก
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, cek tekanan dan suhu sistem air pendingin sebelum menaikkan RPM mesin utama.

terms.definition: The presence or rapid ingress of water in the engine room spaces, posing a serious risk to machinery and vessel safety, requiring emergency response and reporting under SOLAS protocols.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge to engine room, engine room flooding detected. Activate emergency bilge suction and update bridge with situation every five minutes.

termTranslations.th: น้ำท่วมห้องเครื่อง

usageTranslations.en: Bridge to engine room, engine room flooding detected. Activate emergency bilge suction and update bridge with situation every five minutes.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüden makine dairesine, makine dairesinde su baskını tespit edildi. Acil sintine emişini başlatın ve her beş dakikada bir durumu köprüye bildirin.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle à salle des machines, inondation détectée. Activez l’aspiration de cale d’urgence et informez la passerelle toutes les cinq minutes.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke an Maschinenraum, Überflutung festgestellt. Notlenzpumpe starten und alle fünf Minuten Bericht an Brücke.
usageTranslations.es: Puente a sala de máquinas, detectada inundación. Active succión de emergencia y reporte a puente cada cinco minutos.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶台到机舱，发现机舱进水。启动应急舱底抽水，并每五分钟向驾驶台报告情况。
usageTranslations.ar: الجسر إلى غرفة المحرك، تم اكتشاف غمر بالماء. فعّل شفط الطوارئ وحدث الجسر كل خمس دقائق.
usageTranslations.pt: Ponte para sala de máquinas, detectada inundação. Ative a sucção de emergência e atualize a ponte a cada cinco minutos.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик в машинное отделение, обнаружено затопление. Включите аварийный откачивающий насос и докладывайте каждые пять минут.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジから機関室へ。機関室浸水を確認。緊急ビルジ吸引を開始し、5分ごとに状況を報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Plancia alla sala macchine, rilevato allagamento. Avviare l’aspirazione d’emergenza e aggiornare la plancia ogni cinque minuti.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu tới phòng máy, phát hiện ngập nước phòng máy. Kích hoạt bơm khẩn cấp và cập nhật tình hình cho cầu mỗi 5 phút.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज से इंजन रूम, बाढ़ का पता चला है। आपातकालीन बिल्ज़ सक्शन चालू करें और हर पाँच मिनट में ब्रिज को स्थिति बताएं।
usageTranslations.th: สะพานถึงห้องเครื่อง ตรวจพบน้ำท่วมห้องเครื่อง ดำเนินการสูบน้ำฉุกเฉินและรายงานสถานการณ์ทุก 5 นาที
usageTranslations.id: Jembatan ke ruang mesin, terdeteksi banjir ruang mesin. Aktifkan hisap bilga darurat dan laporkan situasi ke jembatan tiap lima menit.

terms.definition: The process of distributing electrical or mechanical load evenly between two or more engines or generators operating in parallel to optimize performance and prevent overloading, as per engine room procedures and automation systems.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine control room, confirm engine load sharing is active and that both generators are synchronized as per operational procedures.

termTranslations.th: การแบ่งโหลดเครื่องยนต์

usageTranslations.en: Engine control room, confirm engine load sharing is active and that both generators are synchronized as per operational procedures.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine kontrol odası, makine yük paylaşımının aktif olduğunu ve iki jeneratörün prosedüre uygun olarak senkronize edildiğini teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle de contrôle, confirmez que le partage de charge moteur est actif et que les deux groupes sont synchronisés selon les procédures.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenkontrollraum, bestätigen Sie, dass die Lastaufteilung aktiv ist und beide Generatoren wie vorgeschrieben synchronisiert sind.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de control, confirme que el reparto de carga está activo y ambos generadores sincronizados según procedimientos.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱控制室，请确认发动机负载分配已激活，且两台发电机按操作规程同步运行。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة التحكم، أكد أن تقاسم حمل المحركات نشط وأن المولدات متزامنة وفق الإجراءات.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de controle, confirme que o compartilhamento de carga está ativo e os dois geradores estão sincronizados conforme procedimentos.
usageTranslations.ru: Контрольная рубка, подтвердите, что распределение нагрузки включено и оба генератора синхронизированы по процедуре.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関制御室、エンジン負荷分担が作動中で両発電機が手順通り同期していることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala controllo, confermate che la ripartizione carico motore è attiva e i due generatori sono sincronizzati secondo procedura.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng điều khiển, xác nhận chia sẻ tải động cơ đang kích hoạt và cả hai máy phát đã đồng bộ theo quy trình.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन नियंत्रण कक्ष, पुष्टि करें कि लोड शेयरिंग सक्रिय है और दोनों जेनरेटर प्रक्रियानुसार सिंक्रनाइज़ हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องควบคุมเครื่องยนต์ กรุณายืนยันว่าการแบ่งโหลดเครื่องยนต์ทำงานอยู่และเครื่องกำเนิดไฟฟ้าทั้งสองเครื่องซิงโครไนซ์ตามขั้นตอน
usageTranslations.id: Ruang kontrol mesin, konfirmasi pembagian beban mesin aktif dan kedua genset sudah sinkron sesuai prosedur.

terms.definition: A mode in which the propulsion and critical machinery are operated directly from the bridge, with command transferred from the engine control room for maneuvering or restricted navigation.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, transfer propulsion to bridge control mode for departure. Confirm handover and monitor all remote alarms.

termTranslations.es: Modo de Control desde el Puente
termTranslations.vi: Chế Độ Điều Khiển Trên Cầu
termTranslations.th: โหมดควบคุมจากสะพานเดินเรือ

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, transfer propulsion to bridge control mode for departure. Confirm handover and monitor all remote alarms.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, sevk sistemini çıkış için köprüden kontrol moduna aktarın. Devir teslimi teyit edin ve tüm uzaktan alarmları izleyin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, passez la propulsion en mode contrôle passerelle pour le départ. Confirmez la prise en charge et surveillez toutes les alarmes à distance.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, stellen Sie für das Auslaufen auf Brückensteuerungsmodus um. Übergabe bestätigen und alle Fernalarme überwachen.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, transfiera la propulsión a modo control desde el puente para la salida. Confirme entrega y vigile todas las alarmas remotas.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请将推进系统切换至驾驶台控制模式以便离港。确认交接并监控所有远程报警。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، حوّل الدفع إلى وضع التحكم من الجسر للمغادرة. أكد التسليم وراقب جميع الإنذارات عن بُعد.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, transfira a propulsão para modo de controle na ponte para a partida. Confirme a entrega e monitore todos os alarmes remotos.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, переведите управление тягой на мостик для отхода. Подтвердите передачу и контролируйте все удалённые сигналы.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、出港のため推進装置をブリッジ制御モードに切り替えてください。引き継ぎを確認し、すべての遠隔警報を監視してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, trasferire la propulsione in modalità controllo plancia per la partenza. Confermate il passaggio e monitorate tutti gli allarmi remoti.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, chuyển động lực sang chế độ điều khiển trên cầu để rời bến. Xác nhận bàn giao và theo dõi mọi báo động từ xa.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, प्रस्थान के लिए प्रणोदन को ब्रिज कंट्रोल मोड में स्थानांतरित करें। हैंडओवर की पुष्टि करें और सभी रिमोट अलार्म की निगरानी करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง โปรดโอนการขับเคลื่อนไปโหมดควบคุมจากสะพานสำหรับออกจากท่า กรุณายืนยันการส่งมอบและเฝ้าระวังสัญญาณเตือนทั้งหมด
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, transfer propulsi ke mode kontrol jembatan untuk keberangkatan. Konfirmasi penyerahan dan pantau semua alarm jarak jauh.

terms.definition: An automatic or manual action that stops the engine to prevent damage or hazard when critical parameters exceed safe limits, as mandated by SOLAS and machinery safety systems.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge to engine room, engine safety shutdown activated due to low lube oil pressure. Investigate cause and report restoration steps.

termTranslations.th: การปิดเครื่องยนต์ด้วยระบบความปลอดภัย

usageTranslations.en: Bridge to engine room, engine safety shutdown activated due to low lube oil pressure. Investigate cause and report restoration steps.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüden makine dairesine, düşük yağ basıncı nedeniyle makine emniyet kapatması devreye girdi. Nedeni araştırın ve düzeltme adımlarını rapor edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle à salle des machines, arrêt sécurité moteur activé pour pression d'huile faible. Enquêtez et rapportez les actions correctives.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke an Maschinenraum, Motor-Sicherheitsabschaltung aktiviert wegen niedrigem Öldruck. Ursache prüfen und Abhilfeschritte melden.
usageTranslations.es: Puente a sala de máquinas, parada de seguridad activada por baja presión de aceite. Investigue y reporte acciones correctivas.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶台到机舱，由于润滑油压低，发动机安全停机已启动。查明原因并报告恢复措施。
usageTranslations.ar: الجسر إلى غرفة المحرك، تم تفعيل إيقاف المحرك لأسباب أمنية بسبب انخفاض ضغط زيت التزييت. تحقق وبلغ بالإجراءات التصحيحية.
usageTranslations.pt: Ponte para sala de máquinas, desligamento de segurança do motor ativado por baixa pressão de óleo. Investigue e reporte as ações.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик в машинное отделение, аварийная остановка двигателя из-за низкого давления масла. Выясните причину и доложите о мерах.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジから機関室へ。潤滑油圧低下によりエンジン安全停止が作動しました。原因調査と復旧手順を報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Plancia alla sala macchine, arresto sicurezza motore attivato per bassa pressione olio. Indagare e riferire azioni correttive.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu tới phòng máy, hệ thống ngắt động cơ an toàn kích hoạt do áp suất dầu thấp. Kiểm tra nguyên nhân và báo cáo giải pháp.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज से इंजन रूम, कम लुब्रिकेंट ऑयल प्रेशर के कारण सुरक्षा शटडाउन सक्रिय। कारण जांचें और सुधारात्मक कदम बताएं।
usageTranslations.th: สะพานถึงห้องเครื่อง ระบบปิดเครื่องยนต์ด้วยความปลอดภัยทำงานเนื่องจากแรงดันน้ำมันต่ำ กรุณาตรวจสอบและรายงานแนวทางแก้ไข
usageTranslations.id: Jembatan ke ruang mesin, shutdown keamanan mesin aktif karena tekanan oli rendah. Selidiki penyebab dan laporkan langkah pemulihan.

terms.definition: An operational procedure to verify the flow rate and performance efficiency of the lubricating or fuel oil centrifugal purifier under specified conditions, as per manufacturer and class requirements.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, please conduct purifier throughput test as per planned maintenance system and record all readings for class records.

termTranslations.ja: 清浄機スループット試験
termTranslations.vi: Kiểm Tra Lưu Lượng Máy Lọc
termTranslations.th: ทดสอบอัตราการไหลของเครื่องกรอง

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, please conduct purifier throughput test as per planned maintenance system and record all readings for class records.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, bakım planına göre saflaştırıcı kapasite testini gerçekleştirin ve tüm verileri klas kaydı için kaydedin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, effectuez le test de débit du purificateur selon le plan d’entretien et consignez toutes les mesures pour les dossiers de classe.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, führen Sie den Durchsatztest des Separators laut Wartungsplan durch und protokollieren Sie alle Werte für die Klassengesellschaft.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, realice la prueba de caudal del purificador según el plan de mantenimiento y registre las lecturas para la clase.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请根据维护计划执行净化器流量测试，并记录所有读数以供船级社查阅。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، أجر اختبار تدفق جهاز التنقية حسب خطة الصيانة وسجل جميع القراءات لسجلات التصنيف.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, realize o teste de vazão do purificador conforme o plano de manutenção e registre as leituras para classe.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, проведите тест производительности очистителя по плану обслуживания и внесите все показания в классный журнал.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、保守計画に従い清浄機スループット試験を実施し、全データをクラス記録用に記録してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, eseguite il test portata purificatore secondo il piano manutenzione e annotate tutti i dati per la classe.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, thực hiện kiểm tra lưu lượng máy lọc theo kế hoạch bảo trì và ghi nhận số liệu cho hồ sơ đăng kiểm.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, रखरखाव योजना के अनुसार प्यूरिफायर थ्रूपुट टेस्ट करें और सभी रीडिंग दर्ज करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง กรุณาทดสอบอัตราการไหลของเครื่องกรองตามแผนบำรุงรักษาและบันทึกข้อมูลสำหรับสมุดทะเบียนชั้นเรือ
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, lakukan tes kapasitas pemurni sesuai jadwal pemeliharaan dan catat semua hasilnya untuk catatan kelas.

terms.definition: Scheduled inspection, cleaning, and servicing of the engine turbocharger to ensure optimal performance and prevent breakdown, as per manufacturer’s recommendations and class rules.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, schedule turbocharger maintenance during port stay and ensure all spare parts and cleaning equipment are ready.

termTranslations.ja: ターボチャージャー整備
termTranslations.th: บำรุงรักษาเทอร์โบชาร์จเจอร์

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, schedule turbocharger maintenance during port stay and ensure all spare parts and cleaning equipment are ready.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, liman konaklamasında turbo bakımı planlayın ve tüm yedek parça ile temizlik ekipmanını hazırlayın.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, prévoyez l’entretien du turbocompresseur pendant l’escale et préparez toutes les pièces de rechange et le matériel de nettoyage.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, planen Sie die Turboladerwartung während des Hafenaufenthalts und stellen Sie alle Ersatzteile und Reinigungsgeräte bereit.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, programe el mantenimiento del turbo durante la estadía en puerto y asegure repuestos y equipos de limpieza.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请在靠港期间安排增压器维护，并备齐所有备件及清洁设备。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، جد صيانة الشاحن التوربيني أثناء التوقف بالميناء وجهز جميع قطع الغيار ومعدات التنظيف.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, programe a manutenção do turboalimentador na estadia no porto e providencie peças sobressalentes e equipamentos de limpeza.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, запланируйте обслуживание турбокомпрессора во время стоянки и подготовьте все запасные части и оборудование.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、港停泊中にターボチャージャー整備を予定し、全ての予備部品と清掃用具を準備してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, programmare la manutenzione del turbocompressore durante la sosta in porto e preparare tutti i ricambi e le attrezzature per la pulizia.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, lập kế hoạch bảo trì turbocharger khi tàu cập cảng và chuẩn bị đầy đủ phụ tùng, dụng cụ vệ sinh.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, बंदरगाह पर रुकने के दौरान टर्बोचार्जर रखरखाव शेड्यूल करें और सभी स्पेयर पार्ट्स व सफाई उपकरण तैयार रखें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง กำหนดบำรุงรักษาเทอร์โบชาร์จเจอร์ช่วงจอดเรือที่ท่า พร้อมเตรียมอะไหล่และอุปกรณ์ทำความสะอาด
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, jadwalkan perawatan turbocharger saat sandar di pelabuhan dan siapkan semua suku cadang serta alat pembersih.

terms.definition: A shipboard device that produces potable freshwater from seawater using evaporation and condensation, essential for crew and machinery needs, and subject to MARPOL and class guidelines.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, monitor freshwater generator output and log daily production in engine room records as required by class.

termTranslations.th: เครื่องผลิตน้ำจืด

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, monitor freshwater generator output and log daily production in engine room records as required by class.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, tatlı su jeneratörü çıkışını izleyin ve günlük üretimi klas gereği kaydedin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, surveillez la production du générateur d’eau douce et consignez la production quotidienne selon les exigences de classe.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, überwachen Sie die Leistung des Frischwassererzeugers und protokollieren Sie die Tagesproduktion für die Klasse.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, supervise la salida del generador de agua dulce y registre la producción diaria según los requisitos de clase.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请监控淡水发生器产水量，并按船级社要求记录每日产量。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، راقب إنتاج مولد المياه العذبة وسجل الإنتاج اليومي حسب متطلبات التصنيف.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, monitore a produção do gerador de água doce e registre a produção diária conforme exigido pela classe.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, следите за выходом опреснителя и ежедневно записывайте объем в журнал для класса.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、淡水製造装置の出力を監視し、クラス規定に従い日々の生産量を記録してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, monitorare la produzione del generatore acqua dolce e annotare la produzione giornaliera secondo classe.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, giám sát sản lượng máy tạo nước ngọt và ghi chép sản lượng hàng ngày theo quy định đăng kiểm.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, फ्रेशवॉटर जेनरेटर का आउटपुट मॉनिटर करें और दैनिक उत्पादन को रेकॉर्ड करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง ตรวจสอบการผลิตน้ำจืดของเครื่องผลิตน้ำจืดและบันทึกปริมาณที่ผลิตแต่ละวันตามข้อกำหนดของคลาส
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, pantau keluaran generator air tawar dan catat produksi harian sesuai ketentuan kelas.

terms.definition: A designated suction line and valve in the engine room bilge system used only in emergencies to rapidly remove water from flooded compartments, as required by SOLAS regulations.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, activate emergency bilge suction immediately and confirm water level is decreasing in flooded compartment.

termTranslations.vi: Hút Nước La Canh Khẩn Cấp
termTranslations.th: ดูดน้ำฉุกเฉินในบิลจ์

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, activate emergency bilge suction immediately and confirm water level is decreasing in flooded compartment.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, acil sintine emişini derhal başlatın ve su seviyesinin azaldığını teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, activez immédiatement l'aspiration de cale d'urgence et confirmez la baisse du niveau d'eau.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, Notlenzsaugung sofort aktivieren und bestätigen, dass der Wasserstand im überfluteten Abteil sinkt.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, active la succión de emergencia de sentina de inmediato y confirme que el nivel de agua baja.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请立即启动应急舱底吸水，并确认受淹舱室水位在下降。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، فعّل سحب الطوارئ للساندينة فوراً وتأكد من انخفاض منسوب المياه.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, ative a sucção de porão de emergência imediatamente e confirme que o nível de água está baixando.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, немедленно включите аварийное осушение трюмной воды и подтвердите снижение уровня воды в затопленном отсеке.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、非常用ビルジ吸引を直ちに作動させ、浸水区画の水位が下がっていることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, avviare immediatamente l'aspirazione sintina d'emergenza e confermare che il livello dell'acqua sta diminuendo.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, kích hoạt hút nước la canh khẩn cấp ngay và xác nhận mực nước trong khoang bị ngập đang giảm.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, आपातकालीन बिल्ज़ सक्शन तुरंत चालू करें और पुष्टि करें कि बाढ़ वाले कंपार्टमेंट में जल स्तर घट रहा है।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง โปรดเริ่มดูดน้ำฉุกเฉินในบิลจ์ทันที และยืนยันว่าระดับน้ำลดลงในช่องที่ถูกน้ำท่วม
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, aktifkan suction bilga darurat segera dan konfirmasi bahwa level air di kompartemen yang tergenang menurun.

terms.definition: An official document or database on board identifying all essential machinery whose failure would significantly affect vessel safety, navigation, or pollution prevention, maintained as per ISM and class rules.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Chief engineer, review the critical machinery list and ensure all items are checked and maintained before departure.

termTranslations.vi: Danh Sách Máy Móc Quan Trọng
termTranslations.th: รายชื่อเครื่องจักรสำคัญ

usageTranslations.en: Chief engineer, review the critical machinery list and ensure all items are checked and maintained before departure.
usageTranslations.tr: Başmühendis, kritik makine listesini gözden geçirin ve tüm ekipmanın kalkış öncesi kontrol edilip bakımının yapıldığından emin olun.
usageTranslations.fr: Chef mécanicien, vérifiez la liste des machines critiques et assurez-vous que tous les éléments sont contrôlés et entretenus avant le départ.
usageTranslations.de: Cheftechniker, überprüfen Sie die Liste kritischer Maschinen und stellen Sie sicher, dass alle Einheiten vor Abfahrt kontrolliert und gewartet sind.
usageTranslations.es: Jefe de máquinas, revise la lista de maquinaria crítica y asegúrese de que todos los elementos estén revisados y mantenidos antes de zarpar.
usageTranslations.zh: 轮机长，请检查关键机械清单，并确保所有项目在离港前都已检查和维护。
usageTranslations.ar: كبير المهندسين، راجع قائمة الآلات الحرجة وتأكد من فحص وصيانة جميع العناصر قبل المغادرة.
usageTranslations.pt: Chefe de máquinas, revise a lista de máquinas críticas e certifique-se de que todos os itens estão verificados e mantidos antes da partida.
usageTranslations.ru: Старший механик, проверьте список критически важных механизмов и убедитесь, что всё проверено и обслужено перед отходом.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関長、重要機器リストを確認し、出港前に全て点検・整備されていることを確かめてください。
usageTranslations.it: Capo macchinista, controlli l’elenco macchinari critici e verifichi che tutto sia stato mantenuto prima della partenza.
usageTranslations.vi: Kỹ sư trưởng, xem lại danh sách máy móc quan trọng và đảm bảo tất cả đã được kiểm tra, bảo trì trước khi rời bến.
usageTranslations.hi: मुख्य अभियंता, महत्वपूर्ण मशीनरी सूची की समीक्षा करें और सभी वस्तुओं की जांच व रखरखाव प्रस्थान से पहले कर लें।
usageTranslations.th: หัวหน้าวิศวกร โปรดตรวจสอบรายชื่อเครื่องจักรสำคัญและยืนยันว่าทุกเครื่องได้รับการดูแลก่อนออกเดินทาง
usageTranslations.id: Kepala teknisi, tinjau daftar mesin kritis dan pastikan semua item telah dicek dan dirawat sebelum keberangkatan.

terms.definition: A system allowing the operation and monitoring of shipboard machinery or equipment from a location other than the equipment itself, such as from the bridge or engine control room, compliant with SOLAS and class requirements.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge to engine room, confirm remote control system for main engine is operational and ready for maneuvering.

termTranslations.vi: Hệ Thống Điều Khiển Từ Xa
termTranslations.th: ระบบควบคุมระยะไกล

usageTranslations.en: Bridge to engine room, confirm remote control system for main engine is operational and ready for maneuvering.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüden makine dairesine, ana makine için uzaktan kumanda sisteminin çalışır ve manevraya hazır olduğunu teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle à salle des machines, confirmez que le système de contrôle à distance du moteur principal est opérationnel et prêt pour la manœuvre.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke an Maschinenraum, bestätigen Sie, dass das Fernsteuersystem für die Hauptmaschine betriebsbereit und manövrierfähig ist.
usageTranslations.es: Puente a sala de máquinas, confirme que el sistema de control remoto del motor principal está operativo y listo para maniobras.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶台到机舱，请确认主机远程控制系统可用，随时可进行操纵。
usageTranslations.ar: الجسر إلى غرفة المحرك، أكد أن نظام التحكم عن بعد للمحرك الرئيسي يعمل وجاهز للمناورة.
usageTranslations.pt: Ponte para sala de máquinas, confirme que o sistema de controle remoto do motor principal está operacional e pronto para manobra.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик в машинное отделение, подтвердите, что система дистанционного управления главным двигателем работает и готова к маневрированию.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジから機関室へ。主機遠隔制御システムが正常に作動し操船準備ができていることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Plancia alla sala macchine, confermate che il sistema di controllo remoto del motore principale è operativo e pronto alla manovra.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu tới phòng máy, xác nhận hệ thống điều khiển từ xa động cơ chính đã hoạt động và sẵn sàng cho thao tác.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज से इंजन रूम, मुख्य इंजन के लिए रिमोट कंट्रोल सिस्टम चालू और संचालन के लिए तैयार है इसकी पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: สะพานถึงห้องเครื่อง กรุณายืนยันว่าระบบควบคุมระยะไกลของเครื่องยนต์หลักทำงานและพร้อมสำหรับการควบคุม
usageTranslations.id: Jembatan ke ruang mesin, konfirmasi sistem kontrol jarak jauh mesin utama berfungsi dan siap untuk manuver.

terms.definition: A heat recovery unit using main engine exhaust gases to generate steam for shipboard heating or auxiliary systems, integral to energy management under MARPOL and SOLAS.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, monitor exhaust gas boiler temperature and pressure continuously during full engine load operations.

termTranslations.th: หม้อไอน้ำไอเสีย

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, monitor exhaust gas boiler temperature and pressure continuously during full engine load operations.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, tam yükte egzoz gazı kazanı sıcaklık ve basıncını sürekli izleyin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, surveillez en continu la température et la pression de la chaudière de gaz d'échappement pendant la pleine charge.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, überwachen Sie Temperatur und Druck des Abgaskessels bei Volllastbetrieb kontinuierlich.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, supervise continuamente la temperatura y presión de la caldera de gases de escape durante carga máxima.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请在发动机满载运行时持续监控废气锅炉温度和压力。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، راقب درجة حرارة وضغط غلاية غاز العادم باستمرار أثناء تشغيل المحرك بكامل الحمولة.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, monitore continuamente a temperatura e pressão da caldeira de gás de escape durante operação em plena carga.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, постоянно контролируйте температуру и давление котла утилизации при полной нагрузке.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、エンジン全負荷時に排ガスボイラーの温度と圧力を継続監視してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, monitorare costantemente temperatura e pressione della caldaia a gas di scarico durante pieno carico motore.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, liên tục giám sát nhiệt độ và áp suất nồi hơi khí thải khi động cơ chạy tải tối đa.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, पूर्ण लोड संचालन के दौरान एग्जॉस्ट गैस बॉयलर का तापमान और दबाव लगातार मॉनिटर करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง กรุณาตรวจสอบอุณหภูมิและความดันของหม้อไอน้ำไอเสียอย่างต่อเนื่องขณะเครื่องยนต์ทำงานเต็มกำลัง
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, pantau suhu dan tekanan boiler gas buang terus-menerus saat operasi beban penuh.

terms.definition: Fuel oil pressurized to high levels for injection into main engine cylinders, delivered by high-pressure pumps as specified by engine manufacturer and SOLAS for efficient combustion.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, check all high pressure fuel lines for leaks and ensure all connections are secure before starting the main engine.

termTranslations.th: น้ำมันเชื้อเพลิงแรงดันสูง

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, check all high pressure fuel lines for leaks and ensure all connections are secure before starting the main engine.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, ana makineyi çalıştırmadan önce tüm yüksek basınçlı yakıt hatlarında sızıntı olup olmadığını kontrol edin ve tüm bağlantıların sağlam olduğundan emin olun.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, vérifiez toutes les conduites de carburant haute pression pour détecter les fuites et assurez-vous que toutes les connexions sont sécurisées avant de démarrer le moteur principal.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, prüfen Sie alle Hochdruckkraftstoffleitungen auf Undichtigkeiten und stellen Sie sicher, dass alle Verbindungen vor Inbetriebnahme des Hauptmotors sicher sind.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, revise todas las líneas de combustible de alta presión por fugas y asegúrese de que todas las conexiones estén seguras antes de arrancar el motor principal.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，在启动主机前请检查所有高压燃油管路是否有泄漏，并确保所有连接都牢固。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، افحص جميع خطوط الوقود عالي الضغط بحثًا عن تسرب وتأكد من أن جميع الوصلات مؤمنة قبل تشغيل المحرك الرئيسي.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, verifique todos os dutos de combustível de alta pressão quanto a vazamentos e certifique-se de que todas as conexões estejam seguras antes de iniciar o motor principal.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, проверьте все магистрали высокого давления топлива на утечки и убедитесь, что все соединения надежны перед запуском главного двигателя.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、主機始動前に高圧燃料配管の漏れと接続の確実性を確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, controllare tutte le linee carburante alta pressione per perdite e assicurarsi che tutti i collegamenti siano sicuri prima di avviare il motore principale.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, kiểm tra tất cả các ống nhiên liệu áp suất cao có bị rò rỉ không và đảm bảo các kết nối an toàn trước khi khởi động động cơ chính.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, मुख्य इंजन शुरू करने से पहले सभी हाई प्रेशर फ्यूल लाइनों में लीकेज देखें और सभी कनेक्शन सुरक्षित करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง กรุณาตรวจสอบท่อน้ำมันเชื้อเพลิงแรงดันสูงทั้งหมดว่าไม่มีการรั่วซึมและทุกข้อต่อแน่นหนาก่อนสตาร์ทเครื่องยนต์หลัก
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, cek semua pipa bahan bakar tekanan tinggi dari kebocoran dan pastikan semua sambungan aman sebelum menyalakan mesin utama.

terms.definition: A heat exchanger that cools scavenge air supplied to main engine cylinders, increasing air density and engine efficiency as per engine manufacturer and class requirements.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, inspect scavenge air cooler for fouling and record differential pressure readings as per maintenance schedule.

termTranslations.vi: Bộ Làm Mát Không Khí Quét
termTranslations.th: เครื่องทำความเย็นอากาศสแกฟเวนจ์

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, inspect scavenge air cooler for fouling and record differential pressure readings as per maintenance schedule.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, tarama hava soğutucusunu kirlilik açısından kontrol edin ve basınç farkı ölçümlerini bakım planına göre kaydedin.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, contrôlez le refroidisseur d’air de balayage pour encrassement et consignez les pressions différentielles selon le plan de maintenance.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, prüfen Sie den Ladeluftkühler auf Verschmutzung und protokollieren Sie die Differenzdruckwerte laut Wartungsplan.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, revise el enfriador de aire de barrido por suciedad y registre la presión diferencial según el plan de mantenimiento.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请检查扫气空气冷却器有无污垢，并根据维护计划记录压差读数。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، افحص مبرد هواء المسح للاتساخ وسجل قراءات فرق الضغط حسب جدول الصيانة.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, inspecione o resfriador de ar de varredura quanto a sujeira e registre as leituras de pressão diferencial conforme o cronograma.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, проверьте охладитель наддувочного воздуха на загрязнения и зафиксируйте перепад давления согласно плану ТО.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、掃気空気冷却器の汚れを点検し、整備計画に従い差圧を記録してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, controllate il raffreddatore aria di lavaggio per incrostazioni e annotate le pressioni differenziali come da piano manutenzione.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, kiểm tra bộ làm mát không khí quét có bẩn không và ghi lại áp suất chênh lệch theo lịch bảo trì.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, स्कैवेंजर एयर कूलर में गंदगी जांचें और मेंटेनेंस शेड्यूल के अनुसार डिफरेंशियल प्रेशर दर्ज करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง กรุณาตรวจสอบเครื่องทำความเย็นอากาศสแกฟเวนจ์เรื่องคราบสกปรกและบันทึกค่าความดันต่างตามแผนบำรุงรักษา
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, periksa pendingin udara scavenge dari kotoran dan catat pembacaan tekanan diferensial sesuai jadwal pemeliharaan.

terms.definition: The controlled supply of lubricating oil to the main engine cylinder liners, essential for reducing friction and wear, as specified by engine manufacturer and class.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, check cylinder oil feed rate and adjust as needed according to engine load and manufacturer’s guidelines.

termTranslations.ja: シリンダーオイル供給
termTranslations.th: การจ่ายน้ำมันกระบอกสูบ

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, check cylinder oil feed rate and adjust as needed according to engine load and manufacturer’s guidelines.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, silindir yağ besleme oranını kontrol edin ve makine yüküne ve üretici talimatlarına göre ayarlayın.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, vérifiez le débit d’huile de cylindre et ajustez-le selon la charge moteur et les directives du fabricant.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, prüfen Sie die Zylinderöleinspeisung und passen Sie die Rate an Last und Herstellerangaben an.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, revise el caudal de aceite de cilindro y ajústelo según la carga y las pautas del fabricante.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请检查气缸润滑油供给量并根据载荷和制造商指导进行调整。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، تحقق من معدل تغذية زيت الأسطوانة وعدل حسب الحمل وتعليمات المصنع.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, verifique a taxa de alimentação de óleo do cilindro e ajuste conforme a carga e as diretrizes do fabricante.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, проверьте подачу масла к цилиндрам и при необходимости скорректируйте по нагрузке и инструкции производителя.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、シリンダーオイル供給量を確認し、負荷やメーカー指示に従い調整してください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, controllare la portata dell’olio cilindri e regolare secondo carico e istruzioni produttore.
usageTranslations.vi: Phòng máy, kiểm tra tốc độ cấp dầu xi lanh và điều chỉnh theo tải và hướng dẫn nhà sản xuất.
usageTranslations.hi: इंजन रूम, सिलेंडर ऑयल फीड रेट जांचें और आवश्यकतानुसार लोड व निर्माता निर्देश अनुसार समायोजित करें।
usageTranslations.th: ห้องเครื่อง ตรวจสอบอัตราการจ่ายน้ำมันกระบอกสูบและปรับตามภาระและคำแนะนำผู้ผลิต
usageTranslations.id: Ruang mesin, cek laju pemasukan oli silinder dan sesuaikan sesuai beban dan panduan pabrikan.

terms.definition: The primary electrical distribution panel on board controlling power supply to all vital systems and equipment, designed and operated per class and SOLAS rules.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bridge to engine room, monitor main switchboard panel for overload alarms and ensure all breakers are set for departure.

termTranslations.th: แผงสวิตช์บอร์ดหลัก

usageTranslations.en: Bridge to engine room, monitor main switchboard panel for overload alarms and ensure all breakers are set for departure.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprüden makine dairesine, ana dağıtım panosunu aşırı yük alarmlarına karşı izleyin ve çıkış için tüm şalterlerin ayarlandığından emin olun.
usageTranslations.fr: Passerelle à salle des machines, surveillez le tableau principal pour les alarmes de surcharge et assurez-vous que tous les disjoncteurs sont prêts pour le départ.
usageTranslations.de: Brücke an Maschinenraum, überwachen Sie die Hauptschalttafel auf Überlastalarme und stellen Sie sicher, dass alle Sicherungen für die Abfahrt eingestellt sind.
usageTranslations.es: Puente a sala de máquinas, supervise el cuadro principal por alarmas de sobrecarga y asegure que todos los interruptores estén listos para la salida.
usageTranslations.zh: 驾驶台到机舱，请监控主配电板的过载报警，并确保所有断路器已为启航设置好。
usageTranslations.ar: الجسر إلى غرفة المحرك، راقب لوحة التوزيع الرئيسية بحثًا عن إنذارات التحميل الزائد وتأكد من ضبط جميع القواطع للمغادرة.
usageTranslations.pt: Ponte para sala de máquinas, monitore o painel principal para alarmes de sobrecarga e garanta que todos os disjuntores estejam ajustados para a partida.
usageTranslations.ru: Мостик в машинное отделение, следите за главным щитом на предмет перегрузки и убедитесь, что все автоматы готовы к отходу.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジから機関室へ。主配電盤で過負荷警報を監視し、全てのブレーカーが出港用にセットされていることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Plancia alla sala macchine, controllare il quadro principale per sovraccarico e verificare che tutti gli interruttori siano pronti per la partenza.
usageTranslations.vi: Cầu tới phòng máy, giám sát bảng phân phối chính tránh báo động quá tải và đảm bảo tất cả cầu dao đã sẵn sàng xuất bến.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज से इंजन रूम, मुख्य स्विचबोर्ड पैनल पर ओवरलोड अलार्म देखें और सभी ब्रेकर प्रस्थान के लिए सेट करें।
usageTranslations.th: สะพานถึงห้องเครื่อง กรุณาตรวจสอบแผงสวิตช์บอร์ดหลักเรื่องสัญญาณเตือนเกินโหลดและตั้งเบรกเกอร์ให้พร้อมออกเดินทาง
usageTranslations.id: Jembatan ke ruang mesin, pantau panel saklar utama untuk alarm kelebihan beban dan pastikan semua pemutus siap untuk keberangkatan.

terms.definition: The assigned period when crew are stationed in the engine room to monitor, operate, and respond to machinery and alarms, in accordance with SOLAS and engine room management procedures.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Chief engineer, confirm engine room watch is maintained at all times and that logs are updated every hour.

termTranslations.th: เวรห้องเครื่อง

usageTranslations.en: Chief engineer, confirm engine room watch is maintained at all times and that logs are updated every hour.
usageTranslations.tr: Başmühendis, makine dairesi vardiyasının her zaman tutulduğunu ve kayıtların her saat güncellendiğini teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Chef mécanicien, confirmez que le quart salle des machines est assuré en permanence et que les registres sont mis à jour toutes les heures.
usageTranslations.de: Cheftechniker, bestätigen Sie, dass die Maschinenraumwache durchgehend besetzt ist und Protokolle stündlich aktualisiert werden.
usageTranslations.es: Jefe de máquinas, confirme que la guardia de sala de máquinas se mantiene siempre y que los registros se actualizan cada hora.
usageTranslations.zh: 轮机长，请确认机舱值班始终有人在岗，且日志每小时更新一次。
usageTranslations.ar: كبير المهندسين، أكد أن مراقبة غرفة المحركات مستمرة وأن السجلات تحدث كل ساعة.
usageTranslations.pt: Chefe de máquinas, confirme que a vigia da casa de máquinas é mantida sempre e que os registros são atualizados a cada hora.
usageTranslations.ru: Старший механик, подтвердите, что вахта машинного отделения несётся постоянно и журналы обновляются каждый час.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関長、機関室ワッチが常時維持されていること、記録が毎時更新されていることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Capo macchinista, confermi che la guardia sala macchine è sempre attiva e i registri aggiornati ogni ora.
usageTranslations.vi: Kỹ sư trưởng, xác nhận ca trực phòng máy luôn được duy trì và nhật ký cập nhật mỗi giờ.
usageTranslations.hi: मुख्य अभियंता, पुष्टि करें कि इंजन रूम वॉच हर समय कायम है और लॉग हर घंटे अपडेट हो रहे हैं।
usageTranslations.th: หัวหน้าวิศวกร โปรดยืนยันว่าเวรห้องเครื่องมีตลอดเวลาและมีการอัปเดตบันทึกทุกชั่วโมง
usageTranslations.id: Kepala teknisi, pastikan jaga ruang mesin selalu ada dan log diperbarui setiap jam.

terms.definition: A large pressure vessel that stores compressed air for main engine starting and other critical pneumatic systems, maintained as per SOLAS and class standards.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Engine room, check main air receiver pressure and drain condensate before main engine start.

termTranslations.th: ถังเก็บลมหลัก

usageTranslations.en: Engine room, check main air receiver pressure and drain condensate before main engine start.
usageTranslations.tr: Makine dairesi, ana hava tüplerinin basıncını kontrol edin ve ana makineyi çalıştırmadan önce yoğuşmayı boşaltın.
usageTranslations.fr: Salle des machines, vérifiez la pression du réservoir principal d’air et purgez la condensation avant le démarrage du moteur principal.
usageTranslations.de: Maschinenraum, prüfen Sie den Druck des Hauptluftbehälters und lassen Sie Kondensat vor dem Start des Hauptmotors ab.
usageTranslations.es: Sala de máquinas, revise la presión de la botella principal de aire y drene el condensado antes de arrancar el motor principal.
usageTranslations.zh: 机舱，请检查主气瓶压力，并在启动主机前排放冷凝水。
usageTranslations.ar: غرفة المحرك، افحص ضغط خزان الهواء الرئيسي وافرغ التكثف قبل بدء تشغيل المحرك الرئيسي.
usageTranslations.pt: Sala de máquinas, verifique a pressão do reservatório principal de ar e drene o condensado antes de iniciar o motor principal.
usageTranslations.ru: Машинное отделение, проверьте давление главного воздухосборника и слейте конденсат перед запуском главного двигателя.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関室、主エアレシーバーの圧力を確認し、主機始動前にドレン抜きをしてください。
usageTranslations.it: Sala macchine, controllare la pressione del serbatoio aria principale e scaricare la condensa prima di avviare il motore principale.
