usageTranslations.ja: ガス検知パネルを常時監視し、機関室や貨物倉で可燃性ガスが検知された場合はブリッジにアラームを出してください。
usageTranslations.it: Monitorare continuamente il pannello rilevazione gas e dare l’allarme alla plancia se viene rilevato gas infiammabile in sala macchine o nei vani carico.
usageTranslations.vi: Giám sát bảng báo khí gas liên tục, báo động về cầu tàu nếu phát hiện khí dễ cháy trong buồng máy hoặc khoang hàng.
usageTranslations.hi: गैस डिटेक्शन पैनल को लगातार मॉनिटर करें और अगर इंजन कक्ष या कार्गो स्थानों में ज्वलनशील गैस का पता चले तो ब्रिज पर अलार्म दें।
usageTranslations.th: ตรวจสอบแผงตรวจจับก๊าซอย่างต่อเนื่องและแจ้งเตือนสะพานทันทีหากตรวจพบก๊าซไวไฟในห้องเครื่องยนต์หรือช่องสินค้า
usageTranslations.id: Pantau panel deteksi gas secara terus-menerus dan nyalakan alarm ke anjungan jika terdeteksi gas mudah terbakar di ruang mesin atau ruang kargo.

terms.definition: An automatic mode setting on the ballast pump, enabling the pump to start and stop based on tank level sensors or a central control system.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Set ballast pump to auto mode and verify it cycles correctly according to ballast tank level signals during cargo operations.

termTranslations.th: ปั๊มบาลาสต์อัตโนมัติ

usageTranslations.en: Set ballast pump to auto mode and verify it cycles correctly according to ballast tank level signals during cargo operations.
usageTranslations.tr: Balast pompasını otomatik moda alın ve yük operasyonları sırasında balast tankı seviye sinyallerine göre düzgün çalıştığını doğrulayın.
usageTranslations.fr: Réglez la pompe de ballast en mode automatique et vérifiez qu’elle fonctionne correctement selon les signaux de niveau du réservoir de ballast lors des opérations de cargaison.
usageTranslations.de: Stellen Sie die Ballastpumpe auf Automatik und prüfen Sie, ob sie sich entsprechend den Tanksignalen während der Ladeoperationen korrekt einschaltet.
usageTranslations.es: Configure la bomba de lastre en modo automático y verifique que funcione correctamente según las señales de nivel del tanque durante operaciones de carga.
usageTranslations.zh: 将压载泵设置为自动模式，并在货物作业期间根据压载舱液位信号验证其循环是否正常。
usageTranslations.ar: اضبط مضخة الصابورة على الوضع التلقائي وتحقق من أنها تعمل بشكل صحيح وفقًا لإشارات مستوى خزان الصابورة أثناء عمليات الشحن.
usageTranslations.pt: Coloque a bomba de lastro em modo automático e verifique se ela opera corretamente conforme os sinais de nível do tanque durante operações de carga.
usageTranslations.ru: Установите балластный насос в автоматический режим и проверьте его работу по сигналам уровня балластных танков во время грузовых операций.
usageTranslations.ja: バラストポンプを自動モードに設定し、貨物作業中バラストタンクのレベル信号に従って正しく作動するか確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Impostare la pompa zavorra su automatico e verificare che cicli correttamente secondo i segnali di livello durante le operazioni di carico.
usageTranslations.vi: Đặt bơm ballast về chế độ tự động và kiểm tra nó vận hành đúng theo tín hiệu mức bồn ballast khi làm hàng.
usageTranslations.hi: बैलास्ट पंप को ऑटो मोड पर सेट करें और यह टैंक लेवल सिग्नलों के अनुसार सही तरीके से चल रहा है या नहीं यह जांचें।
usageTranslations.th: ตั้งปั๊มบาลาสต์ให้อยู่ในโหมดอัตโนมัติและตรวจสอบว่าทำงานถูกต้องตามสัญญาณระดับถังระหว่างปฏิบัติงานขนถ่ายสินค้า
usageTranslations.id: Setel pompa ballast ke mode otomatis dan pastikan ia bekerja sesuai sinyal level tank saat operasi kargo.

terms.definition: A unit designed to heat thermal oil used as a medium for transferring heat to fuel tanks, cargo systems, or other shipboard processes.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Start the thermal oil heater before cargo loading to bring fuel tank temperatures to operational level and monitor outlet temperature closely.

termTranslations.ja: サーマルオイルヒーター
termTranslations.th: ฮีตเตอร์น้ำมันความร้อนสูง

usageTranslations.en: Start the thermal oil heater before cargo loading to bring fuel tank temperatures to operational level and monitor outlet temperature closely.
usageTranslations.tr: Yüklemeden önce termal yağ ısıtıcıyı başlatın, yakıt tankı sıcaklığını operasyonel seviyeye getirin ve çıkış sıcaklığını yakından izleyin.
usageTranslations.fr: Démarrez le chauffe-huile thermique avant le chargement pour amener la température des réservoirs à un niveau opérationnel et surveillez de près la température de sortie.
usageTranslations.de: Starten Sie das Thermoöl-Heizgerät vor der Beladung, um die Tanktemperaturen auf Betrieb zu bringen und überwachen Sie die Ausgangstemperatur genau.
usageTranslations.es: Arranque el calentador de aceite térmico antes de la carga para llevar los tanques de combustible a la temperatura operativa y vigile atentamente la temperatura de salida.
usageTranslations.zh: 在装货前启动导热油加热器，将油舱温度升至工作水平，并密切监控出口温度。
usageTranslations.ar: قم بتشغيل مسخن الزيت الحراري قبل تحميل الشحنة لرفع درجات حرارة خزانات الوقود إلى المستوى التشغيلي وراقب درجة حرارة المخرج عن كثب.
usageTranslations.pt: Ligue o aquecedor de óleo térmico antes do carregamento para elevar a temperatura dos tanques de combustível ao nível operacional e monitore a temperatura de saída de perto.
usageTranslations.ru: Запустите нагреватель термического масла до начала загрузки, чтобы довести температуру топливных танков до рабочего уровня, и внимательно следите за температурой выхода.
usageTranslations.ja: 荷役前にサーマルオイルヒーターを起動し、燃料タンクの温度を運転レベルまで上げ、出口温度を厳重に監視してください。
usageTranslations.it: Avviare il riscaldatore olio termico prima del carico per portare la temperatura dei serbatoi a livello operativo e monitorare attentamente la temperatura di uscita.
usageTranslations.vi: Khởi động lò đun dầu nhiệt trước khi bốc dỡ hàng để làm nóng nhiệt độ bồn nhiên liệu và giám sát sát sao nhiệt độ đầu ra.
usageTranslations.hi: कार्गो लोडिंग से पहले थर्मल ऑयल हीटर चालू करें ताकि फ्यूल टैंक तापमान ऑपरेशनल स्तर तक पहुंच जाए और आउटलेट तापमान की निगरानी करें।
usageTranslations.th: เปิดฮีตเตอร์น้ำมันความร้อนสูงก่อนขนถ่ายสินค้าเพื่อนำอุณหภูมิถังน้ำมันไปสู่ระดับปฏิบัติงานและตรวจสอบอุณหภูมิขาออกอย่างใกล้ชิด
usageTranslations.id: Nyalakan pemanas minyak termal sebelum pemuatan kargo untuk menaikkan suhu tangki bahan bakar ke tingkat operasional dan pantau suhu keluarannya dengan saksama.

terms.definition: An instrument that displays key operational parameters of the main engine, such as load, RPM, and cylinder pressures, aiding performance monitoring.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Monitor main engine indicator for abnormal cylinder pressure or load readings and report to the bridge if limits are exceeded.

termTranslations.th: ตัวชี้วัดเครื่องยนต์หลัก

usageTranslations.en: Monitor main engine indicator for abnormal cylinder pressure or load readings and report to the bridge if limits are exceeded.
usageTranslations.tr: Ana makine göstergesini izleyin; silindir basıncı veya yük değerlerinde anormallik varsa ve limitler aşılırsa köprüye rapor edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Surveillez l’indicateur du moteur principal pour toute pression de cylindre ou charge anormale et signalez à la passerelle si les limites sont dépassées.
usageTranslations.de: Überwachen Sie die Hauptmaschinenanzeige auf ungewöhnliche Zylinderdrücke oder Lastanzeigen und melden Sie Abweichungen an die Brücke.
usageTranslations.es: Supervise el indicador de motor principal por presiones anómalas de cilindros o lecturas de carga y reporte al puente si se exceden los límites.
usageTranslations.zh: 监控主机指示器，发现气缸压力或负载读数异常且超限时报告驾驶台。
usageTranslations.ar: راقب مؤشر المحرك الرئيسي لأية قراءات غير طبيعية في ضغط الأسطوانة أو الحمل وأبلغ الجسر إذا تم تجاوز الحدود.
usageTranslations.pt: Monitore o indicador do motor principal para pressões anormais de cilindro ou leituras de carga e relate à ponte se os limites forem excedidos.
usageTranslations.ru: Следите за индикатором главного двигателя, при превышении давления или нагрузки сообщайте на мостик.
usageTranslations.ja: 主機インジケータで異常なシリンダー圧や負荷を監視し、限度を超えた場合はブリッジに報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Monitorare l’indicatore del motore principale per pressioni anomale o carichi fuori limite e segnalare subito alla plancia.
usageTranslations.vi: Theo dõi chỉ báo động cơ chính về áp suất hoặc tải xi lanh bất thường, nếu vượt giới hạn phải báo về cầu tàu.
usageTranslations.hi: मेन इंजन इंडिकेटर पर सिलेंडर प्रेशर या लोड की असामान्य रीडिंग देखें और लिमिट से अधिक हो तो ब्रिज को रिपोर्ट करें।
usageTranslations.th: ตรวจสอบตัวชี้วัดเครื่องยนต์หลักเพื่อหาค่าความดันกระบอกสูบหรือโหลดผิดปกติและรายงานสะพานหากเกินขีดจำกัด
usageTranslations.id: Pantau indikator mesin utama untuk tekanan silinder atau beban abnormal dan laporkan ke anjungan jika melebihi batas.

terms.definition: A seacock or valve fitted at the hull sea chest, controlling seawater intake for engine cooling, ballast, or firefighting.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Chief engineer, close sea chest valve and report to the bridge before hull maintenance divers enter the water.

termTranslations.th: วาล์วตู้ทะเล

usageTranslations.en: Chief engineer, close sea chest valve and report to the bridge before hull maintenance divers enter the water.
usageTranslations.tr: Başmühendis, gövde bakım dalgıçları suya girmeden önce deniz sandığı vanasını kapatın ve köprüye rapor edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Chef mécanicien, fermez la vanne de coffre de mer et signalez à la passerelle avant l’entrée des plongeurs de maintenance de coque dans l’eau.
usageTranslations.de: Chief Engineer, schließen Sie das Seewasserkastenventil und melden Sie dies an die Brücke, bevor Wartungstaucher ins Wasser gehen.
usageTranslations.es: Jefe de máquinas, cierre la válvula de cofre de mar y avise al puente antes de que los buzos de mantenimiento ingresen al agua.
usageTranslations.zh: 轮机长，请在船体维护潜水员入水前关闭海底阀并向驾驶台报告。
usageTranslations.ar: رئيس المهندسين، أغلق صمام صندوق البحر وأبلغ الجسر قبل دخول غواصي صيانة الهيكل إلى الماء.
usageTranslations.pt: Chefe de máquinas, feche a válvula do caixa mar e informe à ponte antes que os mergulhadores de manutenção do casco entrem na água.
usageTranslations.ru: Старший механик, закройте клапан морского короба и доложите на мостик до выхода водолазов для обслуживания корпуса.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関長、船体整備ダイバーが入水する前にシーチェストバルブを閉めてブリッジへ報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Capo macchinista, chiudere la valvola pozzetto mare e avvisare la plancia prima che i sub entrino in acqua per manutenzione scafo.
usageTranslations.vi: Kỹ sư trưởng, đóng van khoang biển và báo về cầu tàu trước khi thợ lặn bảo dưỡng thân tàu xuống nước.
usageTranslations.hi: मुख्य अभियंता, हुल मेंटेनेंस डाइवर्स के पानी में उतरने से पहले सी चेस्ट वाल्व बंद करें और ब्रिज को रिपोर्ट करें।
usageTranslations.th: วิศวกรใหญ่ ปิดวาล์วตู้ทะเลและแจ้งสะพานก่อนนักประดาน้ำซ่อมบำรุงตัวเรือลงน้ำ
usageTranslations.id: Chief engineer, tutup katup sea chest dan laporkan ke anjungan sebelum penyelam pemeliharaan lambung turun ke air.

terms.definition: A compartment at the bottom of the ship, between the inner and outer hull, used for ballast water, fuel, or as a safety measure against grounding.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Sound all double bottom tanks and record levels in the ballast log before departure; report any discrepancies to the chief officer.

termTranslations.th: ถังดับเบิลบอททอม

usageTranslations.en: Sound all double bottom tanks and record levels in the ballast log before departure; report any discrepancies to the chief officer.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm çift dip tanklarını ölçün, kalkış öncesi balast defterine seviyeleri kaydedin ve herhangi bir uyumsuzluğu baş zabite rapor edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Jaugez tous les réservoirs double fond et consignez les niveaux dans le journal de ballast avant le départ ; signalez toute anomalie au premier officier.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Doppelbodentanks loten und Füllstände vor Abfahrt ins Ballastbuch eintragen; Unstimmigkeiten an den Ersten Offizier melden.
usageTranslations.es: Sondee todos los tanques de doble fondo y registre los niveles en el libro de lastre antes de zarpar; informe cualquier discrepancia al primer oficial.
usageTranslations.zh: 在离港前测量所有双底舱并将液位记录在压载日志中，发现异常报告大副。
usageTranslations.ar: اختبر جميع خزانات القاع المزدوج وسجل المستويات في سجل الصابورة قبل المغادرة وأبلغ الضابط الأول عن أي تناقضات.
usageTranslations.pt: Sonde todos os tanques de fundo duplo e registre os níveis no diário de lastro antes da partida; relate discrepâncias ao imediato.
usageTranslations.ru: Промерьте все танки двойного дна, запишите уровни в балластный журнал до выхода, и сообщите о несоответствиях старшему помощнику.
usageTranslations.ja: 出港前にすべてのダブルボトムタンクの深さを測り、バラストログに記録し、不一致があればチーフオフィサーに報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Misurare tutti i serbatoi doppio fondo, annotare i livelli nel registro ballast prima della partenza e segnalare eventuali discrepanze al primo ufficiale.
usageTranslations.vi: Đo mực nước tất cả các bồn đáy kép, ghi lại vào sổ ballast trước khi rời cảng và báo cáo sai lệch cho sỹ quan trưởng.
usageTranslations.hi: डबल बॉटम टैंक को चेक करें, प्रस्थान से पहले बैलास्ट लॉग में स्तर दर्ज करें और किसी भी गड़बड़ी की रिपोर्ट मुख्य अधिकारी को करें।
usageTranslations.th: วัดระดับถังดับเบิลบอททอมทุกถังก่อนออกเรือและบันทึกในสมุดบาลาสต์ แจ้งเจ้าหน้าที่ประจำเรือหากมีความผิดปกติ
usageTranslations.id: Ukur semua tangki double bottom dan catat level di log ballast sebelum keberangkatan; laporkan ketidaksesuaian ke chief officer.

terms.definition: An electronic device used to measure and control oil content in discharged water, ensuring compliance with MARPOL and pollution prevention standards.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Monitor oil discharge monitor during bilge pumping and ensure oil content remains within legal limits. Log all readings for inspection.

termTranslations.th: เครื่องมอนิเตอร์การปล่อยน้ำมัน

usageTranslations.en: Monitor oil discharge monitor during bilge pumping and ensure oil content remains within legal limits. Log all readings for inspection.
usageTranslations.tr: Sintine pompalaması sırasında yağ deşarj monitörünü izleyin, yağ içeriğinin yasal sınırlar içinde kaldığından emin olun ve tüm değerleri denetim için kaydedin.
usageTranslations.fr: Surveillez le moniteur de rejet d’huile pendant le pompage des cales et assurez-vous que la teneur en huile reste dans les limites légales. Consignez toutes les lectures pour inspection.
usageTranslations.de: Überwachen Sie beim Lenzen den Ölabgabemonitor und stellen Sie sicher, dass der Ölgehalt innerhalb der gesetzlichen Grenzen bleibt. Alle Werte für Inspektionen protokollieren.
usageTranslations.es: Supervise el monitor de descarga de aceite durante el bombeo de sentina y asegúrese de que el contenido de aceite permanezca dentro de los límites legales. Registre todas las lecturas para inspección.
usageTranslations.zh: 在舱底水泵送过程中监控油排放监测器，确保油含量在法律允许范围内，并记录所有读数以备检查。
usageTranslations.ar: راقب جهاز مراقبة تصريف الزيت أثناء ضخ مياه الآسن وتأكد من أن محتوى الزيت ضمن الحدود القانونية. سجل جميع القراءات للفحص.
usageTranslations.pt: Monitore o monitor de descarga de óleo durante o bombeamento de porão e garanta que o teor de óleo permaneça dentro dos limites legais. Registre todas as leituras para inspeção.
usageTranslations.ru: Контролируйте монитор выброса нефти при откачке трюмных вод и следите, чтобы содержание нефти не превышало установленные нормы. Записывайте все данные для проверки.
usageTranslations.ja: ビルジ排出中はオイル放出モニターを監視し、油分が法定限度内であることを確認し、すべての記録を保管してください。
usageTranslations.it: Monitorare il monitor scarico olio durante il pompaggio sentina e assicurarsi che il contenuto d’olio sia entro i limiti legali. Registrare tutte le letture per le ispezioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Giám sát bộ giám sát xả dầu khi bơm nước sentin, đảm bảo nồng độ dầu nằm trong giới hạn hợp pháp và ghi lại mọi số liệu để kiểm tra.
usageTranslations.hi: बिल्ज पंपिंग के दौरान ऑयल डिस्चार्ज मॉनिटर की निगरानी करें और सुनिश्चित करें कि ऑयल कंटेंट कानूनी सीमा में रहे। सभी रीडिंग निरीक्षण के लिए दर्ज करें।
usageTranslations.th: ตรวจสอบเครื่องมอนิเตอร์การปล่อยน้ำมันระหว่างสูบน้ำบิลจ์และตรวจสอบให้แน่ใจว่าปริมาณน้ำมันอยู่ในขอบเขตที่กฎหมายกำหนดและบันทึกข้อมูลสำหรับการตรวจสอบ
usageTranslations.id: Pantau monitor pembuangan minyak saat pemompaan bilge dan pastikan kadar minyak tetap dalam batas hukum. Catat semua pembacaan untuk inspeksi.

terms.definition: A pressurized tank in a ship’s fresh water system that maintains constant water pressure for domestic and service use throughout the vessel.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Check hydrophore pressure tank readings every watch and report to the bridge if pressure drops below minimum safe value.

termTranslations.ja: ハイドロフォア圧力タンク
termTranslations.th: ถังแรงดันไฮโดรโฟร์

usageTranslations.en: Check hydrophore pressure tank readings every watch and report to the bridge if pressure drops below minimum safe value.
usageTranslations.tr: Her vardiyada hidrofor basınç tankı değerlerini kontrol edin ve basınç minimum güvenli seviyenin altına düşerse köprüye rapor edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Vérifiez les lectures du réservoir de pression hydrophore à chaque quart et signalez à la passerelle si la pression chute sous la valeur minimale de sécurité.
usageTranslations.de: Überprüfen Sie bei jeder Wache die Werte des Hydrophor-Drucktanks und melden Sie es der Brücke, wenn der Druck unter den minimalen Sicherheitswert fällt.
usageTranslations.es: Revise las lecturas del tanque de presión hidrofor cada guardia e informe al puente si la presión cae por debajo del valor mínimo seguro.
usageTranslations.zh: 每班检查稳压水罐读数，如压力低于最低安全值请报告驾驶台。
usageTranslations.ar: افحص قراءات خزان ضغط الهيدروفور في كل نوبة وبلغ الجسر إذا انخفض الضغط عن الحد الأدنى الآمن.
usageTranslations.pt: Verifique as leituras do tanque de pressão hidrofórico a cada ronda e informe a ponte se a pressão cair abaixo do mínimo seguro.
usageTranslations.ru: Проверяйте показания гидрофорного бака давления на каждой вахте и сообщайте на мостик, если давление падает ниже безопасного минимума.
usageTranslations.ja: 各当直ごとにハイドロフォア圧力タンクの値を確認し、圧力が最低安全値を下回った場合はブリッジに報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: Controllare le letture del serbatoio pressione idroforo a ogni turno e segnalare alla plancia se la pressione scende sotto il minimo di sicurezza.
usageTranslations.vi: Kiểm tra đồng hồ bình áp lực hydrophore mỗi ca và báo về cầu tàu nếu áp suất xuống dưới mức an toàn tối thiểu.
usageTranslations.hi: हर वॉच में हाइड्रोफोर प्रेशर टैंक रीडिंग चेक करें और अगर प्रेशर न्यूनतम सुरक्षित मान से नीचे जाए तो ब्रिज को रिपोर्ट करें।
usageTranslations.th: ตรวจสอบค่าถังแรงดันไฮโดรโฟร์ทุกเวรและแจ้งสะพานหากแรงดันต่ำกว่าค่าปลอดภัยขั้นต่ำ
usageTranslations.id: Periksa pembacaan tangki tekanan hidrofor setiap jaga dan laporkan ke anjungan jika tekanan turun di bawah batas aman minimum.

terms.definition: The control and monitoring of burner operations on marine boilers to ensure safe and efficient ignition, combustion, and shut-down sequences.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Check boiler burner management system status before lighting off and during shut-down, confirming all safety interlocks and alarms are operational.

termTranslations.ja: ボイラーバーナー管理
termTranslations.vi: Quản Lý Đầu Đốt Lò Hơi
termTranslations.th: การจัดการหัวเผาหม้อน้ำ

usageTranslations.en: Check boiler burner management system status before lighting off and during shut-down, confirming all safety interlocks and alarms are operational.
usageTranslations.tr: Ateşleme ve kapatma öncesi kazan brülör yönetim sistemi durumunu kontrol edin; tüm güvenlik kilitlerinin ve alarmların çalışır olduğunu doğrulayın.
usageTranslations.fr: Vérifiez l’état du système de gestion du brûleur de chaudière avant l’allumage et l’arrêt, en confirmant que tous les verrouillages de sécurité et alarmes sont opérationnels.
usageTranslations.de: Überprüfen Sie den Status der Kesselbrennersteuerung vor dem Anzünden und beim Abschalten und bestätigen Sie, dass alle Sicherheitsschaltungen und Alarme funktionieren.
usageTranslations.es: Verifique el estado del sistema de gestión del quemador de caldera antes del encendido y durante el apagado, asegurando que todas las interbloqueos y alarmas de seguridad funcionen.
usageTranslations.zh: 在点火和关闭锅炉前后检查燃烧器管理系统状态，确保所有安全联锁和报警正常工作。
usageTranslations.ar: تحقق من حالة نظام إدارة موقد المرجل قبل التشغيل والإغلاق وتأكد من أن جميع أدوات القفل والإنذارات تعمل.
usageTranslations.pt: Verifique o status do sistema de gestão do queimador da caldeira antes da ignição e durante o desligamento, confirmando que todos os intertravamentos e alarmes de segurança estão operacionais.
usageTranslations.ru: Проверьте состояние системы управления горелкой котла до и после розжига, убедитесь, что все блокировки и сигналы тревоги работают.
usageTranslations.ja: 点火前および停止時にボイラーバーナー管理システムの状態を確認し、すべての安全インターロックとアラームが作動していることを確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Verificare lo stato del sistema gestione bruciatore caldaia prima dell’accensione e durante lo spegnimento, confermando che tutti i blocchi di sicurezza e gli allarmi sono operativi.
usageTranslations.vi: Kiểm tra trạng thái hệ thống quản lý đầu đốt lò hơi trước khi đốt và khi tắt, đảm bảo các khóa an toàn và báo động hoạt động tốt.
usageTranslations.hi: बॉयलर जलाने और बंद करने से पहले बर्नर प्रबंधन सिस्टम की स्थिति जांचें और सभी सुरक्षा इंटरलॉक और अलार्म ऑपरेशनल हैं यह सुनिश्चित करें।
usageTranslations.th: ตรวจสอบสถานะระบบจัดการหัวเผาหม้อน้ำก่อนจุดไฟและขณะปิดเครื่อง ตรวจสอบอุปกรณ์ล็อกนิรภัยและสัญญาณเตือนทั้งหมดให้อยู่ในสภาพพร้อมใช้งาน
usageTranslations.id: Periksa status sistem manajemen burner boiler sebelum menyalakan dan saat mematikan, pastikan semua pengaman dan alarm berfungsi.

terms.definition: A distress message transmitted by a vessel or station on behalf of another vessel, aircraft, or person in grave and imminent danger when the original station is unable to send it.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, all stations, this is MV Horizon relaying distress for FV Coral, position five four degrees two zero decimal zero minutes north zero zero three degrees one five decimal zero minutes west, vessel sinking, immediate assistance required.

termTranslations.th: Mayday Relay

usageTranslations.en: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, all stations, this is MV Horizon relaying distress for FV Coral, position 54°20.0′ N 003°15.0′ W, vessel sinking, immediate assistance required.
usageTranslations.tr: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, tüm istasyonlar, burada MV Horizon, FV Coral gemisi adına tehlike çağrısı aktarıyor, pozisyon 54°20.0′ K 003°15.0′ B, gemi batıyor, acil yardım gerekli.
usageTranslations.fr: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, toutes stations, ici MV Horizon relaie la détresse pour FV Coral, position 54°20.0′ N 003°15.0′ O, navire en train de couler, assistance immédiate requise.
usageTranslations.de: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, alle Stationen, hier ist MV Horizon, der einen Notruf für FV Coral weiterleitet, Position 54°20.0′ N 003°15.0′ W, Schiff sinkt, sofortige Hilfe erforderlich.
usageTranslations.es: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, todas las estaciones, aquí MV Horizon retransmite socorro para FV Coral, posición 54°20.0′ N 003°15.0′ O, buque hundiéndose, asistencia inmediata requerida.
usageTranslations.zh: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay，各台注意，这里是 MV Horizon，代 FV Coral 转发遇险信息，位置北纬54°20.0′ 西经003°15.0′，船舶下沉，立即需要救援。
usageTranslations.ar: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay، جميع المحطات، هنا MV Horizon ينقل نداء استغاثة عن FV Coral، الموقع 54°20.0′ شمال 003°15.0′ غرب، السفينة تغرق، المساعدة الفورية مطلوبة.
usageTranslations.pt: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, todas as estações, aqui é o MV Horizon retransmitindo socorro para o FV Coral, posição 54°20.0′ N 003°15.0′ O, navio afundando, assistência imediata necessária.
usageTranslations.ru: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, всем станциям, здесь MV Horizon передаёт сигнал бедствия за FV Coral, позиция 54°20.0′ N 003°15.0′ W, судно тонет, требуется немедленная помощь.
usageTranslations.ja: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay、全局、こちらMV Horizon、FV Coralの救難信号を中継、位置54°20.0′北 003°15.0′西、船が沈没中、至急援助求む。
usageTranslations.it: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, a tutte le stazioni, qui è MV Horizon che inoltra il messaggio di soccorso per FV Coral, posizione 54°20.0′ N 003°15.0′ O, nave affonda, necessaria assistenza immediata.
usageTranslations.vi: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, tất cả các trạm, đây là MV Horizon chuyển tiếp báo nạn cho FV Coral, vị trí 54°20.0′ B 003°15.0′ T, tàu đang chìm, cần trợ giúp khẩn cấp.
usageTranslations.hi: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, सभी स्टेशनों, यहाँ MV Horizon FV Coral के लिए संकट संदेश प्रेषित कर रहा है, स्थिति 54°20.0′ उ 003°15.0′ प, जहाज डूब रहा है, तत्काल सहायता आवश्यक।
usageTranslations.th: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, ทุกสถานี, ที่นี่คือ MV Horizon ส่งต่อสัญญาณขอความช่วยเหลือให้ FV Coral, ตำแหน่ง 54°20.0′ N 003°15.0′ W, เรือกำลังจม ต้องการความช่วยเหลือด่วน
usageTranslations.id: Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, Mayday Relay, semua stasiun, di sini MV Horizon meneruskan panggilan darurat untuk FV Coral, posisi 54°20.0′ U 003°15.0′ B, kapal tenggelam, bantuan segera diperlukan.

terms.definition: Notification that the selected VHF working channel is congested with traffic, making immediate communication difficult.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Vessel Cape Star, this is Port Control; channel one-six is busy, remain on standby and wait for further instructions.

termTranslations.th: ช่องสัญญาณไม่ว่าง

usageTranslations.en: Vessel Cape Star, this is Port Control; channel 16 is busy, remain on standby and wait for further instructions.
usageTranslations.tr: Cape Star gemisi, burası Liman Kontrol; kanal 16 meşgul, beklemede kalın ve talimatları bekleyin.
usageTranslations.fr: Navire Cape Star, ici Port Control ; le canal 16 est occupé, restez en veille et attendez d'autres instructions.
usageTranslations.de: Schiff Cape Star, hier Hafenaufsicht; Kanal 16 ist belegt, bleiben Sie auf Stand-by und warten Sie weitere Anweisungen ab.
usageTranslations.es: Buque Cape Star, aquí Control de Puerto; el canal 16 está ocupado, permanezca a la escucha y espere más instrucciones.
usageTranslations.zh: Cape Star 轮，港口管制呼叫；16 频道繁忙，请待机并等待进一步指示。
usageTranslations.ar: السفينة Cape Star، هنا مراقبة الميناء؛ القناة 16 مشغولة، ابقَ في وضع الاستعداد وانتظر التعليمات الإضافية.
usageTranslations.pt: Navio Cape Star, aqui é o Controle do Porto; o canal 16 está ocupado, mantenha-se em espera e aguarde novas instruções.
usageTranslations.ru: Судно Cape Star, это Порт-контроль; канал 16 занят, оставайтесь на приёме и ждите дальнейших указаний.
usageTranslations.ja: 船舶 Cape Star、こちらポートコントロール。チャンネル16は混雑中。待機して次の指示を待ってください。
usageTranslations.it: Nave Cape Star, qui Controllo Porto; il canale 16 è occupato, rimanete in ascolto e attendete ulteriori istruzioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu Cape Star, đây là Cảng vụ; kênh 16 đang bận, giữ chế độ standby và chờ hướng dẫn tiếp theo.
usageTranslations.hi: पोत Cape Star, यहाँ पोर्ट कंट्रोल; चैनल 16 व्यस्त है, स्टैंड-बाय पर रहें और आगे के निर्देशों की प्रतीक्षा करें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือ Cape Star, ที่นี่ควบคุมท่าเรือ; ช่อง 16 ไม่ว่าง โปรดรอในโหมดสแตนด์บายและรอคำสั่งต่อไป
usageTranslations.id: Kapal Cape Star, di sini Kontrol Pelabuhan; kanal 16 sedang sibuk, tetap siaga dan tunggu instruksi selanjutnya.

terms.definition: Instruction to make more way through the water to meet traffic, tidal, or berth scheduling requirements.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Tanker Silver Wave, increase speed to ten knots to meet the tidal window; report when making way over ground.

termTranslations.ja: 速力を上げてください
termTranslations.th: เพิ่มความเร็วของคุณ

usageTranslations.en: Tanker Silver Wave, increase speed to 10 knots to meet the tidal window; report when making way over ground.
usageTranslations.tr: Silver Wave tankerine sesleniyorum, akıntı penceresini yakalamak için hızı 10 knot'a çıkarın; harekete geçtiğinizde rapor verin.
usageTranslations.fr: Tanker Silver Wave, augmentez votre vitesse à 10 nœuds pour respecter la fenêtre de marée ; signalez quand vous serez en route.
usageTranslations.de: Tanker Silver Wave, Geschwindigkeit auf 10 Knoten erhöhen, um das Tidenfenster einzuhalten; melden Sie, sobald Fahrt durchs Wasser gemacht wird.
usageTranslations.es: Petrolero Silver Wave, aumente su velocidad a 10 nudos para aprovechar la ventana de marea; informe cuando esté haciendo andar sobre el fondo.
usageTranslations.zh: 油船 Silver Wave，请加速至10节以赶上潮汐窗口；开始前进时报告。
usageTranslations.ar: الناقلة Silver Wave، زد سرعتك إلى 10 عقد لتلائم نافذة المد؛ أبلغ عندما تبدأ الحركة الفعلية.
usageTranslations.pt: Petroleiro Silver Wave, aumente a velocidade para 10 nós para aproveitar a janela de maré; reporte quando estiver fazendo avanço real.
usageTranslations.ru: Танкер Silver Wave, увеличьте скорость до 10 узлов, чтобы успеть в приливное окно; доложите, когда начнёте движение.
usageTranslations.ja: タンカー Silver Wave、潮汐ウィンドウに合わせて速力を10ノットに上げてください。前進を開始したら報告を。
usageTranslations.it: Tank Silver Wave, aumenti la velocità a 10 nodi per rispettare la finestra di marea; riferisca quando sarà in movimento.
usageTranslations.vi: Tanker Silver Wave, tăng tốc lên 10 kn để kịp cửa thủy triều; báo cáo khi bắt đầu di chuyển.
usageTranslations.hi: टैंकर Silver Wave, ज्वार के समय सीमा को पाने के लिए गति 10 नॉट करें; गति पकड़ने पर रिपोर्ट करें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือบรรทุกน้ำมัน Silver Wave, เพิ่มความเร็วเป็น 10 นอตเพื่อให้ทันช่วงน้ำขึ้น; รายงานเมื่อเริ่มเคลื่อนที่
usageTranslations.id: Tanker Silver Wave, tingkatkan kecepatan ke 10 knot untuk menyesuaikan jendela pasang; laporkan saat mulai bergerak.

terms.definition: Statement indicating that the vessel, aircraft, or rescue unit has arrived at the position of an incident or casualty.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Rescue helicopter Alpha, Coastguard; I am on scene over the liferaft with seven survivors, commencing winching operations.

termTranslations.th: อยู่ในพื้นที่เกิดเหตุ

usageTranslations.en: Rescue helicopter Alpha, Coastguard; I am on scene over the liferaft with seven survivors, commencing winching operations.
usageTranslations.tr: Kurtarma helikopteri Alpha, Sahil Güvenlik; sal üstünde yedi kazazede ile olay yerindeyim, vinç operasyonuna başlıyorum.
usageTranslations.fr: Hélicoptère de secours Alpha, Garde-côtes ; je suis sur zone au-dessus du radeau avec sept survivants, début treuillage.
usageTranslations.de: Rettungshubschrauber Alpha, Küstenwache; ich bin am Einsatzort über dem Rettungsfloß mit sieben Überlebenden, beginne Windenbetrieb.
usageTranslations.es: Helicóptero de rescate Alpha, Guardia Costera; estoy en la escena sobre la balsa salvavidas con siete supervivientes, inicio izado.
usageTranslations.zh: 救援直升机 Alpha，海岸警卫；我已在救生筏上方现场，发现七名幸存者，开始吊运作业。
usageTranslations.ar: طائرة الإنقاذ Alpha، خفر السواحل؛ أنا في الموقع فوق طوف النجاة مع سبعة ناجين، أبدأ عمليات الرفع.
usageTranslations.pt: Helicóptero de resgate Alpha, Guarda Costeira; estou no local sobre a balsa salva-vidas com sete sobreviventes, iniciando içamento.
usageTranslations.ru: Спасательный вертолёт Alpha, Береговая охрана; нахожусь на месте над плотом с семью выжившими, начинаю подъём.
usageTranslations.ja: 救助ヘリ Alpha、沿岸警備隊。救命いかだ上空の現場に到着、7名生存者確認、ウインチ作業を開始する。
usageTranslations.it: Elicottero di soccorso Alpha, Guardia Costiera; sono sul posto sopra la zattera con sette superstiti, inizio le operazioni di verricello.
usageTranslations.vi: Trực thăng cứu hộ Alpha, Cảnh sát biển; tôi đã có mặt tại hiện trường trên bè cứu sinh với bảy người sống sót, bắt đầu cẩu.
usageTranslations.hi: राहत हेलीकॉप्टर Alpha, कोस्टगार्ड; मैं सात जीवितों वाले लाइफराफ्ट के ऊपर घटनास्थल पर हूँ, विंचिंग शुरू कर रहा हूँ।
usageTranslations.th: เฮลิคอปเตอร์กู้ภัย Alpha, หน่วยยามฝั่ง; ฉันอยู่เหนือแพชูชีพที่มีผู้รอดชีวิต 7 คน ณ จุดเกิดเหตุ กำลังเริ่มปฏิบัติการยก
usageTranslations.id: Helikopter penyelamat Alpha, Penjaga Pantai; saya telah berada di lokasi di atas rakit dengan tujuh penyintas, memulai operasi winch.

terms.definition: Order authorising a vessel to continue its original voyage after a temporary stop, alteration, or holding pattern.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Pilot Launch, Harbour Master; traffic clear ahead, you may resume passage to the pilot station, maintain eight knots until abeam buoy Alfa.

termTranslations.ja: 航行を再開してください
termTranslations.th: ดำเนินการเดินเรือต่อ

usageTranslations.en: Pilot Launch, Harbour Master; traffic clear ahead, you may resume passage to the pilot station, maintain 8 knots until abeam buoy Alfa.
usageTranslations.tr: Pilot botu, Liman Başkanı; önünüzde trafik yok, pilot istasyonuna seyre devam edebilirsiniz, Alfa şamandırasına abeam olana dek 8 knot hız koruyun.
usageTranslations.fr: Pilotine, Capitainerie ; trafic dégagé devant, vous pouvez reprendre la route vers la station pilote, maintenez 8 nœuds jusqu'à l'abri de la bouée Alfa.
usageTranslations.de: Lotsenboot, Hafenmeister; voraus freie Fahrt, Fahrt zur Lotsenstation fortsetzen, bis querab Tonne Alfa 8 Knoten halten.
usageTranslations.es: Lancha de práctico, Capitán de Puerto; sin tráfico por proa, puede reanudar su ruta hacia la estación de prácticos, mantenga 8 nudos hasta la boya Alfa por la amura.
usageTranslations.zh: 引航艇，港务长呼叫；前方无交通，可继续驶向引航站，至阿尔法浮标横过前保持 8 节。
usageTranslations.ar: زورق الإرشاد، رئيس الميناء؛ لا توجد حركة أمامك، يمكنك استئناف الإبحار إلى محطة المرشدين، حافظ على 8 عقد حتى تكون بمحاذاة العوامة ألفا.
usageTranslations.pt: Lancha-piloto, Capitão do Porto; tráfego livre à frente, retome a rota para a estação de práticos, mantenha 8 nós até a boia Alfa por través.
usageTranslations.ru: Лоцманский катер, капитан порта; впереди свободно, возобновите переход к лоцманской станции, держите 8 узлов до траверза буя Альфа.
usageTranslations.ja: パイロットランチ、ハーバーマスター。前方にトラフィックなし、パイロットステーションまで航行を再開してよし。ブイ Alfa を横切るまで 8 ノットを維持。
usageTranslations.it: Pilotina, Capitaneria; traffico libero a prora, può riprendere la navigazione verso la stazione piloti, mantenga 8 nodi fino al traverso della boa Alfa.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu hoa tiêu, cảng vụ; phía trước không có tàu, tiếp tục hành trình đến trạm hoa tiêu, giữ 8 kn đến ngang phao Alfa.
usageTranslations.hi: पायलट लांच, हार्बर मास्टर; आगे यातायात साफ है, आप पायलट स्टेशन तक यात्रा जारी रख सकते हैं, बुआ अल्फा के बराबर आने तक 8 नॉट गति रखें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือลากนำร่อง, หัวหน้าท่าเรือ; ข้างหน้าไม่มีการจราจร สามารถดำเนินการต่อไปยังสถานีไกด์ได้ รักษาความเร็ว 8 นอตจนถึงทุ่น Alfa
usageTranslations.id: Kapal pandu, Kepala Pelabuhan; lalu lintas di depan bersih, lanjutkan pelayaran ke stasiun pandu, pertahankan 8 knot hingga sejajar buoy Alfa.

terms.definition: Notification that the navigating bridge watch is monitoring the working channel and ready to respond immediately.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Harbour Pilot, this is container vessel Aurora; bridge standing by on channel one-three for boarding instructions.

termTranslations.th: สะพานบังคับการรอคำสั่ง

usageTranslations.en: Harbour Pilot, this is container vessel Aurora; bridge standing by on channel 13 for boarding instructions.
usageTranslations.tr: Liman Pilotu, burası konteyner gemisi Aurora; kanal 13'te köprüüstü dinlemede, biniş talimatlarını bekliyor.
usageTranslations.fr: Pilote du port, ici porte-conteneurs Aurora ; passerelle en veille sur le canal 13 pour instructions d'embarquement.
usageTranslations.de: Hafenlotse, hier Containerschiff Aurora; Brücke in Bereitschaft auf Kanal 13 für Einschiffungsanweisungen.
usageTranslations.es: Práctico, aquí el portacontenedores Aurora; puente a la escucha en el canal 13 para instrucciones de embarque.
usageTranslations.zh: 港口引航员，这里是集装箱船 Aurora；驾驶台守听 13 频道，等待登轮指令。
usageTranslations.ar: مرشد الميناء، هنا سفينة الحاويات Aurora؛ الجسر متأهب على القناة 13 لتعليمات الصعود.
usageTranslations.pt: Prático, aqui navio porta-contentores Aurora; ponte em espera no canal 13 para instruções de embarque.
usageTranslations.ru: Портовый лоцман, это контейнеровоз Aurora; мостик на связи на канале 13, ожидаем указаний по посадке.
usageTranslations.ja: ハーバーパイロット、こちらコンテナ船 Aurora。チャンネル13でブリッジ待機中、乗船指示を待ちます。
usageTranslations.it: Pilota di porto, qui portacontainer Aurora; plancia in ascolto sul canale 13 per istruzioni d'imbarco.
usageTranslations.vi: Hoa tiêu cảng, đây là tàu container Aurora; buồng lái sẵn sàng trên kênh 13 chờ hướng dẫn lên tàu.
usageTranslations.hi: हार्बर पायलट, यहाँ कंटेनर पोत Aurora; बोर्डिंग निर्देशों हेतु चैनल 13 पर ब्रिज तैयार है।
usageTranslations.th: นักนำร่องท่าเรือ, นี่คือเรือคอนเทนเนอร์ Aurora; สะพานบังคับการรอรับคำสั่งบนช่อง 13
usageTranslations.id: Pilot pelabuhan, di sini kapal kontainer Aurora; anjungan siaga di kanal 13 menunggu instruksi naik kapal.

terms.definition: Repeated radio noise or overlapping transmissions that degrade VHF communication quality on the working channel.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All stations, Port Control reports frequent interference on channel one-two; vessels bound inbound switch to channel one-four to avoid congestion.

termTranslations.th: สัญญาณรบกวนบ่อย

usageTranslations.en: All stations, Port Control reports frequent interference on channel 12; vessels inbound switch to channel 14 to avoid congestion.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm istasyonlar, Liman Kontrol kanal 12'de sık sık parazit bildiriyor; limana giriş yapan gemiler yoğunluğu önlemek için kanal 14'e geçsin.
usageTranslations.fr: Toutes stations, Port Control signale un brouillage fréquent sur le canal 12 ; les navires entrants passent au canal 14 pour éviter la congestion.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Stationen, Hafenaufsicht meldet häufige Störungen auf Kanal 12; einlaufende Schiffe wechseln auf Kanal 14, um Überlastung zu vermeiden.
usageTranslations.es: Todas las estaciones, Control de Puerto informa interferencia frecuente en el canal 12; los buques entrantes cambien al canal 14 para evitar congestión.
usageTranslations.zh: 各台注意，港口管制报告 12 频道频繁干扰；进港船舶改用 14 频道以减轻拥堵。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع المحطات، مراقبة الميناء تبلغ عن تشويش متكرر على القناة 12؛ السفن الداخلة تتحول إلى القناة 14 لتجنب الازدحام.
usageTranslations.pt: Todas as estações, Controle do Porto relata interferência frequente no canal 12; navios entrando passem ao canal 14 para evitar congestionamento.
usageTranslations.ru: Всем станциям, порт-контроль сообщает частые помехи на канале 12; входящие суда перейдите на канал 14 во избежание перегрузки.
usageTranslations.ja: 全局、ポートコントロールより通報。チャンネル12で頻繁な混信発生。入港船は混雑回避のためチャンネル14へ変更せよ。
usageTranslations.it: Tutte le stazioni, il Controllo Porto segnala interferenze frequenti sul canale 12; le navi in ingresso passino al canale 14 per evitare congestione.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả trạm, Cảng vụ báo nhiễu liên tục kênh 12; tàu vào cảng chuyển sang kênh 14 để tránh tắc nghẽn.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी स्टेशन, पोर्ट कंट्रोल द्वारा सूचित किया गया है कि चैनल 12 पर बार-बार हस्तक्षेप हो रहा है; आगमनशील पोत भीड़ से बचने के लिए चैनल 14 पर जाएँ।
usageTranslations.th: ทุกสถานี, ควบคุมท่าเรือรายงานสัญญาณรบกวนบ่อยครั้งที่ช่อง 12; เรือขาเข้าควรเปลี่ยนไปช่อง 14 เพื่อลดความแออัด
usageTranslations.id: Semua stasiun, Kontrol Pelabuhan melaporkan gangguan sering pada kanal 12; kapal masuk dialihkan ke kanal 14 untuk menghindari kemacetan.

terms.definition: Collective term for the movement of vessels and craft within port limits as monitored by VTS or Harbour Master.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Harbour Traffic, this is tanker Baltic Star at buoy Delta, requesting clearance to shift berth to oil terminal two, over.

termTranslations.th: การจราจรท่าเรือ

usageTranslations.en: Harbour Traffic, this is tanker Baltic Star at buoy Delta, requesting clearance to shift berth to oil terminal two, over.
usageTranslations.tr: Liman Trafiği, burası tanker Baltic Star, Delta şamandırasında, petrol terminali 2'ye yanaşmak için izin talep ediyorum, tamam.
usageTranslations.fr: Trafic portuaire, ici le pétrolier Baltic Star à la bouée Delta, demande autorisation de changer d'accostage vers le terminal pétrolier deux, terminé.
usageTranslations.de: Hafenverkehr, hier Tanker Baltic Star an Tonne Delta, erbitte Freigabe zum Verholen an Ölpier zwei, kommen.
usageTranslations.es: Tráfico de puerto, aquí petrolero Baltic Star en la boya Delta, solicita autorización para trasladarse al terminal petrolero dos, cambio.
usageTranslations.zh: 港口交通，这里是油船 Baltic Star，在 Delta 浮标，请求许可移泊至 2 号油码头，完毕。
usageTranslations.ar: حركة الميناء، هنا الناقلة Baltic Star عند عوامة Delta، أطلب تصريحاً للانتقال إلى الرصيف النفطي رقم 2، انتهى.
usageTranslations.pt: Tráfego de porto, aqui é o petroleiro Baltic Star na boia Delta, solicita autorização para deslocar-se ao terminal de petróleo dois, câmbio.
usageTranslations.ru: Портовое движение, это танкер Baltic Star у буя Delta, прошу разрешение перейти к нефтяному терминалу два, приём.
usageTranslations.ja: 港内交通、こちらタンカー Baltic Star、ブイ Delta 位置。石油ターミナル2へ移動許可を要請、どうぞ。
usageTranslations.it: Traffico portuale, qui petroliera Baltic Star alla boa Delta, richiedo autorizzazione per spostarmi all'oleodotto due, passo.
usageTranslations.vi: Giao thông cảng, đây là tàu chở dầu Baltic Star tại phao Delta, xin phép chuyển cầu cập sang bến dầu số 2, trả lời.
usageTranslations.hi: हार्बर ट्रैफिक, यहाँ टैंकर Baltic Star, बुआ डेल्टा पर; ऑयल टर्मिनल दो पर स्थानांतरित होने की अनुमति चाहता हूँ, ओवर।
usageTranslations.th: การจราจรท่าเรือ, นี่คือเรือน้ำมัน Baltic Star ที่ทุ่น Delta ขออนุญาตย้ายเทียบที่ท่าเทียบเรือน้ำมันสอง จบ
usageTranslations.id: Lalu lintas pelabuhan, di sini tanker Baltic Star di buoy Delta, meminta izin pindah sandar ke terminal minyak dua, over.

terms.definition: Request for a vessel to state its planned manoeuvre, course, or operational actions to aid traffic coordination.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Cargo vessel Orion, traffic dense ahead; advise intentions for passing tug cluster at buoy Charlie.

termTranslations.ja: 意図を知らせてください
termTranslations.th: แจ้งเจตนาของคุณ

usageTranslations.en: Cargo vessel Orion, traffic dense ahead; advise intentions for passing tug cluster at buoy Charlie.
usageTranslations.tr: Yük gemisi Orion, önünüzde yoğun trafik; Charlie şamandırasındaki römorkör grubunu geçme niyetinizi bildiriniz.
usageTranslations.fr: Navire cargo Orion, trafic dense devant vous ; indiquez vos intentions pour dépasser le groupe de remorqueurs à la bouée Charlie.
usageTranslations.de: Frachter Orion, dichter Verkehr voraus; geben Sie Ihre Absichten an, die Schleppergruppe an Tonne Charlie zu passieren.
usageTranslations.es: Buque de carga Orion, tráfico denso por proa; indique sus intenciones para adelantar al grupo de remolcadores en la boya Charlie.
usageTranslations.zh: 货船 Orion，前方交通密集；请告知通过 Charlie 浮标拖船群的意图。
usageTranslations.ar: سفينة الشحن Orion، حركة كثيفة أمامك؛ أبلغ نواياك لعبور مجموعة القاطرات عند عوامة Charlie.
usageTranslations.pt: Navio cargueiro Orion, tráfego denso à frente; informe suas intenções para ultrapassar o conjunto de rebocadores na boia Charlie.
usageTranslations.ru: Грузовое судно Orion, впереди плотное движение; сообщите свои намерения при проходе группы буксиров у буя Charlie.
usageTranslations.ja: 貨物船 Orion、前方混雑。ブイ Charlie のタグ集団を追い越す意図を知らせてください。
usageTranslations.it: Nave da carico Orion, traffico intenso a prora; comunichi le sue intenzioni per sorpassare il gruppo rimorchiatori alla boa Charlie.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu hàng Orion, phía trước đông phương tiện; cho biết ý định vượt cụm tàu kéo tại phao Charlie.
usageTranslations.hi: कार्गो पोत Orion, आगे घना ट्रैफ़िक है; बुआ Charlie पर टग समूह को पार करने का आपका इरादा बताएं।
usageTranslations.th: เรือบรรทุกสินค้า Orion, ข้างหน้ามีการจราจรหนาแน่น; กรุณาแจ้งเจตนาของคุณในการผ่านกลุ่มเรือลากจูงที่ทุ่น Charlie
usageTranslations.id: Kapal kargo Orion, lalu lintas padat di depan; sampaikan niat Anda untuk melewati kumpulan tunda di buoy Charlie.

terms.definition: An instruction for a vessel to yield in order to avoid collision and allow another vessel to pass as per the COLREGS.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Container vessel Atlantic Star, this is Pilot Launch Bravo: you are required to give way to the outbound tanker at buoy Delta, over.

termTranslations.th: ให้ทาง

usageTranslations.en: Container vessel Atlantic Star, this is Pilot Launch Bravo: you are required to give way to the outbound tanker at buoy Delta, over.
usageTranslations.tr: Konteyner gemisi Atlantic Star, burası Pilot Bot Bravo: Delta şamandırasındaki çıkış yapan tankere yol vermeniz gerekmektedir, tamam.
usageTranslations.fr: Navire porte-conteneurs Atlantic Star, ici Pilotine Bravo : vous devez céder le passage au pétrolier sortant à la bouée Delta, terminé.
usageTranslations.de: Containerschiff Atlantic Star, hier ist Lotsenboot Bravo: Sie müssen dem auslaufenden Tanker an Tonne Delta Wegerecht gewähren, kommen.
usageTranslations.es: Buque portacontenedores Atlantic Star, aquí Lanchón Piloto Bravo: debe ceder el paso al petrolero que sale en la boya Delta, cambio.
usageTranslations.zh: 集装箱船 Atlantic Star，这里是引航艇 Bravo：请在 Delta 浮标处让路给出港油轮，完毕。
usageTranslations.ar: سفينة الحاويات Atlantic Star، هنا زورق الإرشاد برافو: يجب عليك إعطاء الطريق لناقلة النفط المغادرة عند عوامة دلتا، انتهى.
usageTranslations.pt: Navio porta-contêineres Atlantic Star, aqui é a Lancha Piloto Bravo: deve dar passagem ao petroleiro saindo na boia Delta, câmbio.
usageTranslations.ru: Контейнеровоз Atlantic Star, это лоцманский катер Браво: уступите дорогу выходящему танкеру у буя Дельта, приём.
usageTranslations.ja: コンテナ船 Atlantic Star、こちらパイロットランチ Bravo。デルタブイ付近で出港タンカーに道を譲ってください、どうぞ。
usageTranslations.it: Nave portacontainer Atlantic Star, qui Pilotina Bravo: dovete dare precedenza alla petroliera in uscita alla boa Delta, passo.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu container Atlantic Star, đây là tàu hoa tiêu Bravo: bạn phải nhường đường cho tàu dầu rời bến tại phao Delta, trả lời.
usageTranslations.hi: कंटेनर पोत Atlantic Star, यहाँ पायलट लॉन्च ब्रावो: आपको डेल्टा बुआ पर बाहर जा रहे टैंकर को रास्ता देना होगा, ओवर।
usageTranslations.th: เรือคอนเทนเนอร์ Atlantic Star, ที่นี่คือเรือลากนำร่อง Bravo: คุณต้องให้ทางเรือน้ำมันขาออกที่ทุ่น Delta, จบการส่ง
usageTranslations.id: Kapal peti kemas Atlantic Star, di sini Pilot Launch Bravo: Anda harus memberi jalan kepada tanker keluar di buoy Delta, over.

terms.definition: The operation of preparing, passing, securing, and tending mooring lines to assist in berthing or unberthing a vessel.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Forward station, prepare for line handling; pass head line ashore as soon as we are within heaving distance.

termTranslations.th: การจัดการเชือก

usageTranslations.en: Forward station, prepare for line handling; pass head line ashore as soon as we are within heaving distance.
usageTranslations.tr: Baş istasyon, halat işlemleri için hazırlanın; baş halatı kıyıya atma mesafesine gelince gönderin.
usageTranslations.fr: Poste avant, préparez-vous à la manutention des amarres ; passez l'amarre d'étrave à quai dès que possible.
usageTranslations.de: Vorderstation, Leinenarbeit vorbereiten; Kopfleine an Land geben, sobald wir in Wurfweite sind.
usageTranslations.es: Estación de proa, prepárese para maniobra de cabos; pase el cabo de proa a tierra en cuanto estemos a distancia.
usageTranslations.zh: 前部站点，准备缆绳操作；一到抛掷距离即抛头缆上岸。
usageTranslations.ar: الموقع الأمامي، استعد لمناولة الحبال؛ مرر الحبل الرئيسي إلى الشاطئ بمجرد أن نكون ضمن مسافة الرمي.
usageTranslations.pt: Estação de proa, prepare para manobra de cabos; passe o cabo de proa para terra assim que estivermos à distância.
usageTranslations.ru: Носовой пост, готовьтесь к работе с концами; подавайте головной конец на берег, как только будем на бросковой дистанции.
usageTranslations.ja: 前方ステーション、係留索取扱い準備。投げ入れ可能な距離でヘッドラインを陸へ渡してください。
usageTranslations.it: Postazione di prua, prepararsi al maneggio cavi; passare il cavo di prua a terra appena siamo a distanza.
usageTranslations.vi: Trạm mũi, chuẩn bị xử lý dây buộc; chuyển dây đầu tàu lên bờ ngay khi đến gần đủ khoảng cách.
usageTranslations.hi: फॉरवर्ड स्टेशन, लाइन संचालन के लिए तैयार रहें; जैसे ही फेंकने की दूरी पर आएं, हेड लाइन किनारे भेजें।
usageTranslations.th: สถานีหัวเรือ เตรียมจัดการเชือก ส่งเชือกหัวเรือไปฝั่งเมื่ออยู่ในระยะโยน
usageTranslations.id: Posisi depan, siapkan penanganan tali; lempar tali kepala ke darat segera setelah dalam jarak lempar.

terms.definition: Notification that a vessel has just crossed or gone abeam of a specified position, buoy, or waypoint.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: VTS Dover, this is ferry Ocean Queen: position passed South Goodwin buoy at zero eight three five UTC, proceeding northbound.

termTranslations.th: ผ่านตำแหน่งแล้ว

usageTranslations.en: VTS Dover, this is ferry Ocean Queen: position passed South Goodwin buoy at 0835 UTC, proceeding northbound.
usageTranslations.tr: VTS Dover, burada Ocean Queen feribotu: 08:35 UTC'de South Goodwin şamandırasını geçtik, kuzeye devam ediyoruz.
usageTranslations.fr: VTS Douvres, ici ferry Ocean Queen : position franchie bouée South Goodwin à 08h35 UTC, cap au nord.
usageTranslations.de: VTS Dover, hier Fähre Ocean Queen: Position South Goodwin Tonne um 0835 UTC passiert, Kurs Nord.
usageTranslations.es: VTS Dover, aquí ferry Ocean Queen: posición pasada boya South Goodwin a las 08:35 UTC, procediendo al norte.
usageTranslations.zh: 多佛VTS，这里是渡轮Ocean Queen：08:35 UTC已通过South Goodwin浮标，正北行驶。
usageTranslations.ar: VTS دوفر، هنا العبارة Ocean Queen: تم تجاوز عوامة South Goodwin الساعة 08:35 UTC، متجه شمالاً.
usageTranslations.pt: VTS Dover, aqui é o ferry Ocean Queen: posição passada a bóia South Goodwin às 08:35 UTC, seguindo ao norte.
usageTranslations.ru: VTS Дувр, это паром Ocean Queen: позиция пройдена у буя South Goodwin в 08:35 UTC, следуем на север.
usageTranslations.ja: VTSドーバー、こちらフェリーOcean Queen。08:35 UTCにSouth Goodwinブイを通過、北行き航行中。
usageTranslations.it: VTS Dover, qui il traghetto Ocean Queen: posizione superata alla boa South Goodwin alle 08:35 UTC, proseguiamo verso nord.
usageTranslations.vi: VTS Dover, đây là phà Ocean Queen: đã qua phao South Goodwin lúc 08:35 UTC, tiếp tục đi về phía bắc.
usageTranslations.hi: VTS डोवर, यहाँ फेरी Ocean Queen: 08:35 UTC पर South Goodwin बुआ पार किया, उत्तर की ओर बढ़ रहे हैं।
usageTranslations.th: VTS Dover, นี่คือเรือเฟอร์รี่ Ocean Queen: ผ่านทุ่น South Goodwin เมื่อ 08:35 UTC กำลังมุ่งหน้าทางเหนือ
usageTranslations.id: VTS Dover, di sini feri Ocean Queen: posisi South Goodwin buoy telah dilewati pukul 08:35 UTC, melanjutkan ke utara.

terms.definition: Instruction to switch VHF radio communications from one designated channel to another for operational or traffic management reasons.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Pilot Boat Delta, this is Port Control: change channel to one-two for traffic updates and confirm on new frequency.

termTranslations.ja: チャンネルを変えてください
termTranslations.th: เปลี่ยนช่องสัญญาณ

usageTranslations.en: Pilot Boat Delta, this is Port Control: change channel to 12 for traffic updates and confirm on new frequency.
usageTranslations.tr: Pilot Botu Delta, burası Liman Kontrol: trafik güncellemeleri için kanal 12'ye geçin ve yeni frekanstan onaylayın.
usageTranslations.fr: Pilotine Delta, ici Contrôle du port : changez de canal pour le 12 pour les informations de trafic et confirmez sur la nouvelle fréquence.
usageTranslations.de: Lotsenboot Delta, hier Hafenaufsicht: wechseln Sie für Verkehrsmeldungen auf Kanal 12 und bestätigen Sie auf der neuen Frequenz.
usageTranslations.es: Lancha Piloto Delta, aquí Control de Puerto: cambie al canal 12 para actualizaciones y confirme por la nueva frecuencia.
usageTranslations.zh: 引航艇Delta，这里是港口管制：请切换至12频道获取交通信息，并在新频道确认。
usageTranslations.ar: زورق الإرشاد Delta، هنا مراقبة الميناء: غير القناة إلى 12 لتحديثات الحركة وأكد على التردد الجديد.
usageTranslations.pt: Lancha Piloto Delta, aqui Controle do Porto: mude para o canal 12 para atualizações de tráfego e confirme na nova frequência.
usageTranslations.ru: Лоцманский катер Delta, это порт-контроль: перейдите на канал 12 для обновления информации о движении и подтвердите на новой частоте.
usageTranslations.ja: パイロットボートDelta、こちらポートコントロール：交通情報のためチャンネル12へ切り替えて、新しい周波数で確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Pilotina Delta, qui Controllo Porto: cambi canale sul 12 per aggiornamenti sul traffico e confermi sulla nuova frequenza.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu hoa tiêu Delta, đây là Cảng vụ: chuyển sang kênh 12 để nhận thông tin giao thông và xác nhận trên tần số mới.
usageTranslations.hi: पायलट बोट डेल्टा, यहाँ पोर्ट कंट्रोल: यातायात अपडेट के लिए चैनल 12 पर जाएं और नई फ्रीक्वेंसी पर पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือไกด์ Delta, ที่นี่ควบคุมท่าเรือ: เปลี่ยนไปช่อง 12 เพื่อรับข้อมูลจราจรและยืนยันในความถี่ใหม่
usageTranslations.id: Kapal pandu Delta, di sini Kontrol Pelabuhan: ganti saluran ke 12 untuk pembaruan lalu lintas dan konfirmasi di frekuensi baru.

terms.definition: Planned military or naval operations in which weapons are fired in designated sea areas, usually requiring ships to keep clear.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All ships, this is Navy Range Control: firing exercises in progress within area Alpha, keep clear until further notice.

termTranslations.th: การฝึกซ้อมยิง

usageTranslations.en: All ships, this is Navy Range Control: firing exercises in progress within area Alpha, keep clear until further notice.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm gemiler, burası Deniz Atış Kontrol: Alpha sahasında atış tatbikatı devam ediyor, ikinci bir bildirime kadar bölgeden uzak durun.
usageTranslations.fr: Tous navires, ici Contrôle de zone navale : exercices de tir en cours dans la zone Alpha, évitez la zone jusqu'à nouvel ordre.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Schiffe, hier Marine-Schießkontrolle: Schießübungen im Gebiet Alpha, halten Sie sich fern bis auf Weiteres.
usageTranslations.es: Todos los buques, aquí Control de Área Naval: ejercicios de tiro en curso en el área Alfa, manténganse alejados hasta nuevo aviso.
usageTranslations.zh: 各船只，这里是海军射击管制：Alpha区域正在进行射击演习，敬请远离，等候进一步通知。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع السفن، هنا مراقبة نطاق البحرية: تدريبات إطلاق النار جارية في منطقة ألفا، ابقوا بعيدًا حتى إشعار آخر.
usageTranslations.pt: Todos os navios, aqui é o Controle da Marinha: exercícios de tiro em andamento na área Alfa, mantenham-se afastados até novo aviso.
usageTranslations.ru: Всем судам, это морской контроль: в районе Альфа проходят стрельбовые учения, держитесь подальше до особого распоряжения.
usageTranslations.ja: 全船舶、こちら海軍射撃管制：エリアAlphaで射撃訓練中、次の通告まで近づかないでください。
usageTranslations.it: Tutte le navi, qui Controllo Tiro Marina: esercitazioni di tiro in corso nell'area Alfa, tenersi lontani fino a nuovo ordine.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả tàu thuyền, đây là Kiểm soát Hải quân: khu vực Alpha đang diễn tập bắn, tránh xa cho đến thông báo tiếp theo.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी जहाजों, यहाँ नेवी रेंज कंट्रोल: एरिया अल्फा में फायरिंग अभ्यास चल रहा है, अगले सूचना तक दूर रहें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือทุกลำ ที่นี่ควบคุมพื้นที่กองทัพเรือ: มีการฝึกซ้อมยิงในเขต Alpha กรุณาหลีกเลี่ยงจนกว่าจะมีประกาศเพิ่มเติม
usageTranslations.id: Semua kapal, di sini Pengawas Area Angkatan Laut: latihan menembak berlangsung di area Alpha, hindari sampai ada pemberitahuan lebih lanjut.

terms.definition: Official transmission that a previous distress message is no longer valid, usually after the situation has been resolved.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All stations, all stations, all stations: cancel distress for fishing vessel Coral. Emergency resolved, assistance no longer required.

termTranslations.th: ยกเลิกเหตุฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: All stations, all stations, all stations: cancel distress for fishing vessel Coral. Emergency resolved, assistance no longer required.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm istasyonlar, tüm istasyonlar, tüm istasyonlar: Coral balıkçı gemisi için tehlike iptal. Acil durum sona erdi, yardıma gerek yok.
usageTranslations.fr: Toutes stations, toutes stations, toutes stations : annulation de détresse pour le bateau de pêche Coral. Urgence résolue, assistance non requise.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Stationen, alle Stationen, alle Stationen: Notruf für Fischerboot Coral aufgehoben. Notlage gelöst, Hilfe nicht mehr erforderlich.
usageTranslations.es: Todas las estaciones, todas las estaciones: cancelar emergencia para el pesquero Coral. Emergencia resuelta, ya no se requiere asistencia.
usageTranslations.zh: 各台，各台，各台：取消对渔船Coral的遇险警报。紧急情况已解决，不再需要协助。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع المحطات، جميع المحطات: إلغاء الاستغاثة للسفينة Coral. تم حل الطارئ، لم تعد هناك حاجة للمساعدة.
usageTranslations.pt: Todas as estações, todas as estações: cancelar socorro para o barco de pesca Coral. Emergência resolvida, assistência não é mais necessária.
usageTranslations.ru: Всем станциям, всем станциям: отбой бедствия для рыболовного судна Coral. Чрезвычайная ситуация устранена, помощь больше не требуется.
usageTranslations.ja: 全局、全局、全局：漁船Coralの遭難解除。緊急事態は解決し、援助不要。
usageTranslations.it: Tutte le stazioni, tutte le stazioni: annullare allarme per il peschereccio Coral. Emergenza risolta, assistenza non più necessaria.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả các trạm: hủy báo nguy cho tàu cá Coral. Sự cố đã giải quyết, không cần hỗ trợ.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी स्टेशनों, सभी स्टेशनों: मछली पकड़ने वाले पोत Coral के लिए संकट रद्द। आपात स्थिति समाप्त, सहायता की आवश्यकता नहीं।
usageTranslations.th: ทุกสถานี ทุกสถานี: ยกเลิกเหตุฉุกเฉินเรือประมง Coral เหตุการณ์สิ้นสุด ไม่ต้องการความช่วยเหลือแล้ว
usageTranslations.id: Semua stasiun: batalkan bahaya untuk kapal ikan Coral. Darurat selesai, bantuan tidak diperlukan lagi.

terms.definition: Instruction to enter and follow a designated fairway or channel for safe navigation as directed by VTS or port authority.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Vessel Athena, this is Harbour Control: proceed channel two-three, maintain slow speed and report passing buoy Bravo.

termTranslations.ja: 水路に進入してください
termTranslations.th: เข้าช่องเดินเรือ

usageTranslations.en: Vessel Athena, this is Harbour Control: proceed channel 23, maintain slow speed and report passing buoy Bravo.
usageTranslations.tr: Athena gemisi, burası Liman Kontrol: 23 numaralı kanala girin, yavaş hızda seyredin ve Bravo şamandırasını geçerken rapor edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Navire Athena, ici Contrôle du port : empruntez le chenal 23, gardez une allure lente et signalez en passant la bouée Bravo.
usageTranslations.de: Schiff Athena, hier Hafenaufsicht: fahren Sie in Kanal 23 ein, halten Sie langsame Fahrt und melden Sie das Passieren der Tonne Bravo.
usageTranslations.es: Buque Athena, aquí Control de Puerto: entre en el canal 23, mantenga velocidad lenta e informe al pasar la boya Bravo.
usageTranslations.zh: Athena号，这里是港口管制：请进入23号航道，保持低速，并在通过Bravo浮标时报告。
usageTranslations.ar: سفينة Athena، هنا مراقبة الميناء: ادخل القناة 23، حافظ على سرعة منخفضة وأبلغ عند تجاوز العوامة Bravo.
usageTranslations.pt: Navio Athena, aqui Controle do Porto: entre no canal 23, mantenha velocidade reduzida e reporte ao passar pela boia Bravo.
usageTranslations.ru: Судно Athena, это порт-контроль: следуйте в канал 23, держите малый ход и доложите о проходе буя Браво.
usageTranslations.ja: 船舶Athena、こちらハーバーコントロール：23番水路に進入、徐行し、ブイBravo通過時に報告せよ。
usageTranslations.it: Nave Athena, qui Controllo Porto: immettersi nel canale 23, mantenere velocità ridotta e riferire dopo la boa Bravo.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu Athena, đây là Cảng vụ: đi vào luồng 23, giữ tốc độ chậm và báo cáo khi qua phao Bravo.
usageTranslations.hi: पोत Athena, यहाँ हार्बर कंट्रोल: चैनल 23 में प्रवेश करें, धीमी गति रखें और बुआ ब्रावो पार करते समय रिपोर्ट करें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือ Athena, ที่นี่ควบคุมท่าเรือ: เข้าช่องเดินเรือ 23 รักษาความเร็วต่ำ และรายงานเมื่อผ่านทุ่น Bravo
usageTranslations.id: Kapal Athena, di sini Kontrol Pelabuhan: masuk ke kanal 23, jaga kecepatan rendah dan laporkan saat melewati buoy Bravo.

terms.definition: A general transmission on VHF or NAVTEX to inform vessels about safety, weather, traffic or other operational matters.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All vessels, this is VTS Istanbul: information broadcast follows on channel one-two regarding weather warning and changes to pilot boarding area.

termTranslations.th: กระจายข้อมูล

usageTranslations.en: All vessels, this is VTS Istanbul: information broadcast follows on channel 12 regarding weather warning and changes to pilot boarding area.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm gemiler, burası VTS İstanbul: hava uyarısı ve pilot alma sahasındaki değişikliklerle ilgili bilgi yayını kanal 12'den yapılacaktır.
usageTranslations.fr: Tous navires, ici VTS Istanbul : diffusion d'information sur le canal 12 concernant l'alerte météo et les changements de zone d'embarquement du pilote.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Schiffe, hier VTS Istanbul: Informationssendung folgt auf Kanal 12 über Wetterwarnung und Änderungen am Lotsenübernahmegebiet.
usageTranslations.es: Todos los buques, aquí VTS Estambul: transmisión de información por canal 12 sobre aviso meteorológico y cambios en área de embarque de práctico.
usageTranslations.zh: 各船只，这里是伊斯坦布尔VTS：有关天气警报及引航员登轮区变更的信息将在12频道播报。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع السفن، هنا VTS اسطنبول: سيتم بث نشرة معلومات على القناة 12 بخصوص تحذير الطقس وتغييرات منطقة صعود المرشد.
usageTranslations.pt: Todos os navios, aqui é o VTS Istambul: transmissão de informação no canal 12 sobre aviso meteorológico e alterações na área de embarque do prático.
usageTranslations.ru: Всем судам, это VTS Стамбул: на канале 12 будет информационное сообщение о погодном предупреждении и изменениях в районе посадки лоцмана.
usageTranslations.ja: 全船舶、こちらVTSイスタンブール：気象警報およびパイロット乗船エリアの変更について情報放送がチャンネル12であります。
usageTranslations.it: Tutte le navi, qui VTS Istanbul: trasmissione informativa sul canale 12 su avviso meteo e cambiamenti nell'area imbarco pilota.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả tàu thuyền, đây là VTS Istanbul: sẽ phát thông tin trên kênh 12 về cảnh báo thời tiết và thay đổi khu vực đón hoa tiêu.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी जहाजों, यहाँ VTS इस्तांबुल: मौसम चेतावनी और पायलट बोर्डिंग क्षेत्र में बदलाव के संबंध में सूचना प्रसारण चैनल 12 पर किया जाएगा।
usageTranslations.th: เรือทุกลำ ที่นี่ VTS Istanbul: จะมีการกระจายข้อมูลทางช่อง 12 เกี่ยวกับคำเตือนสภาพอากาศและการเปลี่ยนแปลงพื้นที่รับไกด์
usageTranslations.id: Semua kapal, di sini VTS Istanbul: siaran informasi di kanal 12 mengenai peringatan cuaca dan perubahan area naik pilot.

terms.definition: A condition in which a vessel’s propulsion machinery is malfunctioning or unreliable, possibly affecting speed and manoeuvrability.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Harbour Control, this is tanker Pacific Hope: we have engine trouble, unable to maintain speed, require tug assistance for berthing.

termTranslations.th: เครื่องยนต์ขัดข้อง

usageTranslations.en: Harbour Control, this is tanker Pacific Hope: we have engine trouble, unable to maintain speed, require tug assistance for berthing.
usageTranslations.tr: Liman Kontrol, burası tanker Pacific Hope: makine arızası var, hızı koruyamıyoruz, yanaşmak için römorkör yardımı gerekli.
usageTranslations.fr: Contrôle portuaire, ici pétrolier Pacific Hope : problème machine, incapable de maintenir la vitesse, besoin d'un remorqueur pour accostage.
usageTranslations.de: Hafenaufsicht, hier Tanker Pacific Hope: wir haben Maschinenschaden, können Geschwindigkeit nicht halten, benötigen Schlepperhilfe zum Anlegen.
usageTranslations.es: Control de Puerto, aquí petrolero Pacific Hope: tenemos avería de máquina, no podemos mantener la velocidad, requerimos remolcador para atraque.
usageTranslations.zh: 港口管制，这里是油船Pacific Hope：主机故障，无法保持航速，靠泊需拖船协助。
usageTranslations.ar: مراقبة الميناء، هنا الناقلة Pacific Hope: لدينا عطل في المحرك، غير قادرين على الحفاظ على السرعة، نحتاج إلى قاطرة للمساعدة في الرسو.
usageTranslations.pt: Controle do Porto, aqui é o petroleiro Pacific Hope: temos problema no motor, não conseguimos manter a velocidade, precisamos de rebocador para atracar.
usageTranslations.ru: Порт-контроль, это танкер Pacific Hope: проблемы с двигателем, не можем держать скорость, нужна помощь буксира для швартовки.
usageTranslations.ja: ハーバーコントロール、こちらタンカーPacific Hope：機関故障、速力維持できず、着岸にタグボート支援必要。
usageTranslations.it: Controllo Porto, qui petroliera Pacific Hope: avaria motore, impossibile mantenere la velocità, serve rimorchiatore per l'ormeggio.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng vụ, đây là tàu dầu Pacific Hope: gặp sự cố động cơ, không giữ được tốc độ, cần tàu kéo hỗ trợ cập bến.
usageTranslations.hi: हार्बर कंट्रोल, यहाँ टैंकर Pacific Hope: इंजन में खराबी है, गति बनाए नहीं रख सकते, बर्थिंग के लिए टग सहायता चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ควบคุมท่าเรือ, ที่นี่เรือบรรทุกน้ำมัน Pacific Hope: เครื่องยนต์ขัดข้อง รักษาความเร็วไม่ได้ ต้องการเรือลากสำหรับเทียบท่า
usageTranslations.id: Kontrol Pelabuhan, di sini tanker Pacific Hope: kami mengalami kerusakan mesin, tidak bisa mempertahankan kecepatan, butuh bantuan tugboat untuk sandar.

terms.definition: Announcement that a vessel plans to pass another vessel ahead on a specified side in accordance with the COLREGS.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: MV Vega, this is cargo vessel Aurora: intend overtake on your starboard side at buoy Charlie, please acknowledge and advise intentions.

termTranslations.th: ตั้งใจจะแซง

usageTranslations.en: MV Vega, this is cargo vessel Aurora: intend overtake on your starboard side at buoy Charlie, please acknowledge and advise intentions.
usageTranslations.tr: MV Vega, burası yük gemisi Aurora: Charlie şamandırasında sancak tarafından geçmek istiyorum, lütfen onaylayın ve niyetinizi bildirin.
usageTranslations.fr: MV Vega, ici cargo Aurora : j'ai l'intention de dépasser par tribord à la bouée Charlie, veuillez accuser réception et indiquer vos intentions.
usageTranslations.de: MV Vega, hier Frachtschiff Aurora: beabsichtige Sie an Steuerbord bei Tonne Charlie zu überholen, bitte bestätigen und Absichten angeben.
usageTranslations.es: MV Vega, aquí buque Aurora: tengo intención de adelantar por estribor en la boya Charlie, por favor confirme y comunique intenciones.
usageTranslations.zh: MV Vega，这里是货船Aurora：在Charlie浮标准备从右舷超越，请确认并告知意图。
usageTranslations.ar: السفينة Vega، هنا سفينة الشحن Aurora: أنوي التجاوز من جانب الميمنة عند عوامة Charlie، يرجى التأكيد وإبلاغ النوايا.
usageTranslations.pt: MV Vega, aqui navio cargueiro Aurora: pretendo ultrapassar pelo boreste na bóia Charlie, confirme e informe intenções.
usageTranslations.ru: MV Vega, это грузовое судно Aurora: намерен обогнать вас с правого борта у буя Charlie, подтвердите и сообщите намерения.
usageTranslations.ja: MV Vega、こちら貨物船Aurora：Charlieブイ付近で右舷側から追い越す意図です。ご確認とご意向をお知らせください。
usageTranslations.it: MV Vega, qui nave da carico Aurora: intendo sorpassare a dritta alla boa Charlie, confermate e comunicate intenzioni.
usageTranslations.vi: MV Vega, đây là tàu hàng Aurora: có ý định vượt bên mạn phải tại phao Charlie, vui lòng xác nhận và thông báo ý định.
usageTranslations.hi: MV Vega, यहाँ कार्गो पोत Aurora: बुआ Charlie पर आपके दाहिने तरफ से आगे निकलने का इरादा है, कृपया पुष्टि करें और अपनी मंशा बताएं।
usageTranslations.th: MV Vega, ที่นี่เรือบรรทุก Aurora: ตั้งใจจะแซงด้านขวาที่ทุ่น Charlie กรุณายืนยันและแจ้งเจตนา
usageTranslations.id: MV Vega, di sini kapal kargo Aurora: bermaksud menyalip di sisi kanan di buoy Charlie, mohon konfirmasi dan beri tahu niat.

terms.definition: Instruction to confirm that a vessel’s reported navigational position has been received and understood.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Vessel Delta, this is VTS Rotterdam: report and acknowledge position abeam buoy Foxtrot before entering fairway.

termTranslations.ja: 位置を確認してください
termTranslations.th: ยืนยันตำแหน่ง

usageTranslations.en: Vessel Delta, this is VTS Rotterdam: report and acknowledge position abeam buoy Foxtrot before entering fairway.
usageTranslations.tr: Delta gemisi, burası VTS Rotterdam: kanal girişinden önce Foxtrot şamandırası sancağınızda pozisyonunuzu raporlayıp teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Navire Delta, ici VTS Rotterdam : signalez et accusez réception de la position à hauteur de la bouée Foxtrot avant d'entrer dans le chenal.
usageTranslations.de: Schiff Delta, hier VTS Rotterdam: melden und bestätigen Sie Ihre Position querab Tonne Foxtrot vor Einfahrt in das Fahrwasser.
usageTranslations.es: Buque Delta, aquí VTS Rotterdam: informe y acuse recibo de posición al través de la boya Foxtrot antes de entrar al canal.
usageTranslations.zh: Delta轮，这里是鹿特丹VTS：进入航道前，请在Foxtrot浮标横过时报告并确认位置。
usageTranslations.ar: السفينة Delta، هنا VTS روتردام: أبلغ وأكد استلام الموقع بجانب عوامة Foxtrot قبل دخول المجرى.
usageTranslations.pt: Navio Delta, aqui é VTS Rotterdam: reporte e acuse recebimento da posição ao lado da bóia Foxtrot antes de entrar no canal.
usageTranslations.ru: Судно Delta, это VTS Роттердам: сообщите и подтвердите позицию у буя Фокстрот перед входом в фарватер.
usageTranslations.ja: 船舶Delta、こちらVTSロッテルダム：水路進入前にFoxtrotブイ横で位置を報告し確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Nave Delta, qui VTS Rotterdam: segnalate e confermate posizione all'altezza della boa Foxtrot prima di entrare in canale.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu Delta, đây là VTS Rotterdam: báo cáo và xác nhận vị trí khi qua phao Foxtrot trước khi vào luồng.
usageTranslations.hi: जहाज Delta, यहाँ VTS रॉटरडैम: फॉक्सट्रोट बुआ के पास स्थिति रिपोर्ट करें और पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือ Delta, ที่นี่ VTS Rotterdam: รายงานและยืนยันตำแหน่งที่ทุ่น Foxtrot ก่อนเข้าช่องเดินเรือ
usageTranslations.id: Kapal Delta, di sini VTS Rotterdam: laporkan dan konfirmasi posisi di dekat buoy Foxtrot sebelum memasuki jalur.

terms.definition: Notification that a particular port, cargo, or navigational operation has been fully finished.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Harbour Master, this is MV Sunrise: bunkering operation completed, all lines clear, ready to shift berth on your instructions.

termTranslations.th: ปฏิบัติการเสร็จสิ้น

usageTranslations.en: Harbour Master, this is MV Sunrise: bunkering operation completed, all lines clear, ready to shift berth on your instructions.
usageTranslations.tr: Liman Başkanı, burası MV Sunrise: yakıt alma operasyonu tamamlandı, tüm halatlar çözüldü, talimatınızı bekliyoruz.
usageTranslations.fr: Capitainerie, ici MV Sunrise : opération d'avitaillement terminée, toutes les amarres larguées, prêts à changer de poste à votre ordre.
usageTranslations.de: Hafenmeister, hier MV Sunrise: Bunkeroperation abgeschlossen, alle Leinen los, bereit Liegeplatz zu wechseln auf Ihre Anweisung.
usageTranslations.es: Capitanía, aquí MV Sunrise: operación de abastecimiento completada, todos los cabos libres, listos para cambiar de atraque según sus instrucciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 港务长，这里是MV Sunrise：加油作业完成，所有缆绳已解，等待您的移泊指令。
usageTranslations.ar: رئيس الميناء، هنا السفينة MV Sunrise: اكتملت عملية التزود بالوقود، جميع الحبال مفكوكة، جاهزون لنقل الرصيف بأمرك.
usageTranslations.pt: Capitão do porto, aqui MV Sunrise: operação de abastecimento concluída, todos os cabos livres, prontos para mudar de atracação conforme suas instruções.
usageTranslations.ru: Гаванный начальник, это MV Sunrise: операция по бункеровке завершена, все концы убраны, готовы менять причал по вашему указанию.
usageTranslations.ja: ハーバーマスター、こちらMV Sunrise：燃料作業完了、すべての係留索解放、移動指示を待ちます。
usageTranslations.it: Capitano di porto, qui MV Sunrise: operazione di bunkeraggio completata, tutte le cime libere, pronti a spostare ormeggio secondo istruzioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng vụ, đây là MV Sunrise: hoàn tất thao tác tiếp nhiên liệu, dây buộc đã tháo, sẵn sàng đổi bến theo chỉ dẫn.
usageTranslations.hi: हार्बर मास्टर, यहाँ MV Sunrise: बंकरिंग प्रक्रिया पूरी हुई, सभी लाइनें साफ, आपके निर्देश का इंतजार।
usageTranslations.th: หัวหน้าท่าเรือ ที่นี่ MV Sunrise: เติมเชื้อเพลิงเสร็จสิ้น เชือกปลดแล้ว พร้อมเปลี่ยนท่าเมื่อได้รับคำสั่ง
usageTranslations.id: Kepala pelabuhan, di sini MV Sunrise: operasi pengisian bahan bakar selesai, semua tali lepas, siap pindah dermaga sesuai instruksi Anda.

terms.definition: Notification that a vessel’s previously declared estimated time of arrival has changed and updated information is provided.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: VTS Houston, this is tanker Aurora: ETA revised, now expecting pilot boarding at zero six one five UTC.

termTranslations.th: เวลาถึงโดยประมาณแก้ไขแล้ว

usageTranslations.en: VTS Houston, this is tanker Aurora: ETA revised, now expecting pilot boarding at 0615 UTC.
usageTranslations.tr: VTS Houston, burası tanker Aurora: tahmini varış saatim güncellendi, pilot alma saati artık 06:15 UTC.
usageTranslations.fr: VTS Houston, ici tanker Aurora : ETA révisée, embarquement pilote prévu à 06h15 UTC.
usageTranslations.de: VTS Houston, hier Tanker Aurora: ETA aktualisiert, Lotsenübernahme jetzt um 0615 UTC.
usageTranslations.es: VTS Houston, aquí petrolero Aurora: ETA revisada, se espera práctico a las 0615 UTC.
usageTranslations.zh: 休斯顿VTS，这里是油轮Aurora：预计到达时间已更新，预计0615 UTC登引航员。
usageTranslations.ar: VTS هيوستن، هنا ناقلة Aurora: تم تعديل وقت الوصول المتوقع، يتوقع الآن صعود المرشد في الساعة 0615 UTC.
usageTranslations.pt: VTS Houston, aqui petroleiro Aurora: ETA revisada, embarque de prático previsto para 0615 UTC.
usageTranslations.ru: VTS Хьюстон, это танкер Aurora: расчетное время прибытия изменено, посадка лоцмана ожидается в 0615 UTC.
usageTranslations.ja: VTSヒューストン、こちらタンカーAurora：ETA修正、パイロット乗船予定は0615 UTCです。
usageTranslations.it: VTS Houston, qui petroliera Aurora: ETA aggiornata, ora prevista imbarco pilota alle 0615 UTC.
usageTranslations.vi: VTS Houston, đây là tàu dầu Aurora: ETA đã sửa đổi, dự kiến đón hoa tiêu lúc 0615 UTC.
usageTranslations.hi: VTS ह्यूस्टन, यहाँ टैंकर Aurora: ETA संशोधित हुआ, अब पायलट बोर्डिंग 0615 UTC पर अपेक्षित।
usageTranslations.th: VTS Houston, ที่นี่เรือบรรทุก Aurora: เวลาถึงโดยประมาณแก้ไขแล้ว คาดว่าจะรับไกด์เวลา 0615 UTC
usageTranslations.id: VTS Houston, di sini tanker Aurora: ETA telah diperbarui, diperkirakan naik pilot pukul 0615 UTC.

terms.definition: Request or statement of the minimum water depth needed for safe passage of a vessel based on its loaded draft.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Pilot Station, this is bulk carrier Orion: request draft required for passage through South Channel at high water.

termTranslations.th: กินน้ำลึกที่ต้องการ

usageTranslations.en: Pilot Station, this is bulk carrier Orion: request draft required for passage through South Channel at high water.
usageTranslations.tr: Pilot İstasyonu, burası kuru yük gemisi Orion: Güney Kanalı'ndan geçiş için yüksek su seviyesinde gerekli çekimi talep ediyorum.
usageTranslations.fr: Station pilote, ici vraquier Orion : demande tirant d'eau requis pour passage dans le chenal Sud à marée haute.
usageTranslations.de: Lotsenstation, hier Massengutfrachter Orion: bitte erforderlichen Tiefgang für die Passage durch den Südkanal bei Hochwasser angeben.
usageTranslations.es: Estación de práctico, aquí buque granelero Orion: solicito calado requerido para pasar por el canal Sur con marea alta.
usageTranslations.zh: 引航站，这里是散货船Orion：请求南航道高潮时所需吃水信息。
usageTranslations.ar: محطة الطيار، هنا الناقلة Orion: أطلب معرفة الغاطس المطلوب للمرور عبر القناة الجنوبية عند المد العالي.
usageTranslations.pt: Estação de prático, aqui graneleiro Orion: solicito calado necessário para passagem pelo Canal Sul na maré alta.
usageTranslations.ru: Лоцманская станция, это балкер Orion: прошу сообщить требуемую осадку для прохода через Южный канал при полной воде.
usageTranslations.ja: パイロットステーション、こちらばら積み船Orion：南水路の満潮時通航に必要な喫水を教えてください。
usageTranslations.it: Stazione pilota, qui bulk carrier Orion: richiedo pescaggio necessario per il passaggio nel Canale Sud con alta marea.
usageTranslations.vi: Trạm hoa tiêu, đây là tàu hàng rời Orion: yêu cầu mớn nước cần thiết để qua luồng Nam lúc triều cao.
usageTranslations.hi: पायलट स्टेशन, यहाँ बल्क कैरियर Orion: साउथ चैनल में उच्च जल स्तर पर आवश्यक ड्राफ्ट बताएं।
usageTranslations.th: สถานีไกด์, ที่นี่เรือบัล์ก Orion: ขอข้อมูลกินน้ำลึกที่ต้องการสำหรับเดินเรือในช่องทางใต้ช่วงน้ำสูง
usageTranslations.id: Stasiun pilot, di sini kapal kargo Orion: mohon informasi draf yang dibutuhkan untuk melewati Kanal Selatan saat air pasang.

terms.definition: Emergency indicating that a person has fallen from a vessel into the water and immediate rescue actions are required.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Man overboard, man overboard, port side! Launch rescue boat and keep visual contact with casualty at all times.

termTranslations.th: คนตกน้ำ

usageTranslations.en: Man overboard, man overboard, port side! Launch rescue boat and keep visual contact with casualty at all times.
usageTranslations.tr: Adam denize düştü, adam denize düştü, iskele tarafı! Can kurtarma botunu suya indirin ve kişiyi sürekli gözle takip edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Homme à la mer, homme à la mer, bâbord ! Mettez à l'eau la vedette de sauvetage et gardez le contact visuel avec la victime.
usageTranslations.de: Mensch über Bord, Mensch über Bord, Backbord! Rettungsboot aussetzen und ständigen Sichtkontakt halten.
usageTranslations.es: ¡Hombre al agua, hombre al agua, babor! Lanzar bote de rescate y mantener contacto visual con el náufrago en todo momento.
usageTranslations.zh: 有人落水，有人落水，左舷！下救生艇并始终保持目视联系。
usageTranslations.ar: رجل في البحر، رجل في البحر، جانب الميناء! أطلق قارب الإنقاذ وحافظ على الاتصال البصري مع الشخص دائماً.
usageTranslations.pt: Homem ao mar, homem ao mar, bombordo! Lançar bote de resgate e manter contato visual o tempo todo.
usageTranslations.ru: Человек за бортом, человек за бортом, левый борт! Спустить спасательную лодку и поддерживать визуальный контакт.
usageTranslations.ja: 人落水、人落水、左舷！救助艇を下ろし、常に目視で確認。
usageTranslations.it: Uomo in mare, uomo in mare, lato sinistro! Mettete in acqua la scialuppa di salvataggio e mantenete sempre il contatto visivo.
usageTranslations.vi: Người rơi xuống nước, người rơi xuống nước, mạn trái! Hạ thuyền cứu hộ và giữ liên lạc mắt với nạn nhân.
usageTranslations.hi: आदमी पानी में गिरा, आदमी पानी में गिरा, बाईं ओर! बचाव नाव को उतारें और लगातार दृश्य संपर्क रखें।
usageTranslations.th: คนตกน้ำ คนตกน้ำ ด้านซ้าย! ปล่อยเรือกู้ภัยและรักษาการมองเห็นผู้ประสบเหตุตลอดเวลา
usageTranslations.id: Orang jatuh ke laut, orang jatuh ke laut, sisi kiri! Luncurkan perahu penyelamat dan terus awasi korban.

terms.definition: Official broadcast of hazards, obstructions, or operational restrictions that may affect safe navigation.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All vessels, navigation warning: unlit wreck reported near buoy Lima, position five one degrees one three decimal four minutes north, zero zero one degrees two two decimal eight minutes east.

termTranslations.th: คำเตือนการเดินเรือ

usageTranslations.en: All vessels, navigation warning: unlit wreck reported near buoy Lima, position 51°13.4′ N 001°22.8′ E.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm gemiler, seyir uyarısı: Lima şamandırası yakınında ışıksız batık rapor edilmiştir, pozisyon 51°13.4′ K 001°22.8′ D.
