usageTranslations.fr: Tous navires, avertissement de navigation : épave non éclairée signalée près de la bouée Lima, position 51°13,4′ N 001°22,8′ E.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Schiffe, Navigationswarnung: unbeleuchtetes Wrack gemeldet nahe Tonne Lima, Position 51°13,4′ N 001°22,8′ O.
usageTranslations.es: Todos los buques, aviso de navegación: pecio sin luces reportado cerca de la boya Lima, posición 51°13.4′ N 001°22.8′ E.
usageTranslations.zh: 各船只，航行警告：在Lima浮标附近报告有无灯沉船，位置51°13.4′N 001°22.8′E。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع السفن، تحذير ملاحي: حطام غير مضاء تم الإبلاغ عنه بالقرب من عوامة Lima، الموقع 51°13.4′ شمال 001°22.8′ شرق.
usageTranslations.pt: Todos os navios, aviso de navegação: naufrágio sem iluminação reportado próximo à bóia Lima, posição 51°13.4′ N 001°22.8′ E.
usageTranslations.ru: Всем судам, навигационное предупреждение: у буя Лима обнаружено неосвещённое судно, позиция 51°13.4′ N 001°22.8′ E.
usageTranslations.ja: 全船舶、航行警報：Limaブイ付近に無灯火の沈没船が報告されています。位置51°13.4′N 001°22.8′E。
usageTranslations.it: Tutte le navi, avviso di navigazione: relitto non illuminato segnalato vicino alla boa Lima, posizione 51°13.4′ N 001°22.8′ E.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả tàu thuyền, cảnh báo hàng hải: có xác tàu chìm không đèn gần phao Lima, vị trí 51°13.4′B 001°22.8′Đ.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी जहाजों, नेविगेशन चेतावनी: बुआ Lima के पास बिना रोशनी का मलबा रिपोर्ट हुआ, स्थिति 51°13.4′N 001°22.8′E।
usageTranslations.th: เรือทุกลำ คำเตือนการเดินเรือ: มีซากเรือจมไม่มีไฟใกล้ทุ่น Lima ตำแหน่ง 51°13.4′N 001°22.8′E
usageTranslations.id: Semua kapal, peringatan navigasi: bangkai kapal tanpa lampu dilaporkan di dekat buoy Lima, posisi 51°13.4′ N 001°22.8′ E.

terms.definition: Notification that a fairway or navigation channel is temporarily blocked or being used by another vessel, requiring others to wait or take alternate route.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Attention all vessels: channel occupied by outbound tanker at buoy Romeo. Hold position and stand by for instructions.

termTranslations.th: ช่องเดินเรือถูกใช้

usageTranslations.en: Attention all vessels: channel occupied by outbound tanker at buoy Romeo. Hold position and stand by for instructions.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm gemiler dikkat: Romeo şamandırasında kanal çıkış yapan tanker tarafından işgal edilmiştir. Konumunuzu koruyun, talimat bekleyin.
usageTranslations.fr: Attention tous navires : chenal occupé par un pétrolier sortant à la bouée Romeo. Tenez position et attendez instructions.
usageTranslations.de: Achtung alle Schiffe: Fahrwasser bei Tonne Romeo von auslaufendem Tanker belegt. Position halten und auf Anweisungen warten.
usageTranslations.es: Atención todas las naves: el canal está ocupado por un petrolero saliente en la boya Romeo. Mantenga posición y espere instrucciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有船只注意：航道在Romeo浮标处被出港油轮占用。请保持位置，等待指示。
usageTranslations.ar: تنبيه لجميع السفن: القناة مشغولة بناقلة خارجة عند عوامة روميو. تمسكوا بمواقعكم وانتظروا التعليمات.
usageTranslations.pt: Atenção todas as embarcações: canal ocupado por petroleiro saindo na bóia Romeo. Mantenham posição e aguardem instruções.
usageTranslations.ru: Внимание всем судам: канал у буя Ромео занят выходящим танкером. Оставайтесь на позиции и ждите указаний.
usageTranslations.ja: 全船舶注意：Romeoブイ付近で出港タンカーが水路占有中。ポジション維持し指示を待て。
usageTranslations.it: Attenzione tutte le navi: canale occupato da petroliera uscente alla boa Romeo. Mantenere posizione e attendere istruzioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả tàu chú ý: luồng tại phao Romeo bị tàu dầu ra chiếm dụng. Giữ vị trí và chờ hướng dẫn.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी जहाज ध्यान दें: चैनल Romeo बुआ पर बाहर जाती टैंकर द्वारा व्यस्त है। स्थिति बनाए रखें और निर्देशों की प्रतीक्षा करें।
usageTranslations.th: แจ้งเตือนเรือทุกลำ: ช่องเดินเรือที่ทุ่น Romeo ถูกเรือบรรทุกน้ำมันขาออกใช้ กรุณาหยุดรอคำสั่ง
usageTranslations.id: Perhatian semua kapal: kanal di buoy Romeo sedang digunakan oleh tanker keluar. Tetap di posisi dan tunggu instruksi.

terms.definition: A vessel which is navigating behind another in the same direction, often in a convoy or traffic lane.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Following vessel, this is pilot launch Delta: reduce speed, maintain safe distance astern of the lead ship approaching buoy Tango.

termTranslations.th: เรือที่ตามมา

usageTranslations.en: Following vessel, this is pilot launch Delta: reduce speed, maintain safe distance astern of the lead ship approaching buoy Tango.
usageTranslations.tr: Takip eden gemi, burası pilot botu Delta: hızınızı düşürün, Tango şamandırasına yaklaşan baş geminin arkasında güvenli mesafe koruyun.
usageTranslations.fr: Navire suiveur, ici pilotine Delta : réduisez la vitesse et gardez une distance de sécurité derrière le navire de tête à l'approche de la bouée Tango.
usageTranslations.de: Folgendes Schiff, hier Lotsenboot Delta: Fahrt verringern und sicheren Abstand hinter dem Führungsschiff bei Annäherung an Tonne Tango halten.
usageTranslations.es: Buque siguiente, aquí lancha piloto Delta: reduzca velocidad y mantenga distancia segura detrás del buque líder acercándose a boya Tango.
usageTranslations.zh: 跟随船舶，这里是引航艇Delta：请减速，并在接近Tango浮标时与前船保持安全距离。
usageTranslations.ar: السفينة التالية، هنا قارب الإرشاد Delta: خفف السرعة وابق على مسافة آمنة خلف السفينة القائدة عند الاقتراب من عوامة Tango.
usageTranslations.pt: Embarcação seguinte, aqui lancha piloto Delta: reduza a velocidade e mantenha distância segura atrás da embarcação líder na aproximação da bóia Tango.
usageTranslations.ru: Следующее судно, это лоцманский катер Delta: снизьте скорость и держите безопасную дистанцию за ведущим судном у буя Танго.
usageTranslations.ja: 追従船舶、こちらパイロットランチDelta：速度を落とし、Tangoブイに接近する先導船の後方で安全距離を保て。
usageTranslations.it: Nave seguente, qui pilotina Delta: riduca la velocità e mantenga distanza di sicurezza dietro la nave di testa avvicinandosi alla boa Tango.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu theo sau, đây là tàu hoa tiêu Delta: giảm tốc độ, giữ khoảng cách an toàn phía sau tàu dẫn đầu khi đến phao Tango.
usageTranslations.hi: पीछा करने वाला पोत, यहाँ पायलट बोट Delta: गति कम करें, Tango बुआ पर अग्रिम पोत के पीछे सुरक्षित दूरी बनाए रखें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือที่ตามมา ที่นี่เรือไกด์ Delta: ลดความเร็ว รักษาระยะห่างปลอดภัยหลังเรือหลักที่กำลังเข้าใกล้ทุ่น Tango
usageTranslations.id: Kapal berikutnya, di sini pilot Delta: kurangi kecepatan, jaga jarak aman di belakang kapal utama yang mendekati buoy Tango.

terms.definition: Formal confirmation that a vessel’s estimated time of arrival is correct and accepted by both reporting vessel and authority.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: VTS Genoa, this is ferry Olympia: ETA confirmed for pilot boarding at zero seven three zero UTC, standing by channel one-one.

termTranslations.th: ยืนยันเวลาถึงโดยประมาณแล้ว

usageTranslations.en: VTS Genoa, this is ferry Olympia: ETA confirmed for pilot boarding at 0730 UTC, standing by channel 11.
usageTranslations.tr: VTS Genova, burası feribot Olympia: pilot alma için tahmini varış saatim 07:30 UTC onaylandı, kanal 11'de bekliyorum.
usageTranslations.fr: VTS Gênes, ici ferry Olympia : ETA confirmée pour embarquement du pilote à 07h30 UTC, en attente sur le canal 11.
usageTranslations.de: VTS Genua, hier Fähre Olympia: ETA für Lotsenübernahme um 0730 UTC bestätigt, warte auf Kanal 11.
usageTranslations.es: VTS Génova, aquí ferry Olympia: ETA confirmada para embarque del práctico a las 0730 UTC, a la espera en canal 11.
usageTranslations.zh: 热那亚VTS，这里是渡轮Olympia：预计引航员登轮时间已确认为0730 UTC，在11频道待命。
usageTranslations.ar: VTS جنوة، هنا عبارة Olympia: تم تأكيد وقت الوصول المتوقع لصعود المرشد الساعة 0730 UTC، في الانتظار على القناة 11.
usageTranslations.pt: VTS Gênova, aqui é a balsa Olympia: ETA confirmada para embarque do prático às 0730 UTC, aguardando no canal 11.
usageTranslations.ru: VTS Генуя, это паром Olympia: ETA подтверждено для посадки лоцмана в 0730 UTC, ожидаю на канале 11.
usageTranslations.ja: VTSジェノバ、こちらフェリーOlympia：ETAは0730 UTCのパイロット乗船で確認済み、チャンネル11で待機中。
usageTranslations.it: VTS Genova, qui traghetto Olympia: ETA confermata per imbarco pilota alle 0730 UTC, in attesa sul canale 11.
usageTranslations.vi: VTS Genoa, đây là phà Olympia: ETA xác nhận đón hoa tiêu lúc 0730 UTC, chờ trên kênh 11.
usageTranslations.hi: VTS जेनोआ, यहाँ फेरी Olympia: पायलट बोर्डिंग के लिए ETA 0730 UTC पर पुष्टि हुई, चैनल 11 पर प्रतीक्षा में।
usageTranslations.th: VTS Genoa, ที่นี่เฟอร์รี่ Olympia: ยืนยันเวลาถึงโดยประมาณสำหรับรับไกด์เวลา 0730 UTC รออยู่ช่อง 11
usageTranslations.id: VTS Genoa, di sini feri Olympia: ETA dikonfirmasi untuk naik pilot pukul 0730 UTC, siaga di kanal 11.

terms.definition: Official broadcast of weather conditions, warnings, and forecasts relevant to maritime navigation.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Attention all ships: meteorological report follows, gale warning in force, visibility reduced to less than one mile in sea area Charlie.

termTranslations.th: รายงานอุตุนิยมวิทยา

usageTranslations.en: Attention all ships: meteorological report follows, gale warning in force, visibility reduced to less than one mile in sea area Charlie.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm gemiler dikkat: meteoroloji raporu geliyor, fırtına uyarısı geçerli, Charlie deniz alanında görüş bir milden az.
usageTranslations.fr: Attention tous navires : bulletin météorologique à suivre, avis de coup de vent en vigueur, visibilité réduite à moins d'un mille dans la zone Charlie.
usageTranslations.de: Achtung alle Schiffe: Wetterbericht folgt, Sturmwarnung aktiv, Sichtweite im Seegebiet Charlie unter eine Meile.
usageTranslations.es: Atención todos los buques: sigue informe meteorológico, aviso de temporal en vigor, visibilidad reducida a menos de una milla en área Charlie.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有船只注意：将播报气象报告，海区Charlie有强风警告，可见度小于一海里。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع السفن انتباه: يتبع تقرير الأرصاد الجوية، تحذير من العاصفة ساري، الرؤية أقل من ميل واحد في منطقة البحر تشارلي.
usageTranslations.pt: Atenção todas as embarcações: boletim meteorológico a seguir, aviso de ventania em vigor, visibilidade reduzida para menos de uma milha na área Charlie.
usageTranslations.ru: Внимание всем судам: следует метеосводка, действует штормовое предупреждение, видимость менее одной мили в районе Чарли.
usageTranslations.ja: 全船舶注意：この後気象通報あり、Charlie海域で強風警報発令中、視程1マイル未満。
usageTranslations.it: Attenzione tutte le navi: segue bollettino meteorologico, avviso di burrasca in vigore, visibilità inferiore a un miglio nell’area Charlie.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả tàu chú ý: sẽ phát báo cáo thời tiết, cảnh báo gió mạnh, tầm nhìn giảm dưới một dặm tại khu vực biển Charlie.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी जहाज ध्यान दें: मौसम रिपोर्ट प्रसारित की जाएगी, तूफान की चेतावनी जारी, क्षेत्र Charlie में दृश्यता एक मील से कम।
usageTranslations.th: เรือทุกลำโปรดทราบ: จะมีรายงานอุตุนิยมวิทยาตามมา มีประกาศเตือนพายุแรง ทัศนวิสัยในเขต Charlie ต่ำกว่าหนึ่งไมล์
usageTranslations.id: Perhatian semua kapal: laporan meteorologi berikut, peringatan badai aktif, jarak pandang kurang dari satu mil di wilayah laut Charlie.

terms.definition: Instruction to change the vessel’s current heading in order to avoid danger or comply with traffic management.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Bulk carrier Europa, this is VTS Zeebrugge: alter course ten degrees to port to avoid crossing traffic lane near buoy Kilo.

termTranslations.ja: 針路を変えてください
termTranslations.th: เปลี่ยนทิศทาง

usageTranslations.en: Bulk carrier Europa, this is VTS Zeebrugge: alter course ten degrees to port to avoid crossing traffic lane near buoy Kilo.
usageTranslations.tr: Kuru yük gemisi Europa, burası VTS Zeebrugge: Kilo şamandırası yakınında trafik hattını kesmemek için rotanızı on derece iskeleye değiştirin.
usageTranslations.fr: Vraquier Europa, ici VTS Zeebrugge : modifiez le cap de dix degrés à bâbord pour éviter la voie de circulation près de la bouée Kilo.
usageTranslations.de: Massengutfrachter Europa, hier VTS Zeebrugge: Kurs zehn Grad nach Backbord ändern, um die Verkehrstrennungszone bei Tonne Kilo nicht zu kreuzen.
usageTranslations.es: Buque granelero Europa, aquí VTS Zeebrugge: altere el rumbo diez grados a babor para evitar la vía de tráfico cerca de la boya Kilo.
usageTranslations.zh: 散货船Europa，这里是泽布吕赫VTS：请将航向左转十度，以避开Kilo浮标附近的航道。
usageTranslations.ar: سفينة البضائع Europa، هنا VTS زيبروج: غيّر المسار عشر درجات إلى الميناء لتجنب عبور خط السير قرب عوامة Kilo.
usageTranslations.pt: Navio graneleiro Europa, aqui VTS Zeebrugge: altere o rumo dez graus a bombordo para evitar cruzar a via de tráfego perto da bóia Kilo.
usageTranslations.ru: Балкер Europa, это VTS Зебрюгге: измените курс на десять градусов влево, чтобы не пересекать линию движения у буя Кило.
usageTranslations.ja: バルクキャリアEuropa、こちらVTS Zeebrugge：Kiloブイ付近で交通路横断を避けるため、針路を10度左舷に変えてください。
usageTranslations.it: Bulk carrier Europa, qui VTS Zeebrugge: modificare rotta di dieci gradi a sinistra per evitare la corsia di traffico presso la boa Kilo.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu chở hàng rời Europa, đây là VTS Zeebrugge: đổi hướng mười độ về bên trái để tránh luồng giao thông gần phao Kilo.
usageTranslations.hi: बल्क कैरियर Europa, यहाँ VTS Zeebrugge: बुआ Kilo के पास ट्रैफिक लेन को पार करने से बचने के लिए पाठ्यक्रम को दस डिग्री बाईं ओर बदलें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือบัลค์ Europa, ที่นี่ VTS Zeebrugge: เปลี่ยนทิศทางสิบองศาไปซ้ายเพื่อหลีกเลี่ยงช่องจราจรใกล้ทุ่น Kilo
usageTranslations.id: Kapal curah Europa, di sini VTS Zeebrugge: ubah haluan sepuluh derajat ke kiri untuk menghindari jalur lalu lintas di dekat buoy Kilo.

terms.definition: A navigation buoy whose light is inoperative or not functioning, presenting a hazard at night.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Navigation warning: buoy Kilo unlit, position five three degrees one eight decimal two minutes north, zero zero three degrees zero six decimal five minutes east.

termTranslations.th: ทุ่นไม่มีไฟ

usageTranslations.en: Navigation warning: buoy Kilo unlit, position 53°18.2′ N 003°06.5′ E.
usageTranslations.tr: Seyir uyarısı: Kilo şamandırası ışıksız, pozisyon 53°18.2′ K 003°06.5′ D.
usageTranslations.fr: Avertissement de navigation : bouée Kilo non éclairée, position 53°18.2′ N 003°06.5′ E.
usageTranslations.de: Navigationswarnung: Tonne Kilo unbefeuert, Position 53°18,2′ N 003°06,5′ O.
usageTranslations.es: Aviso de navegación: boyarín Kilo sin luz, posición 53°18.2′ N 003°06.5′ E.
usageTranslations.zh: 航行警告：Kilo浮标无灯，位置53°18.2′N 003°06.5′E。
usageTranslations.ar: تحذير ملاحي: العوامة Kilo غير مضاءة، الموقع 53°18.2′ شمالاً 003°06.5′ شرقاً.
usageTranslations.pt: Aviso de navegação: bóia Kilo apagada, posição 53°18.2′ N 003°06.5′ E.
usageTranslations.ru: Навигационное предупреждение: буй Кило без огня, позиция 53°18,2′ N 003°06,5′ E.
usageTranslations.ja: 航行警報：Kiloブイ灯火なし、位置53°18.2′N 003°06.5′E。
usageTranslations.it: Avviso di navigazione: boa Kilo spenta, posizione 53°18.2′ N 003°06.5′ E.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảnh báo hàng hải: phao Kilo không sáng đèn, vị trí 53°18.2′B 003°06.5′Đ.
usageTranslations.hi: नेविगेशन चेतावनी: Kilo बॉय बिना रोशनी के, स्थिति 53°18.2′N 003°06.5′E।
usageTranslations.th: คำเตือนเดินเรือ: ทุ่น Kilo ไม่มีไฟ ตำแหน่ง 53°18.2′N 003°06.5′E
usageTranslations.id: Peringatan navigasi: pelampung Kilo tanpa lampu, posisi 53°18.2′ N 003°06.5′ E.

terms.definition: Request for current information about vessel traffic, movement, or congestion in a specific area.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: VTS Taranto, this is tanker Mercury: request advise traffic for outbound route via West Channel, over.

termTranslations.vi: Thông báo tình hình giao thông
termTranslations.th: แจ้งข้อมูลการจราจร

usageTranslations.en: VTS Taranto, this is tanker Mercury: request advise traffic for outbound route via West Channel, over.
usageTranslations.tr: VTS Taranto, burası tanker Mercury: Batı Kanalı çıkış rotası için trafik bilgisi talep ediyorum, tamam.
usageTranslations.fr: VTS Tarente, ici tanker Mercury : demande d'information sur le trafic en sortie par le chenal Ouest, terminé.
usageTranslations.de: VTS Taranto, hier Tanker Mercury: bitte Verkehrsinformation für die Ausfahrt über den Westkanal, kommen.
usageTranslations.es: VTS Tarento, aquí petrolero Mercury: solicito información de tráfico para la ruta de salida por el Canal Oeste, cambio.
usageTranslations.zh: 塔兰托VTS，这里是油轮Mercury：请求西航道出口路线的交通信息，完毕。
usageTranslations.ar: VTS تارانتو، هنا الناقلة Mercury: أطلب معلومات حركة المرور لمسار الخروج عبر القناة الغربية، انتهى.
usageTranslations.pt: VTS Taranto, aqui petroleiro Mercury: solicito informação de tráfego para saída pelo Canal Oeste, câmbio.
usageTranslations.ru: VTS Таранто, это танкер Mercury: прошу сообщить об обстановке на выходном маршруте через Западный канал, приём.
usageTranslations.ja: VTSタラント、こちらタンカーMercury：西水路経由の出航ルートの交通状況を通知願う、どうぞ。
usageTranslations.it: VTS Taranto, qui petroliera Mercury: richiedo informazioni traffico per uscita via Canale Ovest, passo.
usageTranslations.vi: VTS Taranto, đây là tàu dầu Mercury: yêu cầu thông báo giao thông cho tuyến ra qua kênh Tây, trả lời.
usageTranslations.hi: VTS Taranto, यहाँ टैंकर Mercury: पश्चिमी चैनल से बाहर जाने वाले मार्ग के लिए ट्रैफिक की सूचना चाहिए, ओवर।
usageTranslations.th: VTS Taranto, ที่นี่เรือบรรทุก Mercury: ขอข้อมูลการจราจรทางช่องตะวันตก ขอบคุณ
usageTranslations.id: VTS Taranto, di sini tanker Mercury: minta info lalu lintas untuk rute keluar via Kanal Barat, over.

terms.definition: Notification that a hazard, such as a floating object or wreck, is present and may endanger navigation.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Obstruction reported near buoy Sierra, possible floating log at position five two degrees zero seven decimal six minutes north, zero zero two degrees one five decimal four minutes west.

termTranslations.th: รายงานสิ่งกีดขวางแล้ว

usageTranslations.en: Obstruction reported near buoy Sierra, possible floating log at position 52°07.6′ N 002°15.4′ W.
usageTranslations.tr: Sierra şamandırası yakınında engel rapor edildi, pozisyon 52°07.6′ K 002°15.4′ B, muhtemel yüzen kütük.
usageTranslations.fr: Obstacle signalé près de la bouée Sierra, possible tronc flottant à la position 52°07.6′ N 002°15.4′ O.
usageTranslations.de: Hindernis bei Tonne Sierra gemeldet, mögliches Treibholz, Position 52°07,6′ N 002°15,4′ W.
usageTranslations.es: Obstrucción reportada cerca de la boya Sierra, posible tronco flotante en posición 52°07.6′ N 002°15.4′ O.
usageTranslations.zh: 在Sierra浮标附近报告有障碍物，位置52°07.6′N 002°15.4′W，可能为漂浮木。
usageTranslations.ar: تم الإبلاغ عن عائق بالقرب من عوامة Sierra، جذع عائم محتمل في الموقع 52°07.6′ شمالاً 002°15.4′ غرباً.
usageTranslations.pt: Obstrução reportada próxima à bóia Sierra, possível tronco flutuante na posição 52°07.6′ N 002°15.4′ O.
usageTranslations.ru: О препятствии сообщено у буя Сьерра, возможно плавающее бревно, позиция 52°07.6′ N 002°15.4′ W.
usageTranslations.ja: Sierraブイ付近で障害物報告、位置52°07.6′N 002°15.4′W、漂流丸太の可能性あり。
usageTranslations.it: Ostacolo segnalato vicino alla boa Sierra, possibile tronco galleggiante a posizione 52°07.6′ N 002°15.4′ O.
usageTranslations.vi: Báo cáo vật cản gần phao Sierra, khả năng có khúc gỗ trôi tại vị trí 52°07.6′B 002°15.4′T.
usageTranslations.hi: Sierra बुआ के पास अवरोध की सूचना मिली, स्थिति 52°07.6′N 002°15.4′W, संभवतः तैरती लकड़ी।
usageTranslations.th: รายงานสิ่งกีดขวางใกล้ทุ่น Sierra อาจเป็นไม้ลอย ตำแหน่ง 52°07.6′N 002°15.4′W
usageTranslations.id: Hambatan dilaporkan di dekat buoy Sierra, kemungkinan kayu apung pada posisi 52°07.6′ N 002°15.4′ W.

terms.definition: Warning regarding electrical systems or cables carrying dangerous voltage levels, requiring safety precautions.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Caution: high voltage equipment being tested in engine room, all personnel must keep clear and observe safety measures.

termTranslations.th: แรงดันสูง

usageTranslations.en: Caution: high voltage equipment being tested in engine room, all personnel must keep clear and observe safety measures.
usageTranslations.tr: Dikkat: makine dairesinde yüksek voltajlı ekipman test ediliyor, tüm personel uzak durmalı ve güvenlik önlemlerine uymalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Attention : équipement haute tension testé en salle des machines, tout le personnel doit rester à l'écart et observer les mesures de sécurité.
usageTranslations.de: Achtung: Hochspannungsausrüstung im Maschinenraum wird getestet, alle Personen fernhalten und Sicherheitsmaßnahmen beachten.
usageTranslations.es: Precaución: se está probando equipo de alta tensión en sala de máquinas, todo el personal debe mantenerse alejado y cumplir medidas de seguridad.
usageTranslations.zh: 注意：机舱内正在测试高压设备，所有人员须远离并遵守安全措施。
usageTranslations.ar: تحذير: يتم اختبار معدات الجهد العالي في غرفة المحركات، يجب على جميع الأفراد الابتعاد واتباع تدابير السلامة.
usageTranslations.pt: Atenção: equipamento de alta voltagem sendo testado na casa de máquinas, todo o pessoal deve manter distância e seguir as medidas de segurança.
usageTranslations.ru: Внимание: в машинном отделении проводится испытание оборудования высокого напряжения, всем соблюдать осторожность и меры безопасности.
usageTranslations.ja: 注意：機関室で高電圧機器のテスト中、全員安全措置を守り離れてください。
usageTranslations.it: Attenzione: attrezzatura ad alta tensione in prova in sala macchine, tutto il personale deve tenersi a distanza e rispettare le misure di sicurezza.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảnh báo: thiết bị điện áp cao đang thử nghiệm trong phòng máy, toàn bộ nhân viên giữ khoảng cách và tuân thủ an toàn.
usageTranslations.hi: सावधानी: इंजन रूम में उच्च वोल्टेज उपकरण का परीक्षण हो रहा है, सभी कर्मियों को दूर रहना चाहिए और सुरक्षा उपायों का पालन करना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ระวัง: อุปกรณ์แรงดันสูงกำลังทดสอบในห้องเครื่อง กรุณาหลีกเลี่ยงและปฏิบัติตามมาตรการความปลอดภัย
usageTranslations.id: Perhatian: peralatan tegangan tinggi sedang diuji di ruang mesin, seluruh kru harus menjaga jarak dan mematuhi langkah-langkah keselamatan.

terms.definition: A statement or confirmation that a vessel’s present heading will not be altered.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: This is VTS Singapore: confirm you will keep course unchanged until abeam buoy Alpha for traffic separation.

termTranslations.th: ยังคงทิศเดิม

usageTranslations.en: This is VTS Singapore: confirm you will keep course unchanged until abeam buoy Alpha for traffic separation.
usageTranslations.tr: Burası VTS Singapur: trafik ayrımı için Alpha şamandırası sancağınızda olana kadar rotayı değiştirmeyeceğinizi teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Ici VTS Singapour : confirmez que vous garderez le cap inchangé jusqu'à la bouée Alpha pour la séparation du trafic.
usageTranslations.de: Hier ist VTS Singapur: bestätigen Sie, dass Sie den Kurs bis zur Tonne Alpha unverändert halten zur Verkehrstrennung.
usageTranslations.es: Aquí VTS Singapur: confirme que mantendrá el rumbo sin cambio hasta la boya Alpha para la separación del tráfico.
usageTranslations.zh: 这里是新加坡VTS：请确认你将在Alpha浮标横过前航向不变以便交通分流。
usageTranslations.ar: هنا VTS سنغافورة: أكد أنك ستبقي على المسار دون تغيير حتى تكون بجانب عوامة Alpha للفصل المروري.
usageTranslations.pt: Aqui é o VTS Singapura: confirme que manterá o rumo inalterado até passar a bóia Alpha para separação de tráfego.
usageTranslations.ru: Это VTS Сингапур: подтвердите, что сохраняете курс без изменений до прохождения буя Alpha для разделения движения.
usageTranslations.ja: こちらVTSシンガポール：Alphaブイ横まで針路変更なしで進行することを確認してください。交通分離のため。
usageTranslations.it: Qui VTS Singapore: confermare che manterrete rotta invariata fino alla boa Alpha per la separazione del traffico.
usageTranslations.vi: Đây là VTS Singapore: xác nhận giữ nguyên hướng cho đến khi qua phao Alpha để phân luồng.
usageTranslations.hi: यह VTS सिंगापुर है: ट्रैफिक अलगाव के लिए Alpha बुआ तक कोर्स अपरिवर्तित रखने की पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: นี่คือ VTS สิงคโปร์: กรุณายืนยันว่าจะยังคงทิศเดิมจนถึงทุ่น Alpha เพื่อแยกจราจร
usageTranslations.id: Ini VTS Singapura: konfirmasi bahwa Anda akan tetap haluan sampai di buoy Alpha untuk pemisahan lalu lintas.

terms.definition: Designated process and location where a maritime pilot embarks or disembarks from a vessel.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Pilot boarding area is near buoy Hotel, proceed slow ahead and rig pilot ladder starboard side.

termTranslations.th: รับไกด์

usageTranslations.en: Pilot boarding area is near buoy Hotel, proceed slow ahead and rig pilot ladder starboard side.
usageTranslations.tr: Kılavuz alınış bölgesi Hotel şamandırası yakınında, yavaş ilerleyin ve pilot iskelesini sancak tarafa kurun.
usageTranslations.fr: Zone d'embarquement du pilote près de la bouée Hotel, avancez lentement et installez l'échelle de pilote côté tribord.
usageTranslations.de: Lotsenübernahmebereich nahe Tonne Hotel, langsam voraus und Lotsenleiter steuerbord ausbringen.
usageTranslations.es: Zona de embarque de práctico cerca de la boya Hotel, avance despacio y coloque la escala de práctico a estribor.
usageTranslations.zh: 引航员登轮区在Hotel浮标附近，请慢速前进并在右舷准备引航梯。
usageTranslations.ar: منطقة صعود المرشد البحري بالقرب من عوامة Hotel، تقدم ببطء وجهز سلم المرشد على الجانب الأيمن.
usageTranslations.pt: Área de embarque do prático próxima à bóia Hotel, siga devagar e coloque a escada de prático a boreste.
usageTranslations.ru: Место посадки лоцмана у буя Hotel, двигайтесь медленно и выставьте лоцманский трап с правого борта.
usageTranslations.ja: パイロット乗船エリアはHotelブイ付近、徐行し右舷にパイロットラダーを用意せよ。
usageTranslations.it: Zona imbarco pilota vicino alla boa Hotel, procedere lentamente e mettere la scala pilota lato dritta.
usageTranslations.vi: Khu vực đón hoa tiêu gần phao Hotel, đi chậm và bố trí thang hoa tiêu bên phải.
usageTranslations.hi: पायलट बोर्डिंग क्षेत्र Hotel बुआ के पास है, धीरे आगे बढ़ें और दाहिनी ओर पायलट सीढ़ी लगाएँ।
usageTranslations.th: จุดรับไกด์อยู่ใกล้ทุ่น Hotel กรุณาเคลื่อนตัวช้า ๆ และติดตั้งบันไดขึ้นเรือด้านขวา
usageTranslations.id: Area naik pilot di dekat buoy Hotel, jalan perlahan dan pasang tangga pilot sisi kanan.

terms.definition: Official VHF or NAVTEX message to all ships concerning safety-related information or urgent warnings.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Safety broadcast to all vessels: reduced visibility due to fog, sound signals must be used in port approaches.

termTranslations.th: ประกาศความปลอดภัย

usageTranslations.en: Safety broadcast to all vessels: reduced visibility due to fog, sound signals must be used in port approaches.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm gemilere emniyet yayını: sis nedeniyle görüş mesafesi azaldı, liman yaklaşmalarında sesli uyarı kullanılmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Diffusion de sécurité à tous navires : visibilité réduite en raison du brouillard, signaux sonores obligatoires à l'approche du port.
usageTranslations.de: Sicherheitsmeldung an alle Schiffe: verminderte Sicht durch Nebel, Schallsignale im Hafenbereich erforderlich.
usageTranslations.es: Difusión de seguridad a todos los buques: visibilidad reducida por niebla, señales sonoras obligatorias en aproximaciones al puerto.
usageTranslations.zh: 安全广播至所有船舶：因雾能见度降低，进港需使用声号。
usageTranslations.ar: بث السلامة لجميع السفن: ضعف الرؤية بسبب الضباب، يجب استخدام الإشارات الصوتية عند اقتراب الميناء.
usageTranslations.pt: Transmissão de segurança a todos os navios: visibilidade reduzida devido à névoa, sinais sonoros devem ser usados na aproximação ao porto.
usageTranslations.ru: Сообщение безопасности всем судам: видимость снижена из-за тумана, при подходе к порту используйте звуковые сигналы.
usageTranslations.ja: 全船舶へ安全放送：霧のため視程不良、港湾接近時は音響信号を使用してください。
usageTranslations.it: Trasmissione di sicurezza a tutte le navi: visibilità ridotta per nebbia, segnali acustici obbligatori in avvicinamento al porto.
usageTranslations.vi: Phát thông báo an toàn đến tất cả tàu: sương mù làm giảm tầm nhìn, phải sử dụng tín hiệu âm thanh khi tiếp cận cảng.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी जहाजों को सुरक्षा प्रसारण: कोहरे के कारण दृश्यता कम है, बंदरगाह के पास ध्वनि संकेतों का उपयोग आवश्यक।
usageTranslations.th: ประกาศความปลอดภัยถึงเรือทุกลำ: หมอกหนาทำให้ทัศนวิสัยต่ำ ต้องใช้สัญญาณเสียงเมื่อเข้าใกล้ท่าเรือ
usageTranslations.id: Siaran keselamatan ke semua kapal: jarak pandang menurun karena kabut, gunakan sinyal suara saat mendekati pelabuhan.

terms.definition: Official notification that a previously transmitted message or warning is no longer valid or has been withdrawn.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All stations, cancel message concerning shoal reported near buoy Victor, obstruction no longer present.

termTranslations.th: ยกเลิกข้อความ

usageTranslations.en: All stations, cancel message concerning shoal reported near buoy Victor, obstruction no longer present.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm istasyonlar, Victor şamandırası yakınındaki sığlık hakkındaki mesaj iptal, engel artık yok.
usageTranslations.fr: Toutes stations, annulation du message concernant le haut-fond signalé près de la bouée Victor, obstacle disparu.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Stationen, Meldung über Untiefe bei Tonne Victor aufgehoben, Hindernis nicht mehr vorhanden.
usageTranslations.es: Todas las estaciones, cancelar mensaje sobre banco reportado cerca de la boya Victor, la obstrucción ya no existe.
usageTranslations.zh: 各台，取消关于Victor浮标附近浅滩的消息，障碍物已不在。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع المحطات، إلغاء الرسالة المتعلقة بالشعاب بالقرب من عوامة Victor، العائق لم يعد موجودًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Todas as estações, cancelar mensagem sobre banco relatado perto da bóia Victor, obstrução não está mais presente.
usageTranslations.ru: Всем станциям, сообщение о мели у буя Victor отменено, препятствие отсутствует.
usageTranslations.ja: 全局、Victorブイ付近の浅瀬に関するメッセージは取消し、障害物は消滅。
usageTranslations.it: Tutte le stazioni, annulla messaggio riguardante il basso fondale vicino alla boa Victor, ostacolo non più presente.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả các trạm, hủy thông báo về bãi cạn gần phao Victor, vật cản không còn tồn tại.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी स्टेशनों, Victor बुआ के पास रिपोर्ट की गई उथली जगह के बारे में संदेश रद्द, अवरोध अब नहीं है।
usageTranslations.th: ทุกสถานี ยกเลิกข้อความเกี่ยวกับสันดอนใกล้ทุ่น Victor ไม่มีสิ่งกีดขวางแล้ว
usageTranslations.id: Semua stasiun, batalkan pesan tentang dangkalan di dekat buoy Victor, hambatan sudah tidak ada.

terms.definition: A warning that the vessel’s gyrocompass cannot be trusted for accurate heading information.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Gyro unreliable, switching to magnetic compass for steering, all course alterations must be confirmed visually.

termTranslations.th: ไจโรไม่เสถียร

usageTranslations.en: Gyro unreliable, switching to magnetic compass for steering, all course alterations must be confirmed visually.
usageTranslations.tr: Jiroskop arızalı, dümeni pusula ile tutuyoruz, rota değişiklikleri mutlaka görsel olarak teyit edilmeli.
usageTranslations.fr: Gyrocompas non fiable, passage à la boussole magnétique pour la barre, toutes les modifications de cap doivent être confirmées visuellement.
usageTranslations.de: Kreiselkompass unzuverlässig, Steuerung erfolgt mit Magnetkompass, Kursänderungen sind visuell zu bestätigen.
usageTranslations.es: Girocompás no fiable, se pasa a la brújula magnética para el gobierno, todos los cambios de rumbo deben confirmarse visualmente.
usageTranslations.zh: 陀螺仪不可靠，转用磁罗盘操舵，所有变向须目视确认。
usageTranslations.ar: جيروسكوب غير موثوق، التحول إلى البوصلة المغناطيسية للتوجيه، يجب تأكيد جميع تغييرات المسار بصريًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Giro não confiável, passando para bússola magnética para governo, todas as alterações de rumo devem ser confirmadas visualmente.
usageTranslations.ru: Гирокомпас неисправен, переходим на магнитный компас, все изменения курса подтверждать визуально.
usageTranslations.ja: ジャイロ不安定、操舵は磁気コンパスで実施、針路変更はすべて目視確認。
usageTranslations.it: Giro non affidabile, utilizzo della bussola magnetica per la rotta, ogni variazione va confermata visivamente.
usageTranslations.vi: Gyro không ổn định, chuyển sang la bàn từ để lái, mọi đổi hướng phải xác nhận bằng mắt.
usageTranslations.hi: गायरो अविश्वसनीय है, स्टीयरिंग के लिए मैग्नेटिक कंपास का उपयोग कर रहे हैं, सभी कोर्स परिवर्तन दृश्य रूप से पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: ไจโรไม่เสถียร ใช้เข็มทิศแม่เหล็กแทน การเปลี่ยนทิศต้องยืนยันด้วยสายตา
usageTranslations.id: Gyro tidak dapat diandalkan, beralih ke kompas magnetik untuk kemudi, setiap perubahan haluan harus dikonfirmasi secara visual.

terms.definition: Situation where a vessel’s anchor does not hold, causing the ship to drift from its intended position.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: MV Lotus, this is harbour control: your vessel appears to drag anchor in anchorage Bravo, suggest heaving up and repositioning.

termTranslations.th: สมอไถล

usageTranslations.en: MV Lotus, this is harbour control: your vessel appears to drag anchor in anchorage Bravo, suggest heaving up and repositioning.
usageTranslations.tr: MV Lotus, burası liman kontrol: geminiz Bravo demir yerinde demir tarıyor görünüyor, demiri toplayıp pozisyonunuzu düzeltmenizi öneririz.
usageTranslations.fr: MV Lotus, ici contrôle du port : votre navire semble déraper à la zone de mouillage Bravo, suggère de remonter l’ancre et de repositionner.
usageTranslations.de: MV Lotus, hier Hafenaufsicht: Ihr Schiff scheint im Ankerplatz Bravo zu driften, bitte Anker lichten und neu positionieren.
usageTranslations.es: MV Lotus, aquí control de puerto: su buque parece estar garreando en fondeadero Bravo, sugiero levar ancla y reposicionar.
usageTranslations.zh: MV Lotus，这里是港口管制：您的船只在Bravo锚地似乎锚拖移，建议起锚重新定位。
usageTranslations.ar: السفينة Lotus، هنا مراقبة الميناء: يبدو أن سفينتك تسحب المرساة في منطقة Bravo، نقترح رفع المرساة وإعادة التموضع.
usageTranslations.pt: MV Lotus, aqui é o controle do porto: sua embarcação parece estar garreando na âncora Bravo, sugerimos suspender e reposicionar.
usageTranslations.ru: MV Lotus, это портовый контроль: ваше судно, похоже, тащит якорь на якорной стоянке Браво, советуем выбрать якорь и переместиться.
usageTranslations.ja: MV Lotus、こちらハーバーコントロール：Bravo停泊地で錨がずれているようです。錨を巻き上げて位置修正を。
usageTranslations.it: MV Lotus, qui controllo porto: la vostra nave sembra che arrezza l’ancora nell’area Bravo, si consiglia di salpare e riposizionarsi.
usageTranslations.vi: MV Lotus, đây là kiểm soát cảng: tàu bạn có vẻ neo bị trượt ở khu neo Bravo, đề nghị kéo neo và định vị lại.
usageTranslations.hi: MV Lotus, यहाँ हार्बर कंट्रोल: आपके जहाज का एंकर Bravo एंकरिज में फिसल रहा है, कृपया एंकर उठाएँ और पुनः स्थिति लें।
usageTranslations.th: MV Lotus, ที่นี่ควบคุมท่าเรือ: เรือของคุณดูเหมือนสมอไถลที่จุด Bravo กรุณายกสมอและจัดตำแหน่งใหม่
usageTranslations.id: MV Lotus, di sini kontrol pelabuhan: kapal Anda tampaknya jangkar terseret di area Bravo, harap angkat jangkar dan reposisi.

terms.definition: Instruction to maintain a listening watch on a specified VHF channel for further communication or safety messages.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Keep listening on VHF channel one-six for further instructions regarding berth allocation and safety information.

termTranslations.th: ฟังต่อไป

usageTranslations.en: Keep listening on VHF channel one-six for further instructions regarding berth allocation and safety information.
usageTranslations.tr: Rıhtım tahsisi ve emniyet bilgileri için VHF kanal 16’da dinlemede kalın.
usageTranslations.fr: Restez à l’écoute sur le canal VHF 16 pour de nouvelles instructions sur l’affectation du poste et les informations de sécurité.
usageTranslations.de: Bleiben Sie auf UKW-Kanal 16 für weitere Anweisungen zu Liegeplatz und Sicherheitshinweise auf Empfang.
usageTranslations.es: Permanezca a la escucha en VHF canal dieciséis para más instrucciones sobre asignación de atraque e información de seguridad.
usageTranslations.zh: 请继续在VHF16频道监听，以获取泊位分配和安全信息的进一步指示。
usageTranslations.ar: استمر في الاستماع على قناة VHF 16 لتلقي تعليمات إضافية حول تخصيص الرصيف ومعلومات السلامة.
usageTranslations.pt: Continue ouvindo no canal VHF dezesseis para novas instruções sobre alocação de atracação e informações de segurança.
usageTranslations.ru: Оставайтесь на связи на УКВ-канале 16 для дальнейших указаний по швартовке и безопасности.
usageTranslations.ja: バース割り当てと安全情報のためVHF16chで引き続き聴取してください。
usageTranslations.it: Rimanere in ascolto sul canale VHF sedici per ulteriori istruzioni su assegnazione ormeggio e sicurezza.
usageTranslations.vi: Tiếp tục lắng nghe trên VHF kênh 16 để nhận hướng dẫn về phân bổ cầu và thông tin an toàn.
usageTranslations.hi: र berth आवंटन और सुरक्षा जानकारी के लिए VHF चैनल 16 पर सुनते रहें।
usageTranslations.th: ฟังต่อไปที่ช่อง VHF 16 สำหรับคำแนะนำเพิ่มเติมเกี่ยวกับท่าจอดและข้อมูลความปลอดภัย
usageTranslations.id: Tetap mendengarkan di kanal VHF enam belas untuk instruksi lebih lanjut tentang penempatan dermaga dan info keselamatan.

terms.definition: Instruction to maintain current position, either at anchor or underway, until further orders are received.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Pilot launch Delta, hold position at waiting area until further instructions for pilot transfer.

termTranslations.th: อยู่กับที่

usageTranslations.en: Pilot launch Delta, hold position at waiting area until further instructions for pilot transfer.
usageTranslations.tr: Pilot botu Delta, kılavuz transferi için yeni talimat gelene kadar bekleme bölgesinde mevcut pozisyonunu koru.
usageTranslations.fr: Pilotine Delta, maintenez la position en zone d’attente jusqu’à nouvel ordre pour le transfert du pilote.
usageTranslations.de: Lotsenboot Delta, halten Sie Position im Wartebereich bis weitere Anweisungen zur Lotsenübernahme.
usageTranslations.es: Lancha piloto Delta, mantenga posición en la zona de espera hasta nuevas instrucciones para transferencia de práctico.
usageTranslations.zh: 引航艇Delta，请在等候区保持位置，等待进一步的引航转移指令。
usageTranslations.ar: قارب الإرشاد Delta، احتفظ بالموقع في منطقة الانتظار حتى تعليمات أخرى بشأن نقل المرشد.
usageTranslations.pt: Lancha de prático Delta, mantenha posição na área de espera até novas instruções para transferência do prático.
usageTranslations.ru: Лоцманский катер Delta, удерживайте позицию в зоне ожидания до дальнейших указаний по передаче лоцмана.
usageTranslations.ja: パイロットランチDelta、現位置で待機、今後の指示を待て。
usageTranslations.it: Pilotina Delta, mantieni la posizione in area di attesa fino a nuove istruzioni per il trasferimento del pilota.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu hoa tiêu Delta, giữ vị trí tại khu vực chờ đến khi có chỉ dẫn tiếp theo về chuyển hoa tiêu.
usageTranslations.hi: पायलट लांच डेल्टा, पायलट ट्रांसफर के लिए आगे के निर्देश तक प्रतीक्षालय में स्थिति बनाए रखें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือไกด์ Delta กรุณาอยู่กับที่ที่จุดรอจนกว่าจะมีคำสั่งถัดไปสำหรับการรับส่งไกด์
usageTranslations.id: Kapal pilot Delta, tahan posisi di area tunggu hingga ada instruksi selanjutnya untuk transfer pilot.

terms.definition: Formal confirmation of receipt of a distress message, typically using prescribed wording as per SMCP and ITU RR.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Mayday, mayday, all stations, MV Stella, position three seven degrees north zero zero five degrees east, engine room fire, request assistance. Acknowledge distress.

termTranslations.vi: Xác nhận nhận tín hiệu cấp cứu
termTranslations.th: ยืนยันรับเหตุฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: Mayday, mayday, all stations, MV Stella, position 37°N 005°E, engine room fire, request assistance. Acknowledge distress.
usageTranslations.tr: Mayday, mayday, tüm istasyonlar, MV Stella, pozisyon 37°K 005°D, makine dairesinde yangın, yardım talep ediliyor. Tehlike mesajını aldım.
usageTranslations.fr: Mayday, mayday, toutes stations, MV Stella, position 37°N 005°E, feu en machine, demande assistance. Accusé de réception de détresse.
usageTranslations.de: Mayday, mayday, alle Stationen, MV Stella, Position 37°N 005°E, Maschinenraumbrand, bitte Hilfe. Notmeldung bestätigt.
usageTranslations.es: Mayday, mayday, todas las estaciones, MV Stella, posición 37°N 005°E, incendio en sala de máquinas, solicita ayuda. Acuse recibo de socorro.
usageTranslations.zh: Mayday，mayday，各台，MV Stella，位置37°N 005°E，机舱起火，请求救援。收到遇险信息。
usageTranslations.ar: نداء استغاثة، جميع المحطات، MV Stella، الموقع 37° شمال 005° شرق، حريق في غرفة المحركات، طلب مساعدة. تأكيد استلام نداء استغاثة.
usageTranslations.pt: Mayday, mayday, todas as estações, MV Stella, posição 37°N 005°E, incêndio na casa de máquinas, solicito assistência. Acuse de recebimento de socorro.
usageTranslations.ru: Мэйдэй, мэйдэй, всем станциям, MV Stella, позиция 37°N 005°E, пожар в машинном отделении, требуется помощь. Подтвердите приём бедствия.
usageTranslations.ja: メーデー、メーデー、全局、MV Stella、位置37°N 005°E、機関室火災、救援要請。遭難信号受信。
usageTranslations.it: Mayday, mayday, tutte le stazioni, MV Stella, posizione 37°N 005°E, incendio in sala macchine, richiesta assistenza. Confermo ricezione di emergenza.
usageTranslations.vi: Mayday, mayday, tất cả các trạm, MV Stella, vị trí 37°B 005°Đ, cháy phòng máy, yêu cầu hỗ trợ. Xác nhận nhận tín hiệu cấp cứu.
usageTranslations.hi: मे डे, मे डे, सभी स्टेशन, MV Stella, स्थिति 37°N 005°E, इंजन कक्ष में आग, सहायता चाहिए। आपात संदेश की पुष्टि।
usageTranslations.th: เมย์เดย์ เมย์เดย์ ทุกสถานี MV Stella ตำแหน่ง 37°N 005°E ห้องเครื่องเกิดไฟไหม้ ขอความช่วยเหลือ ยืนยันรับเหตุฉุกเฉิน
usageTranslations.id: Mayday, mayday, semua stasiun, MV Stella, posisi 37°U 005°T, kebakaran ruang mesin, minta bantuan. Konfirmasi penerimaan marabahaya.

terms.definition: Notification that radio communication is being interfered with by intentional or unintentional signal jamming.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: VTS Malta, this is MV Nordic Star: jamming detected on VHF channel one-three, unable to receive all communications, request clarification.

termTranslations.th: ตรวจพบสัญญาณรบกวน

usageTranslations.en: VTS Malta, this is MV Nordic Star: jamming detected on VHF channel one-three, unable to receive all communications, request clarification.
usageTranslations.tr: VTS Malta, burası MV Nordic Star: VHF kanal 13'te parazit tespit edildi, tüm haberleşmeleri alamıyoruz, açıklama talep ediyorum.
usageTranslations.fr: VTS Malte, ici MV Nordic Star : brouillage détecté sur VHF canal treize, impossible de recevoir toutes les communications, demande de clarification.
usageTranslations.de: VTS Malta, hier MV Nordic Star: Störung auf UKW-Kanal 13 erkannt, Empfang aller Nachrichten nicht möglich, bitte um Klärung.
usageTranslations.es: VTS Malta, aquí MV Nordic Star: interferencia detectada en VHF canal trece, no podemos recibir todas las comunicaciones, solicito aclaración.
usageTranslations.zh: 马耳他VTS，这里是MV Nordic Star：在VHF13频道检测到干扰，无法接收所有通信，请说明。
usageTranslations.ar: VTS مالطا، هنا MV Nordic Star: تم اكتشاف التشويش على قناة VHF 13، لا يمكننا استقبال جميع الاتصالات، نرجو التوضيح.
usageTranslations.pt: VTS Malta, aqui MV Nordic Star: interferência detectada no canal VHF treze, não recebemos todas as comunicações, solicitamos esclarecimento.
usageTranslations.ru: VTS Мальта, это MV Nordic Star: на УКВ-канале 13 обнаружены помехи, не можем принять все сообщения, просим разъяснить.
usageTranslations.ja: VTSマルタ、こちらMV Nordic Star：VHF13chで妨害を検知、すべての通信を受信できません。ご説明願います。
usageTranslations.it: VTS Malta, qui MV Nordic Star: jamming rilevato su VHF canale tredici, impossibile ricevere tutte le comunicazioni, richiedo chiarimenti.
usageTranslations.vi: VTS Malta, đây là MV Nordic Star: phát hiện gây nhiễu trên VHF kênh 13, không nhận đủ thông tin, đề nghị giải thích.
usageTranslations.hi: VTS माल्टा, यहाँ MV Nordic Star: VHF चैनल 13 पर जैमिंग का पता चला, सभी संचार प्राप्त नहीं हो रहे हैं, स्पष्टीकरण चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: VTS Malta, ที่นี่ MV Nordic Star: ตรวจพบสัญญาณรบกวนที่ช่อง VHF 13 รับสัญญาณไม่ครบ ขอคำชี้แจง
usageTranslations.id: VTS Malta, di sini MV Nordic Star: terdeteksi gangguan di VHF kanal tiga belas, tidak dapat menerima semua komunikasi, mohon penjelasan.

terms.definition: Request for instructions, information, or confirmation from the maritime pilot regarding navigation or maneuvers.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Advise pilot when lines are ready for heaving aboard at port side midships, and confirm radio contact before approach.

termTranslations.th: แจ้งไกด์

usageTranslations.en: Advise pilot when lines are ready for heaving aboard at port side midships, and confirm radio contact before approach.
usageTranslations.tr: Halatlar iskele orta mevkiden atılmaya hazır olduğunda kılavuza bildirin ve yanaşmadan önce telsiz bağlantısını teyit edin.
usageTranslations.fr: Informer le pilote lorsque les aussières sont prêtes à être lancées à mi-bâbord, et confirmer le contact radio avant l'approche.
usageTranslations.de: Lotsen informieren, sobald Leinen mittschiffs an Backbord klar sind, und Funkkontakt vor Annäherung bestätigen.
usageTranslations.es: Informe al práctico cuando las amarras estén listas para lanzar por el centro de babor, y confirme contacto por radio antes de la aproximación.
usageTranslations.zh: 当左舷中部缆绳可抛时通知引航员，并在靠近前确认无线电联系。
usageTranslations.ar: أبلغ المرشد البحري عند تجهيز الحبال للرفع من جانب الميناء منتصف السفينة، وحقق الاتصال اللاسلكي قبل الاقتراب.
usageTranslations.pt: Informe o prático quando as amarras estiverem prontas para içar a bombordo a meia nau, e confirme o contato rádio antes da aproximação.
usageTranslations.ru: Сообщить лоцману, когда концы готовы к подаче с левого борта в районе миделя, и подтвердить радиосвязь перед подходом.
usageTranslations.ja: 左舷中央でライン投入準備ができたらパイロットに通知し、接近前に無線連絡を確認してください。
usageTranslations.it: Avvisare il pilota quando le cime sono pronte a mezza nave lato sinistro, e confermare il contatto radio prima dell’avvicinamento.
usageTranslations.vi: Thông báo hoa tiêu khi dây buộc đã sẵn sàng bên trái giữa tàu, xác nhận liên lạc radio trước khi tiếp cận.
usageTranslations.hi: लाइनें बाईं ओर मिडशिप पर तैयार हों तो पायलट को सूचित करें, और नजदीक आने से पहले रेडियो संपर्क की पुष्टि करें।
usageTranslations.th: แจ้งไกด์เมื่อเชือกพร้อมโยนขึ้นกลางลำฝั่งซ้าย และยืนยันการติดต่อวิทยุก่อนเข้าเทียบ
usageTranslations.id: Beritahu pilot saat tali siap di sisi kiri tengah kapal, dan konfirmasi radio sebelum mendekat.

terms.definition: Statement or report that a vessel is moving towards a port or entering a specific area.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: VTS Rotterdam, this is MV Aurora: proceeding inbound via Maas Channel, request traffic update and pilot instructions.

termTranslations.th: กำลังเข้าเทียบท่า

usageTranslations.en: VTS Rotterdam, this is MV Aurora: proceeding inbound via Maas Channel, request traffic update and pilot instructions.
usageTranslations.tr: VTS Rotterdam, burası MV Aurora: Maas Kanalı üzerinden limana giriliyor, trafik bilgisi ve kılavuz talimatı istiyorum.
usageTranslations.fr: VTS Rotterdam, ici MV Aurora : en approche via le canal Maas, demande information trafic et instructions du pilote.
usageTranslations.de: VTS Rotterdam, hier MV Aurora: einlaufend über Maas-Kanal, bitte Verkehrsinformation und Lotsenanweisung.
usageTranslations.es: VTS Róterdam, aquí MV Aurora: entrando al puerto por el canal Maas, solicito actualización de tráfico e instrucciones del práctico.
usageTranslations.zh: 鹿特丹VTS，这里是MV Aurora：通过马斯航道进港，请求交通信息和引航员指示。
usageTranslations.ar: VTS روتردام، هنا MV Aurora: قادم عبر قناة ماس، أطلب تحديث حركة المرور وتعليمات المرشد البحري.
usageTranslations.pt: VTS Rotterdam, aqui MV Aurora: entrando no porto via canal Maas, solicito atualização de tráfego e instruções do prático.
usageTranslations.ru: VTS Роттердам, это MV Aurora: следую на вход через канал Маас, прошу обновление по движению и указания лоцмана.
usageTranslations.ja: VTSロッテルダム、こちらMV Aurora：Maas運河経由で入港中、交通情報とパイロット指示をお願いします。
usageTranslations.it: VTS Rotterdam, qui MV Aurora: in ingresso via canale Maas, richiedo aggiornamento traffico e istruzioni pilota.
usageTranslations.vi: VTS Rotterdam, đây là MV Aurora: đang vào cảng qua kênh Maas, yêu cầu cập nhật giao thông và hướng dẫn hoa tiêu.
usageTranslations.hi: VTS रॉटरडैम, यहाँ MV Aurora: Maas चैनल से अंदर आ रहा हूँ, ट्रैफिक अपडेट और पायलट निर्देश चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: VTS Rotterdam, ที่นี่ MV Aurora: กำลังเข้าเทียบท่าทางช่อง Maas ขออัปเดตจราจรและคำแนะนำจากไกด์
usageTranslations.id: VTS Rotterdam, di sini MV Aurora: menuju masuk melalui Kanal Maas, minta info lalu lintas dan instruksi pilot.

terms.definition: A shore-based VHF or radio station responsible for maritime safety and communication in a designated coastal area.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Contact coastal station Olympia on VHF channel one-two for meteorological report and navigation warning updates.

termTranslations.th: สถานีชายฝั่ง

usageTranslations.en: Contact coastal station Olympia on VHF channel one-two for meteorological report and navigation warning updates.
usageTranslations.tr: Meteoroloji raporu ve seyir uyarıları için VHF kanal 12’den Olympia kıyı istasyonu ile iletişime geçin.
usageTranslations.fr: Contactez la station côtière Olympia sur le canal VHF 12 pour bulletin météo et mises à jour des avertissements de navigation.
usageTranslations.de: Kontaktieren Sie die Küstenfunkstelle Olympia auf UKW-Kanal 12 für Wetterbericht und Navigationswarnungen.
usageTranslations.es: Contacte la estación costera Olympia por VHF canal 12 para reporte meteorológico y actualizaciones de advertencias de navegación.
usageTranslations.zh: 请通过VHF12频道联系Olympia沿海电台，获取气象报告和航行警告更新。
usageTranslations.ar: اتصل بمحطة ساحلية Olympia على قناة VHF 12 للحصول على تقرير الطقس وتحديثات التحذيرات الملاحية.
usageTranslations.pt: Contate a estação costeira Olympia no canal VHF doze para boletim meteorológico e avisos de navegação.
usageTranslations.ru: Свяжитесь с береговой станцией Olympia на УКВ-канале 12 для получения метеосводки и навигационных предупреждений.
usageTranslations.ja: VHF12chで沿岸局Olympiaと連絡し、気象報告および航行警報を受けてください。
usageTranslations.it: Contattare la stazione costiera Olympia sul canale VHF dodici per bollettino meteorologico e aggiornamenti degli avvisi di navigazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Liên hệ đài ven biển Olympia trên VHF kênh 12 để nhận báo cáo thời tiết và cảnh báo hàng hải.
usageTranslations.hi: मौसम रिपोर्ट और नौवहन चेतावनियों के लिए VHF चैनल 12 पर Olympia तटीय स्टेशन से संपर्क करें।
usageTranslations.th: ติดต่อสถานีชายฝั่ง Olympia ที่ช่อง VHF 12 สำหรับรายงานอากาศและอัปเดตคำเตือนเดินเรือ
usageTranslations.id: Hubungi stasiun pesisir Olympia di VHF kanal dua belas untuk laporan cuaca dan pembaruan peringatan navigasi.

terms.definition: Continuous monitoring of a specified VHF or radio frequency for traffic, safety, or distress calls.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All vessels in approaches: maintain listening watch on VHF channel one-six for traffic advisories and emergency broadcasts.

termTranslations.th: เฝ้าฟัง

usageTranslations.en: All vessels in approaches: maintain listening watch on VHF channel one-six for traffic advisories and emergency broadcasts.
usageTranslations.tr: Yaklaşmadaki tüm gemiler: trafik duyuruları ve acil yayınlar için VHF kanal 16’da dinleme nöbeti tutun.
usageTranslations.fr: Tous navires en approche : veille d’écoute sur VHF canal seize pour avis de trafic et messages d’urgence.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Schiffe im Anlauf: Hörwache auf UKW-Kanal 16 für Verkehrshinweise und Notmeldungen halten.
usageTranslations.es: Todas las naves en aproximación: mantengan escucha permanente en VHF canal 16 para avisos de tráfico y emergencias.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有进港船舶：请在VHF16频道守听，获取交通及紧急广播。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع السفن في الاقتراب: الحفاظ على مراقبة استماع على قناة VHF 16 لتلقي التنبيهات المرورية والبث الطارئ.
usageTranslations.pt: Todas as embarcações na aproximação: mantenham guarda de escuta no canal VHF dezesseis para avisos de tráfego e emergências.
usageTranslations.ru: Все суда на подходе: держите дежурство на приёме на УКВ-канале 16 для сообщений о движении и экстренных вызовов.
usageTranslations.ja: 入港中の全船舶：VHF16chで聴守し交通及び緊急放送に備えてください。
usageTranslations.it: Tutte le navi in avvicinamento: mantenere guardia d’ascolto su VHF canale sedici per avvisi di traffico e messaggi di emergenza.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả tàu khi vào luồng: trực nghe trên VHF kênh 16 để nhận thông báo giao thông và phát sóng khẩn cấp.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी जहाजों, वीएचएफ चैनल 16 पर सुनवाई ड्यूटी बनाए रखें, ट्रैफिक और इमरजेंसी के लिए।
usageTranslations.th: เรือทุกลำที่กำลังเข้าเทียบฝั่ง: เฝ้าฟังที่ VHF ช่อง 16 สำหรับประกาศจราจรและเหตุฉุกเฉิน
usageTranslations.id: Semua kapal di jalur masuk: jaga dengar di VHF kanal enam belas untuk info lalu lintas dan siaran darurat.

terms.definition: Request or instruction to verify and report the current location of a vessel, typically in latitude and longitude.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: MV Orion, confirm position for traffic separation scheme, report in latitude and longitude using degrees and minutes.

termTranslations.th: ยืนยันตำแหน่ง

usageTranslations.en: MV Orion, confirm position for traffic separation scheme, report in latitude and longitude using degrees and minutes.
usageTranslations.tr: MV Orion, trafik ayırım düzeni için pozisyonunuzu teyit edin, derece ve dakika olarak bildirin.
usageTranslations.fr: MV Orion, confirmez la position pour le dispositif de séparation du trafic, indiquez en latitude et longitude (degrés et minutes).
usageTranslations.de: MV Orion, bestätigen Sie die Position für das Verkehrstrennungsgebiet, melden Sie in Breite und Länge in Grad und Minuten.
usageTranslations.es: MV Orion, confirme posición para el esquema de separación de tráfico, reporte en latitud y longitud con grados y minutos.
usageTranslations.zh: MV Orion，请为交通分隔区确认位置，用度和分报告经纬度。
usageTranslations.ar: MV Orion، أكد الموقع لنظام فصل الحركة، أبلغ بالخطوط والعرض باستخدام الدرجات والدقائق.
usageTranslations.pt: MV Orion, confirme a posição para o esquema de separação de tráfego, reporte em latitude e longitude em graus e minutos.
usageTranslations.ru: MV Orion, подтвердите позицию для схемы разделения движения, сообщите широту и долготу в градусах и минутах.
usageTranslations.ja: MV Orion、交通分離方式のため位置確認、度分で緯度経度報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: MV Orion, confermare posizione per schema separazione traffico, riferire in latitudine e longitudine con gradi e minuti.
usageTranslations.vi: MV Orion, xác nhận vị trí để phân luồng, báo cáo tọa độ vĩ độ và kinh độ bằng độ và phút.
usageTranslations.hi: MV Orion, ट्रैफिक सेपरेशन स्कीम के लिए स्थिति की पुष्टि करें, अक्षांश और देशांतर डिग्री-मिनट में बताएं।
usageTranslations.th: MV Orion กรุณายืนยันตำแหน่งสำหรับแผนแยกจราจร รายงานพิกัดละติจูดและลองจิจูดเป็นองศาและนาที
usageTranslations.id: MV Orion, konfirmasi posisi untuk skema pemisahan lalu lintas, laporkan lintang dan bujur dalam derajat dan menit.

terms.definition: A designated VHF radio frequency used for emergency, distress, or mandatory communication monitoring.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All vessels: maintain listening watch on guard channel VHF one-six at all times for distress or emergency traffic.

termTranslations.th: ช่องเฝ้าระวัง

usageTranslations.en: All vessels: maintain listening watch on guard channel VHF one-six at all times for distress or emergency traffic.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm gemiler: tehlike ve acil durum trafiği için VHF 16 koruma kanalında her zaman dinleme nöbeti tutun.
usageTranslations.fr: Tous navires : veille d'écoute sur le canal de garde VHF seize en permanence pour le trafic de détresse ou d'urgence.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Schiffe: Halten Sie immer Hörwache auf dem Wachkanal VHF 16 für Not- und Notfallverkehr.
usageTranslations.es: Todas las naves: mantengan escucha en el canal de guardia VHF 16 siempre para tráfico de socorro o emergencia.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有船只：请始终在VHF16警戒频道守听，以便接收遇险或紧急交通。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع السفن: حافظ على مراقبة الاستماع على قناة الحراسة VHF 16 في جميع الأوقات لحركة المرور في حالات الطوارئ أو الاستغاثة.
usageTranslations.pt: Todas as embarcações: mantenham guarda de escuta no canal de guarda VHF dezesseis para tráfego de emergência ou socorro.
usageTranslations.ru: Все суда: постоянно держите дежурство на дежурном канале VHF 16 для аварийной или бедственной связи.
usageTranslations.ja: 全船舶：VHF16ガードチャンネルで常時聴守、緊急・遭難通信に備えること。
usageTranslations.it: Tutte le navi: mantenere la guardia d'ascolto sul canale di guardia VHF sedici per il traffico di emergenza o soccorso.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả tàu: luôn trực nghe trên kênh bảo vệ VHF 16 cho các tình huống cấp cứu.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी जहाजों, आपात या संकट ट्रैफिक के लिए हमेशा गार्ड चैनल VHF 16 पर सुनवाई ड्यूटी बनाए रखें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือทุกลำ: เฝ้าฟังที่ช่องเฝ้าระวัง VHF 16 ตลอดเวลาสำหรับเหตุฉุกเฉิน
usageTranslations.id: Semua kapal: jaga dengar di kanal penjaga VHF 16 setiap saat untuk lalu lintas darurat.

terms.definition: A condition where the propeller is entangled with ropes, nets, or debris, affecting maneuverability.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: MV Vega, fouled propeller suspected, unable to maintain speed, request tug assistance at anchorage Bravo.

termTranslations.th: ใบจักรติดสิ่งของ

usageTranslations.en: MV Vega, fouled propeller suspected, unable to maintain speed, request tug assistance at anchorage Bravo.
usageTranslations.tr: MV Vega, pervaneye halat dolanmış olabilir, hızı koruyamıyoruz, Bravo demir yerine römorkör yardımı talep ediyorum.
usageTranslations.fr: MV Vega, hélice engagée soupçonnée, vitesse non maintenue, demande assistance remorqueur à mouillage Bravo.
usageTranslations.de: MV Vega, Schraube vermutlich belegt, Geschwindigkeit nicht haltbar, bitte Schlepperhilfe an Ankerplatz Bravo.
usageTranslations.es: MV Vega, se sospecha hélice enredada, no se puede mantener velocidad, solicito remolcador en fondeadero Bravo.
usageTranslations.zh: MV Vega，疑似螺旋桨缠绕，无法保持速度，请在Bravo锚地请求拖船协助。
usageTranslations.ar: MV Vega، يشتبه في تشابك المروحة، غير قادر على الحفاظ على السرعة، طلب مساعدة قاطرة في مرسى Bravo.
usageTranslations.pt: MV Vega, suspeita de hélice enredada, não consegue manter a velocidade, solicitar rebocador na âncora Bravo.
usageTranslations.ru: MV Vega, подозрение на загрязнение винта, не могу поддерживать скорость, прошу буксир на якорной стоянке Браво.
usageTranslations.ja: MV Vega、スクリュー異物混入の疑い、速度維持不可、Bravo錨地でタグボート支援要請。
usageTranslations.it: MV Vega, sospetto elica impigliata, non si mantiene la velocità, richiesta assistenza rimorchiatore all’ancoraggio Bravo.
usageTranslations.vi: MV Vega, nghi chân vịt bị vướng, không giữ được tốc độ, yêu cầu tàu kéo tại điểm neo Bravo.
usageTranslations.hi: MV Vega, प्रोपेलर में फँसा हुआ संदेह, गति बनाए नहीं रख पा रहे, Bravo एंकर पर टग सहायता चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: MV Vega, สงสัยใบจักรติดสิ่งของ ไม่สามารถรักษาความเร็ว ขอเรือลากจูงที่จุด Bravo
usageTranslations.id: MV Vega, diduga baling-baling terlilit, tidak bisa menjaga kecepatan, minta bantuan tug di area Bravo.

terms.definition: A radiotelephony urgency signal indicating a situation urgent but not immediately life-threatening; always spoken in English.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, all stations, MV Aurora, steering malfunction, require tug assistance at berth two.

termTranslations.th: Pan Pan

usageTranslations.en: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, all stations, MV Aurora, steering malfunction, require tug assistance at berth two.
usageTranslations.tr: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, tüm istasyonlar, MV Aurora, dümen arızası, 2 numaralı rıhtımda römorkör yardımı gerekiyor.
usageTranslations.fr: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, toutes stations, MV Aurora, panne de gouvernail, besoin d’assistance remorqueur au quai deux.
usageTranslations.de: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, alle Stationen, MV Aurora, Ruderausfall, benötige Schlepperhilfe am Liegeplatz zwei.
usageTranslations.es: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, todas las estaciones, MV Aurora, fallo de timón, requiere remolcador en el muelle dos.
usageTranslations.zh: Pan Pan，Pan Pan，Pan Pan，各台，MV Aurora，舵故障，需要在2号码头拖船协助。
usageTranslations.ar: Pan Pan، Pan Pan، Pan Pan، جميع المحطات، MV Aurora، عطل في الدفة، بحاجة إلى قاطرة عند الرصيف 2.
usageTranslations.pt: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, todas as estações, MV Aurora, falha no leme, necessita rebocador no cais dois.
usageTranslations.ru: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, всем станциям, MV Aurora, неисправность руля, требуется буксир на причале два.
usageTranslations.ja: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan、全局、MV Aurora、舵故障、2バースでタグボート支援要。
usageTranslations.it: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, tutte le stazioni, MV Aurora, guasto timone, serve rimorchiatore al molo due.
usageTranslations.vi: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, tất cả các trạm, MV Aurora, hỏng bánh lái, cần tàu kéo tại cầu 2.
usageTranslations.hi: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, सभी स्टेशन, MV Aurora, स्टीयरिंग खराब, बर्थ 2 पर टग सहायता चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, ทุกสถานี, MV Aurora, พวงมาลัยเสีย ต้องการเรือลากที่ท่า 2
usageTranslations.id: Pan Pan, Pan Pan, Pan Pan, semua stasiun, MV Aurora, kemudi rusak, butuh bantuan tug di dermaga dua.

terms.definition: Formal confirmation of receipt of a transmitted communication, usually by repeating essential content.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: VTS Genoa, acknowledge message regarding restricted area due to dredging, and report when clear.

termTranslations.vi: Xác nhận đã nhận thông báo
termTranslations.th: ยืนยันรับข้อความ

usageTranslations.en: VTS Genoa, acknowledge message regarding restricted area due to dredging, and report when clear.
usageTranslations.tr: VTS Cenova, tarama nedeniyle yasak bölge hakkındaki mesajı aldığınızı teyit edin ve temizlendiğinde bildirin.
usageTranslations.fr: VTS Gênes, accusé de réception du message sur la zone interdite pour dragage, et signalez lorsque libéré.
usageTranslations.de: VTS Genua, bestätigen Sie die Nachricht bezüglich des gesperrten Bereichs wegen Baggerarbeiten und melden Sie, wenn frei.
usageTranslations.es: VTS Génova, acuse recibo del mensaje sobre la zona restringida por dragado, y avise cuando esté libre.
usageTranslations.zh: 热那亚VTS，请确认收到因疏浚而受限区域的信息，并在解除后报告。
usageTranslations.ar: VTS جنوة، تأكيد استلام الرسالة بخصوص المنطقة المحظورة بسبب الجرف، وأبلغ عند الانتهاء.
usageTranslations.pt: VTS Gênova, acuse o recebimento da mensagem sobre área restrita devido à dragagem e informe quando livre.
usageTranslations.ru: VTS Генуя, подтвердите приём сообщения о закрытой зоне из-за дноуглубления, доложите по освобождению.
usageTranslations.ja: VTSジェノヴァ、浚渫による制限区域についてのメッセージを受信したことを確認し、解除時に報告してください。
usageTranslations.it: VTS Genova, confermare ricezione del messaggio sulla zona vietata per dragaggio e riferire quando libera.
usageTranslations.vi: VTS Genoa, xác nhận đã nhận thông báo về khu vực hạn chế do nạo vét, báo cáo khi khu vực đã thông.
usageTranslations.hi: VTS जेनोआ, ड्रेजिंग के कारण प्रतिबंधित क्षेत्र के बारे में संदेश की पुष्टि करें, और हट जाने पर सूचित करें।
usageTranslations.th: VTS Genoa กรุณายืนยันรับข้อความเกี่ยวกับพื้นที่ห้ามเข้าเนื่องจากขุดลอก และรายงานเมื่อเสร็จสิ้น
usageTranslations.id: VTS Genoa, konfirmasi penerimaan pesan tentang area terbatas karena pengerukan, dan laporkan jika sudah bersih.

terms.definition: Any substance or material that poses a significant risk to health, safety, or property during transport by sea, as defined by IMDG Code.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: MV Baltic Star, declare if carrying dangerous cargo as per IMDG Code before entering port limits.

termTranslations.th: สินค้าอันตราย

usageTranslations.en: MV Baltic Star, declare if carrying dangerous cargo as per IMDG Code before entering port limits.
usageTranslations.tr: MV Baltic Star, liman sınırlarına girmeden önce IMDG Koduna göre tehlikeli yük taşıyıp taşımadığını beyan et.
usageTranslations.fr: MV Baltic Star, déclarez si vous transportez une cargaison dangereuse selon le code IMDG avant d’entrer dans les limites du port.
usageTranslations.de: MV Baltic Star, geben Sie an, ob Sie gemäß IMDG-Code gefährliche Ladung führen, bevor Sie das Hafengebiet betreten.
usageTranslations.es: MV Baltic Star, declare si transporta carga peligrosa según el código IMDG antes de entrar en el puerto.
usageTranslations.zh: MV Baltic Star，在进入港区前请根据IMDG规则申报是否携带危险货物。
usageTranslations.ar: MV Baltic Star، صرح إذا كنت تحمل حمولة خطرة حسب كود IMDG قبل دخول حدود الميناء.
usageTranslations.pt: MV Baltic Star, declare se estiver transportando carga perigosa conforme o Código IMDG antes de entrar nos limites do porto.
usageTranslations.ru: MV Baltic Star, заявите, есть ли у вас опасный груз по IMDG перед входом в порт.
usageTranslations.ja: MV Baltic Star、港湾区域に入る前にIMDGコードに基づく危険貨物の有無を申告してください。
usageTranslations.it: MV Baltic Star, dichiarare se trasporta carico pericoloso secondo Codice IMDG prima di entrare nei limiti portuali.
usageTranslations.vi: MV Baltic Star, khai báo nếu chở hàng nguy hiểm theo IMDG trước khi vào cảng.
usageTranslations.hi: MV Baltic Star, बंदरगाह में प्रवेश से पहले IMDG कोड के अनुसार खतरनाक माल है या नहीं, बताएं।
usageTranslations.th: MV Baltic Star กรุณาแจ้งหากบรรทุกสินค้าอันตรายตาม IMDG Code ก่อนเข้าสู่ขอบเขตท่าเรือ
usageTranslations.id: MV Baltic Star, deklarasikan jika membawa muatan berbahaya sesuai IMDG Code sebelum memasuki batas pelabuhan.

terms.definition: Location reported by a vessel or person in distress, usually in latitude and longitude for rescue coordination.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Mayday, mayday, emergency position five zero degrees north zero zero three degrees west, life rafts launched, require immediate assistance.

termTranslations.th: ตำแหน่งฉุกเฉิน

usageTranslations.en: Mayday, mayday, emergency position 50°N 003°W, life rafts launched, require immediate assistance.
usageTranslations.tr: Mayday, mayday, acil durum pozisyonu 50°K 003°B, can salı bırakıldı, acil yardım gerekli.
usageTranslations.fr: Mayday, mayday, position d'urgence 50°N 003°O, radeaux de survie à la mer, assistance immédiate requise.
usageTranslations.de: Mayday, mayday, Notposition 50°N 003°W, Rettungsinseln ausgesetzt, sofortige Hilfe benötigt.
usageTranslations.es: Mayday, mayday, posición de emergencia 50°N 003°O, balsas salvavidas al agua, requiere ayuda inmediata.
usageTranslations.zh: Mayday，mayday，紧急位置50°N 003°W，救生筏已下水，需要立即援助。
usageTranslations.ar: نداء استغاثة، موقع الطوارئ 50° شمال 003° غرب، تم إطلاق الطوافات، مطلوب مساعدة فورية.
usageTranslations.pt: Mayday, mayday, posição de emergência 50°N 003°W, balsas salva-vidas lançadas, requer assistência imediata.
usageTranslations.ru: Мэйдэй, мэйдэй, аварийная позиция 50°N 003°W, спущены спасательные плоты, требуется немедленная помощь.
usageTranslations.ja: メーデー、メーデー、緊急位置50°N 003°W、救命いかだ投下、至急援助要。
usageTranslations.it: Mayday, mayday, posizione di emergenza 50°N 003°W, zattere di salvataggio in acqua, richiesta assistenza immediata.
usageTranslations.vi: Mayday, mayday, vị trí khẩn cấp 50°B 003°T, đã thả bè cứu sinh, cần cứu trợ ngay.
usageTranslations.hi: मे डे, मे डे, आपात स्थिति स्थान 50°N 003°W, लाइफ राफ्ट छोड़े गए, तुरंत सहायता चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: เมย์เดย์ เมย์เดย์ ตำแหน่งฉุกเฉิน 50°N 003°W ปล่อยแพชูชีพแล้ว ต้องการความช่วยเหลือทันที
usageTranslations.id: Mayday, mayday, posisi darurat 50°U 003°B, rakit penyelamat diluncurkan, butuh bantuan segera.

terms.definition: A systematic search pattern, typically used in SAR operations, covering four quadrants from a datum point to locate persons or objects.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Rescue vessel, commence quadrant search from datum two miles east of last known position, report contact immediately.

termTranslations.vi: Tìm kiếm theo góc phần tư
termTranslations.th: ค้นหาตามควอแดรนท์

usageTranslations.en: Rescue vessel, commence quadrant search from datum two miles east of last known position, report contact immediately.
usageTranslations.tr: Kurtarma gemisi, son bilinen pozisyonun iki mil doğusundan kadran arama başlat, temas halinde derhal rapor et.
usageTranslations.fr: Navire de sauvetage, commencez la recherche par quadrant à partir du point de référence à deux milles à l’est de la dernière position connue, signalez tout contact immédiatement.
usageTranslations.de: Rettungsschiff, beginnen Sie die Quadrantensuche ab dem Bezugspunkt zwei Meilen östlich der letzten bekannten Position, melden Sie sofort Kontakt.
usageTranslations.es: Buque de rescate, inicie búsqueda por cuadrantes desde el dato dos millas al este de la última posición conocida, reporte contacto de inmediato.
usageTranslations.zh: 救援船只，从最后已知位置以东两海里处起始象限搜索，立即报告发现目标。
usageTranslations.ar: سفينة الإنقاذ، ابدأ بحث رباعي من النقطة المرجعية على بعد ميلين شرق آخر موقع معروف، أبلغ عن الاتصال فورًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Navio de resgate, inicie busca em quadrante a partir do ponto de referência duas milhas a leste da última posição conhecida, reporte contato imediatamente.
usageTranslations.ru: Спасательное судно, начните квадрантный поиск от точки отсчёта в двух милях восточнее последней известной позиции, доложите о контакте немедленно.
usageTranslations.ja: 救助船は、最終確認位置から東へ2マイルの基準点よりクアドラント捜索を開始し、発見時は直ちに報告せよ。
usageTranslations.it: Unità di soccorso, iniziare la ricerca a quadranti dal dato a due miglia a est dell’ultima posizione nota, segnalare contatto immediatamente.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu cứu nạn, bắt đầu tìm kiếm theo góc phần tư từ điểm mốc cách vị trí cuối cùng hai hải lý về phía đông, báo cáo ngay khi phát hiện.
usageTranslations.hi: राहत पोत, अंतिम ज्ञात स्थिति से दो मील पूर्व के बिंदु से चतुर्थांश खोज प्रारंभ करें, संपर्क होने पर तुरंत रिपोर्ट करें।
usageTranslations.th: เรือกู้ภัย กรุณาเริ่มค้นหาตามควอแดรนท์จากจุดอ้างอิงสองไมล์ทางตะวันออกของตำแหน่งล่าสุด รายงานทันทีหากพบ
usageTranslations.id: Kapal penyelamat, mulai pencarian kuadran dari titik dua mil timur posisi terakhir, laporkan jika ada kontak segera.

terms.definition: Official notification that a previously issued warning is no longer in effect.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: All stations, cancel warning concerning floating debris reported near channel entrance, area now clear.

termTranslations.th: ยกเลิกประกาศเตือน

usageTranslations.en: All stations, cancel warning concerning floating debris reported near channel entrance, area now clear.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm istasyonlar, kanal girişi yakınında bildirilen yüzen enkazla ilgili uyarı iptal, bölge şu anda temiz.
usageTranslations.fr: Toutes stations, annuler l’avertissement concernant les débris flottants signalés à l’entrée du chenal, la zone est désormais libre.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Stationen, Warnung über Treibgut am Kanaleingang aufgehoben, Bereich jetzt frei.
usageTranslations.es: Todas las estaciones, cancelar advertencia sobre escombros flotantes cerca de la entrada del canal, zona despejada.
usageTranslations.zh: 各台，取消有关航道入口处漂浮物的警报，该区域现已清理。
usageTranslations.ar: جميع المحطات، إلغاء التحذير بشأن الحطام العائم عند مدخل القناة، المنطقة أصبحت خالية الآن.
usageTranslations.pt: Todas as estações, cancelar aviso sobre detritos flutuantes relatados perto da entrada do canal, área agora limpa.
usageTranslations.ru: Всем станциям, предупреждение о плавающем мусоре у входа в канал отменено, район очищен.
usageTranslations.ja: 全局、運河入口付近の浮遊物に関する警報は取消、エリアは現在クリアです。
usageTranslations.it: Tutte le stazioni, annulla avviso riguardante detriti galleggianti segnalati all’ingresso del canale, area ora libera.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả các trạm, hủy cảnh báo về vật trôi nổi gần cửa luồng, khu vực đã sạch.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी स्टेशनों, चैनल प्रवेश के पास पाए गए तैरते मलबे की चेतावनी रद्द, क्षेत्र अब साफ है।
usageTranslations.th: ทุกสถานี ยกเลิกประกาศเตือนเกี่ยวกับซากลอยน้ำใกล้ปากช่อง ขณะนี้พื้นที่ปลอดภัยแล้ว
usageTranslations.id: Semua stasiun, batalkan peringatan tentang puing-puing terapung di dekat pintu masuk kanal, area sekarang bersih.

terms.definition: Loss of ability to propel the vessel due to engine failure or other mechanical issues.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: MV Sunrise has lost propulsion, drifting in fairway, immediate tug assistance required, all vessels keep clear.

termTranslations.th: สูญเสียกำลังขับเคลื่อน

usageTranslations.en: MV Sunrise has lost propulsion, drifting in fairway, immediate tug assistance required, all vessels keep clear.
usageTranslations.tr: MV Sunrise itme gücünü kaybetti, seyir hattında sürükleniyor, acil römorkör yardımı gerekiyor, tüm gemiler yaklaşmasın.
usageTranslations.fr: MV Sunrise a perdu la propulsion, dérive dans le chenal, assistance remorqueur requise immédiatement, tous navires éloignez-vous.
usageTranslations.de: MV Sunrise hat Antriebsverlust, treibt im Fahrwasser, sofortige Schlepperhilfe erforderlich, alle Schiffe Abstand halten.
usageTranslations.es: MV Sunrise ha perdido propulsión, deriva en el canal, se requiere asistencia inmediata de remolcador, todas las naves mantengan distancia.
usageTranslations.zh: MV Sunrise失去推进力，在航道中漂流，急需拖船协助，请所有船只避让。
usageTranslations.ar: MV Sunrise فقدت الدفع، تنجرف في الممر الملاحي، بحاجة فورية لمساعدة قاطرة، جميع السفن ابتعدوا.
usageTranslations.pt: MV Sunrise perdeu propulsão, à deriva no canal, assistência imediata de rebocador necessária, todas as embarcações afastem-se.
usageTranslations.ru: MV Sunrise потерял ход, дрейфует в фарватере, требуется немедленная помощь буксира, всем судам держаться подальше.
usageTranslations.ja: MV Sunriseは推進力喪失、航路内を漂流中、直ちにタグボート支援必要、全船接近禁止。
usageTranslations.it: MV Sunrise ha perso la propulsione, alla deriva in canale, necessaria assistenza rimorchiatore immediata, tutte le navi stiano lontane.
usageTranslations.vi: MV Sunrise bị mất lực đẩy, đang trôi dạt trên luồng, cần trợ giúp tàu kéo ngay, tất cả tàu tránh xa.
usageTranslations.hi: MV Sunrise की संचालन शक्ति चली गई, फेयरवे में बह रहा है, तत्काल टग सहायता चाहिए, सभी जहाज दूर रहें।
usageTranslations.th: MV Sunrise สูญเสียกำลังขับเคลื่อน ลอยอยู่ในทางเดิน ต้องการเรือลากด่วน เรือทุกลำโปรดหลีกเลี่ยง
usageTranslations.id: MV Sunrise kehilangan tenaga dorong, hanyut di jalur pelayaran, butuh bantuan tug segera, semua kapal menjauh.

terms.definition: All procedures related to securing or unmooring a vessel to or from a berth, buoy, or anchorage.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Crew to stations for mooring operations, prepare lines fore and aft, report ready for all fast alongside quay.

termTranslations.th: ปฏิบัติการเทียบเรือ

usageTranslations.en: Crew to stations for mooring operations, prepare lines fore and aft, report ready for all fast alongside quay.
usageTranslations.tr: Bağlama işlemleri için personel istasyonlara, baş ve kıç halatları hazırlayın, iskeleye tamamen yanaştığında hazır olun.
usageTranslations.fr: Équipage aux postes pour opérations d’amarrage, préparez les aussières avant et arrière, signalez prêt une fois amarré au quai.
usageTranslations.de: Besatzung an die Stationen für Festmachmanöver, Leinen vorne und achtern bereitlegen, melden, wenn fest an der Pier.
usageTranslations.es: Tripulación a los puestos para operaciones de amarre, preparar cabos proa y popa, reportar listo cuando amarrado al muelle.
usageTranslations.zh: 系泊作业，各岗位就位，前后缆绳准备好，靠泊完成后报告准备就绪。
usageTranslations.ar: الطاقم إلى المحطات لعمليات الإرساء، حضر الحبال للأمام والخلف، أبلغ عند الجاهزية بالكامل بجانب الرصيف.
usageTranslations.pt: Tripulação aos postos para operações de amarração, preparar cabos de proa e popa, relatar pronto quando atracado.
usageTranslations.ru: Экипаж по местам для швартовых операций, подготовить носовые и кормовые концы, доложить о готовности при полном швартовании.
usageTranslations.ja: 係留作業のためクルーは持ち場につき、前後のロープを用意し、接岸完了時に準備完了を報告せよ。
usageTranslations.it: Equipaggio ai posti per ormeggio, preparare cime prua e poppa, segnalare pronto quando tutto ormeggiato.
usageTranslations.vi: Thủy thủ vào vị trí cho hoạt động neo buộc, chuẩn bị dây mũi và lái, báo cáo khi đã neo xong dọc cầu.
usageTranslations.hi: मूरिंग संचालन के लिए दल अपने स्थान पर जाएं, आगे और पीछे की रस्सियाँ तैयार करें, पूरी तरह लगने पर तैयार होने की रिपोर्ट दें।
usageTranslations.th: ลูกเรือประจำตำแหน่งปฏิบัติการเทียบเรือ เตรียมเชือกหัวท้าย รายงานเมื่อเทียบติดท่าเรือครบถ้วน
usageTranslations.id: Kru ke pos untuk operasi tambat, siapkan tali depan dan belakang, laporkan jika sudah tambat penuh di dermaga.

terms.definition: Regular training exercises involving the launching and operation of lifeboats as per SOLAS requirements.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: Lifeboat drills scheduled at 1000 hours, all crew musters on boat deck, safety equipment to be checked before lowering.

termTranslations.th: ฝึกซ้อมเรือชูชีพ

usageTranslations.en: Lifeboat drills scheduled at 1000 hours, all crew musters on boat deck, safety equipment to be checked before lowering.
usageTranslations.tr: Can salı tatbikatı saat 10:00’da planlandı, tüm personel bot güvertesinde toplanacak, indirme öncesi emniyet ekipmanları kontrol edilecek.
usageTranslations.fr: Exercices de canot de sauvetage programmés à 10h00, tout l’équipage rassemblé sur le pont des embarcations, vérifier l’équipement de sécurité avant la mise à l’eau.
usageTranslations.de: Rettungsbootübungen für 10:00 Uhr angesetzt, gesamte Besatzung auf dem Bootdeck, Sicherheitsausrüstung vor dem Absenken prüfen.
usageTranslations.es: Simulacro de bote salvavidas programado a las 10:00, toda la tripulación reunida en la cubierta del bote, revisar el equipo de seguridad antes de arriar.
usageTranslations.zh: 救生艇演习定于10:00，所有船员在艇甲板集合，下放前检查安全设备。
usageTranslations.ar: تم جدولة تدريبات قوارب النجاة الساعة 10:00، تجمع جميع الطاقم على سطح القارب، يجب فحص معدات السلامة قبل الإنزال.
usageTranslations.pt: Treinamento de bote salva-vidas marcado para as 10h, toda a tripulação no convés, verificar equipamentos de segurança antes de baixar.
usageTranslations.ru: Учения с шлюпками назначены на 10:00, весь экипаж на шлюпочном палубе, проверить спасательное оборудование перед спуском.
usageTranslations.ja: 救命艇訓練は10時に予定されており、全員がボートデッキに集合し、降下前に安全装備を確認すること。
usageTranslations.it: Esercitazioni scialuppe previste alle 10:00, tutto l’equipaggio sul ponte scialuppe, controllare l’equipaggiamento prima di calare.
usageTranslations.vi: Diễn tập xuồng cứu sinh lúc 10:00, toàn bộ thủy thủ tập hợp trên boong, kiểm tra thiết bị an toàn trước khi hạ xuống.
usageTranslations.hi: लाइफबोट ड्रिल सुबह 10 बजे निर्धारित है, पूरा दल बोट डेक पर इकट्ठा होगा, नीचे करने से पहले सुरक्षा उपकरण की जांच करें।
usageTranslations.th: ฝึกซ้อมเรือชูชีพกำหนดเวลา 10.00 น. ลูกเรือทุกคนรวมตัวที่ดาดฟ้า ตรวจสอบอุปกรณ์ก่อนปล่อย
usageTranslations.id: Latihan sekoci dijadwalkan pukul 10.00, seluruh kru berkumpul di geladak sekoci, periksa alat keselamatan sebelum penurunan.

terms.definition: Statement indicating that the vessel’s heading remains as previously instructed or reported.
terms.source: IMO SMCP, STCW Convention, SOLAS, COLREG
terms.usage: MV Orion, course unchanged, proceeding along assigned track, request traffic confirmation.

termTranslations.th: คอร์สคงเดิม

usageTranslations.en: MV Orion, course unchanged, proceeding along assigned track, request traffic confirmation.
usageTranslations.tr: MV Orion, rota değişmedi, belirlenen hat üzerinden ilerliyor, trafik teyidi talep ediyorum.
usageTranslations.fr: MV Orion, cap inchangé, poursuit la route assignée, demande confirmation du trafic.
